name: Austin Chenge
subject: Executive Order on Relocation of the Statue of Liberty from New York to Florida
body:
For Immediate Release July 05, 2025 – Grand Rapids, Michigan Executive Order on Relocation of the Statue of Liberty from New York to Florida. Dear Mr Miller, cc'd Secretary Burgum Gov. Ron Desantis I am writing to seek your support in counselling President Donald Trump to issue an Executive Or
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://austinchenge.com/so/96PVNZIm2/c?w=zpa86iq_ekjKBAFL0QJg1T5tX4biMQim6MLjH4X1DZE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hdXN0aW5jaGVuZ2UuY29tL3NvLzk2UFZOWkltMj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZDQwODBhLTEyOGQtNDlmZi1iZTVkLTExM2QyNTk5NmExNiJ9)_**

| | Executive Order on Relocation of the Statue of Liberty from New York to Florida. "The Statue of Liberty, a global symbol of freedom and the American Dream, currently resides in New York. However, recent developments, including an invasion by illegal aliens, rising crime rates, socialist and communist ideology fueling anti-American sentiments, have diminished New York’s ability to represent the American dream. To ensure the monument continues to inspire as a beacon of hope, it shall be relocated to Florida, a state exemplifying resilience, security, and the enduring American spirit. " Austin Chenge, US Army Veteran and Former Republican Candidate for Governor of Michigan.

| | For Immediate ReleaseJuly 05, 2025 – Grand Rapids, Michigan Executive Order on Relocation of the Statue of Liberty from New York to Florida. Dear Mr Miller, cc'dSecretary BurgumGov. Ron Desantis I am writing to seek your support in counselling President Donald Trump to issue an Executive Order, directing the National Park Service to relocate the Statue of Liberty from New York to Florida. This symbolic move is necessary to realign the monument with the evolving spirit of the American Dream that New York can no longer authentically represent. New York has increasingly become plagued by an invasion of illegal aliens, undermining the safety and prosperity that once defined its status as a beacon of opportunity for legal and law-abiding immigrants who sought the American dream. Additionally, recent developments, including rising crime rates, socialist and communist ideology, have fueled anti-American sentiments and diminished New York’s ability to represent the American dream. Florida, by contrast, offers a vibrant, secure environment that better reflects the resilience and optimism of the American spirit today. As the Statue of Liberty is under the jurisdiction of the National Park Service and therefore under the Executive, your leadership is critical in facilitating this relocation. I believe this action would reinvigorate the monument’s message, ensuring it stands as a symbol of hope in a location that aligns with current American ideals. I respectfully request your support in presenting this proposal to the President for immediate action. Attached to this email is a draft of the Executive Order for your perusal. Have a wonderful Independence Day with the family. Much obliged. Austin ChengeVeteran and Former Republican Candidate for Governor of MichiganAlma Mater: The University of Birmingham Law School, England.W: www.austinchenge.com Note: This press release was issued by The Office of Austin Chenge.

name: Betty Yee
subject: Thanks for getting involved!
body:
Thanks so much for joining my campaign for Governor of California. We've got a long road ahead of us until 2026, and my team will be in touch with more ways to get involved.

In the meantime, follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/BettyYeeforCA/) and [X](https://twitter.com/bettyyeeforca?lang=en) to stay informed.

If you're interested in donating, [you may do so here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bty_web_2024?refcode=signup-auto-response)

Thanks so much again. Together, we can make California add up for all of us again.
Betty

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7a59826aefe74fee966d6f277b7228e1&_e=2GeTaiPQyKF_LK2ehd5wClm4rznuLTQtUJtB1-hTBOh4vaO986W51V9c0tM-Vj-x3jsxkcemkWHQn7F5kYnPoeZTXaw_NXW0Q1D5wZWGTwqykyQ3JxzUFa2gmZn_1Vz1gQ0BspWvC5NF3YqyO5TkZFKgE3PP8yj1xsS9uoisQC-K8B_OUSlrmCcHeQU2zsL7fTQzBioXZMrPpa5RVhJ3JKy_v_3mZavRfavX6auht51vGiRzpIMEC5CKT2yZ_NAw0ezaLn2FhFJjJ4WeCn8gqs2Vwgqgpi1iFpiF6FcKuMv5P0SuxHYpFrHJIi1tLHEkfJ8-JyoLIpJVGsmWIq-1L8CM81zAjkR76HfUVQ1VFmpU-6oCE9zeQ3LkTmJnK0sIVoU_Xj4Z-p1VEktxNTW2zSksaoEViuKXnx_QF-8ZUJOk070F7C4OYI3UFBwA8ipsQErLHAzsAlsk1WWKtR-t15KFYLRn8GCsDOnMQxPU64vUqKiCgJaWGYkVwDjCv-5W-B2VXg4EP7OIzPS1IJpJ3tlXmVcjB5rhhxN_8cTPD_tM26a1PnNpaq9X9Z_ahuE_J93GwmYUgBwG7EhDIAWUQ1i4jELdRhowJXwawONb6XCtE32ezvgAW9bKsUiNWuHZH0u2mCdnS5dk_IDN5y4jl6SPZXcrWXwlNPHuGL3nXwz50xWkUkn4wE3woLCXT7xdf7tiNyv2J6oeOcrZ_NlnYA%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: Your courage made this moment possible...
body:
We were inches from losing everything. But you held the line.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi0i702prhd83oar3o18nvupoq29js351bs93qso_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)
---
Friend, Doesn’t it feel good?

That we’re taking America back? That we’re... _finally WINNING?! _

You can just feel it in the air.

No matter where you look, the evidence is there... the Left is on the run. Routed and broken. In full retreat.

America is healing... _and becoming GREAT once again._
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhju889id1ra9eqqlccaf1ugdc5chsrq65pf21ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)
---
But Friend, even with all the victories our movement is racking up every day, I need to take a step back for a moment...

Because this moment we’re in right now?_It’s fragile._

I haven’t forgotten where we were just a few short months ago. None of us should.

**Our country was on the brink, and you and I were in an ALL-OUT fight for ****_national SURVIVAL..._**

The regime left our borders wide open. Persecuted their political opponents. Corrupted justice.

The Left labeled you and me as “domestic terrorists.” Called faithful Christians “bigots.”

They said boys could become girls. Put them in girls’ locker rooms. Let them take over girls' sports.

They told our kids the color of their skin mattered more than character, merit, or intelligence.

They masked up our kids and kicked good people out of their jobs for refusing to take a shot.

_They even played drag shows for elementary school children._

The system the regime built wasn’t just broken... It was RIGGED — against people like you and me.

**The Left declared war on everything that makes America great. And they didn’t hide it.**

They had every cultural stronghold... Hollywood. Academia. Public schools. Big Tech. Corporate America. Media. The White House.

And they used them to indoctrinate, intimidate, and isolate.

**I remember Ben Franklin’s words: ****_“A Republic... if you can keep it.”_** That line hit me harder than ever in the last few years.

Because for a while? _It felt like we couldn’t._

But then something happened...

And let’s be honest, Friend — This moment is not just the result of one election, one tour, or one person...

It was something higher...

**_God Almighty stepped in._**

It was His grace. He gave us a reprieve.

One more chance to turn things around... _If we were willing to take it._

And patriots like YOU answered that call, Friend.

You didn’t retreat. You didn’t whine. You didn’t sit back and say, _“I hope it gets better.” _

You stood up. You prayed. You gave. You fought.

**And patriots like you made it possible for Turning Point USA to be on the front lines when it mattered MOST.**

And now?

What we’ve witnessed this Spring on the American Comeback Tour?

It’s more than encouraging... **_It’s miraculous._**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zki1g756vf9uhhqbkrq0615voggk6csh6jmeas5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)
---
Thousands of students are showing up. Crowds packed around the “Prove Me Wrong” table. BEGGING for one of those red hats.

Not because it’s trendy... Not because they were told to... But because they’re hungry.

Hungry for truth. Hungry for meaning. Hungry for something they’ve never been given — permission to love their country.

These young people?

They’ve seen what the Left is selling... and they want NONE of it.

They’ve seen their schools rot with propaganda.

They’ve watched their communities and states run by the Left collapse.

They’ve seen lives and families destroyed by a deranged ideology.

They’ve been lied to about basic science and biology... about freedom... about what it means to be American.

And, because patriots like YOU put us on their campuses?

They’re becoming the most conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in HALF A CENTURY!
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2udm0ani4ss0825cmbg8pakdvbnfiand4lmntj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)
---
**Above Left:** The Left’s so-called “UnF**k America” Tour (So classy of them, I know) event at Texas A&M had NO ONE show up. **Above Right:** Meanwhile, that same day, we packed Texas A&M not once, but TWICE, with thousands of students. A decade ago, who would’ve thought we’d be beating the Left on their turf, at their own game?
---
But here’s the deal, Friend...

**Just because we’re winning... **_**_doesn’t mean we’ve won_**_**.**

This is a spiritual battle. A cultural battle. A battle for the hearts of a generation.

And just because they’re walking away from the Left... _Doesn’t mean they’ve ___fully__ _bought into what you and I both know is right._

We can’t just hope they stay on the path. We can’t leave it to chance.

We have to reach the kids we haven’t yet...

We have to show them WHY our values matter, why they’re better — and how to defend them.

We have to make sure they don’t just leave the Left... but that they RUN to our movement, our ideas, and our love for this country.

That they NEVER look back.

**And, Friend?****_You and I have to show them what comes NEXT._** That’s how we make this cultural shift PERMANENT. That’s how we make sure the American Comeback ushers in the next era of American Greatness.

The Left hasn’t given up. In fact, they’re just getting more desperate.Which means we can’t rest. We can' t give them one inch of ground back.Not after everything you’ve done. Not after everything we’ve built. _Not with everything on the line._

We have to press in. Harder than ever.

**This is our shot to lock in a generational shift... a true REALIGNMENT... And it all starts with you.**

Thank you for standing with us.

You believed before anyone else did, Friend.

You didn’t give up when the country was on the ropes.

You stayed in the fight when it was unpopular — when it was dangerous — _when it felt hopeless._

The victories we’re winning now? You earned them.

And now, I’m asking you to help us finish the job. To play for all the marbles.

**To win what we’ve always wanted:****_To pass down the America we’re proud of — and leave her better than we found her._**

I’m telling you... these young people?

It’s what I see in their eyes... **Relief. Hope. Conviction.**

_They’re ready._

Let’s reach even more young hearts and minds — with the same grit, grace, and gratitude that got us to this moment.

**Let’s make this the turning point our kids — and our country — ****_deserve._**

From one patriot to another... thank you. The best is still yet to come.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z04f1s2d2v83jincjm94ap9ucnim0o3ie28art1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)
---
P.S. Ben Franklin didn’t say those words lightly...

_**“A Republic... if you can keep it.” **_

He said them at the dawn of a miracle — when this country was still fragile, still a new experiment, still surrounded by enemies.

And yet, even back then... he knew.

**Freedom is not guaranteed. **

It never has been.

It has to be fought for. Protected. Passed down.

_And right now, Friend, that responsibility doesn’t belong to some distant generation in the past..._

**It belongs to you and me. **

To all American patriots who still believe this country is worth saving.

To the young people who are finally waking up — _and need us to meet them with the truth. _

So Friend, if you’d be proud to be a part of the movement that’s going to save our GREAT nation...

If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America...

**Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next. **

When you join our movement today, every dollar you give will help flood campuses and schools with the truth... send us deeper into the Left’s territory... change even more hearts and minds...

And above all, ensure we make the most of this moment that God has so mercifully given us...

To keep the Republic. To secure America’s future. To restore her greatness.

**[Join our fight and make your generous gift to Turning Point USA today – thank you for standing with us.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlv76nq4bvuejfpv1onbp84skqs2gki4jdsvnl80_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)**
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1uqi0k2p0ns22mhtfl3t6ktpj5md1q553cada50_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z18ut7gotl09r472ugfr54d16fido3n48h1naopg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn08v6l0avjnjou796dp4r7jqvembr4doldrct8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3dukm79c6gcn57juod1869dbafepihoeduealto_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1vud66h31o4dp196ikms6n36bv4dnapm0jucs2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm488af57am23p6o7n5ptaghpictu8kjlthem5ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:

Hello Friend,
We're reaching out with an important update.

name: Team Kotek
subject: Leading with pride: Governor Kotek made the LGBTQ Victory Fund’s Top 25 list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — The LGBTQ Victory Fund just named Governor Tina Kotek to their Top 25 Out Power List, which honors openly LGBTQ+ leaders across the country who are making a difference in public service. We’re so proud to see Tina on that list, not just because of who she is, but because of the work she’s doing to build a more inclusive state. The truth is, representation matters. But results matter even more. That’s why we’re: ✔️ Protecting LGBTQ+ youth from harmful legislation and discrimination
✔️ Investing in mental health care and crisis response
✔️ Expanding affordable housing options
✔️ Funding education and public services that reflect the dignity and diversity of every Oregonian This is what governing with purpose looks like. And while Pride Month may technically be over, our commitment to safety, opportunity, and equality continues every day — in every policy we write, every community we serve, and every decision we make. **[If you believe in this work, we hope you’ll consider making a contribution to help keep us moving forward:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110875138/555647455/-773863328?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FhMjM2Mi02NjU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2VYxmn8XPEDaBqDnkfMgoscjlHnq240ehRSoE3bob0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110875140/555647456/-773863328?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FhMjM2Mi02NjU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q2VYxmn8XPEDaBqDnkfMgoscjlHnq240ehRSoE3bob0=)

body:

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5vm3tu8gtrn0q6f0a0juqvvennluq1u56hj06sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or1c5h2bs)

_**Are you proud to be an American?**_

New polls from Fox News have _**JUST**_ been released, and they’ve revealed something shocking.

Over _**70%**_ of Americans have now stated that they are _**PROUD**_ to be be an American - _that’s upwards of 13% since Joe Biden’s Presidency._

Thanks to President Trump, America is finally back on the right track, and patriotism is through the roof.
In truth, we’re sure this number is _**MUCH HIGHER**_ , but we want to be sure.

So we’re asking millions of MAGA voters nationwide:

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpoej3086vivleo9ruf4sa8n2ip0p5si7i830krg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1pu36ude304fs65jis65o4ofnbq4b51d8kvlv4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0gei7kq49kl864e0bd2rnus4b33vbkrpes6t1j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z37i4gqri3ptmblrm68ds0qnnvae06i93ktknu6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4ctg69or4shh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Your courage made this moment possible...
body:
We were inches from losing everything. But you held the line.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqt7mg89fj1h9gv5k9qjgf5q98kh00lpiovmoq08_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)
---
Friend, Doesn’t it feel good?

That we’re taking America back? That we’re... _finally WINNING?! _

You can just feel it in the air.

No matter where you look, the evidence is there... the Left is on the run. Routed and broken. In full retreat.

America is healing... _and becoming GREAT once again._
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3l4u4cgm73o3qdjn2e79p812m9s1bcdq547gdh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)
---
But Friend, even with all the victories our movement is racking up every day, I need to take a step back for a moment...

Because this moment we’re in right now?_It’s fragile._

I haven’t forgotten where we were just a few short months ago. None of us should.

**Our country was on the brink, and you and I were in an ALL-OUT fight for ****_national SURVIVAL..._**

The regime left our borders wide open. Persecuted their political opponents. Corrupted justice.

The Left labeled you and me as “domestic terrorists.” Called faithful Christians “bigots.”

They said boys could become girls. Put them in girls’ locker rooms. Let them take over girls' sports.

They told our kids the color of their skin mattered more than character, merit, or intelligence.

They masked up our kids and kicked good people out of their jobs for refusing to take a shot.

_They even played drag shows for elementary school children._

The system the regime built wasn’t just broken... It was RIGGED — against people like you and me.

**The Left declared war on everything that makes America great. And they didn’t hide it.**

They had every cultural stronghold... Hollywood. Academia. Public schools. Big Tech. Corporate America. Media. The White House.

And they used them to indoctrinate, intimidate, and isolate.

**I remember Ben Franklin’s words: ****_“A Republic... if you can keep it.”_** That line hit me harder than ever in the last few years.

Because for a while? _It felt like we couldn’t._

But then something happened...

And let’s be honest, Friend — This moment is not just the result of one election, one tour, or one person...

It was something higher...

**_God Almighty stepped in._**

It was His grace. He gave us a reprieve.

One more chance to turn things around... _If we were willing to take it._

And patriots like YOU answered that call, Friend.

You didn’t retreat. You didn’t whine. You didn’t sit back and say, _“I hope it gets better.” _

You stood up. You prayed. You gave. You fought.

**And patriots like you made it possible for Turning Point USA to be on the front lines when it mattered MOST.**

And now?

What we’ve witnessed this Spring on the American Comeback Tour?

It’s more than encouraging... **_It’s miraculous._**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjeki31tjlu9ddja2ph7ant257k27jlp4t60f4h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)
---
Thousands of students are showing up. Crowds packed around the “Prove Me Wrong” table. BEGGING for one of those red hats.

Not because it’s trendy... Not because they were told to... But because they’re hungry.

Hungry for truth. Hungry for meaning. Hungry for something they’ve never been given — permission to love their country.

These young people?

They’ve seen what the Left is selling... and they want NONE of it.

They’ve seen their schools rot with propaganda.

They’ve watched their communities and states run by the Left collapse.

They’ve seen lives and families destroyed by a deranged ideology.

They’ve been lied to about basic science and biology... about freedom... about what it means to be American.

And, because patriots like YOU put us on their campuses?

They’re becoming the most conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in HALF A CENTURY!
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi8itgon6uqms59mf78jhbbspj99fs2lnob7in2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)
---
**Above Left:** The Left’s so-called “UnF**k America” Tour (So classy of them, I know) event at Texas A&M had NO ONE show up. **Above Right:** Meanwhile, that same day, we packed Texas A&M not once, but TWICE, with thousands of students. A decade ago, who would’ve thought we’d be beating the Left on their turf, at their own game?
---
But here’s the deal, Friend...

**Just because we’re winning... **_**_doesn’t mean we’ve won_**_**.**

This is a spiritual battle. A cultural battle. A battle for the hearts of a generation.

And just because they’re walking away from the Left... _Doesn’t mean they’ve ___fully__ _bought into what you and I both know is right._

We can’t just hope they stay on the path. We can’t leave it to chance.

We have to reach the kids we haven’t yet...

We have to show them WHY our values matter, why they’re better — and how to defend them.

We have to make sure they don’t just leave the Left... but that they RUN to our movement, our ideas, and our love for this country.

That they NEVER look back.

**And, Friend?****_You and I have to show them what comes NEXT._** That’s how we make this cultural shift PERMANENT. That’s how we make sure the American Comeback ushers in the next era of American Greatness.

The Left hasn’t given up. In fact, they’re just getting more desperate.Which means we can’t rest. We can' t give them one inch of ground back.Not after everything you’ve done. Not after everything we’ve built. _Not with everything on the line._

We have to press in. Harder than ever.

**This is our shot to lock in a generational shift... a true REALIGNMENT... And it all starts with you.**

Thank you for standing with us.

You believed before anyone else did, Friend.

You didn’t give up when the country was on the ropes.

You stayed in the fight when it was unpopular — when it was dangerous — _when it felt hopeless._

The victories we’re winning now? You earned them.

And now, I’m asking you to help us finish the job. To play for all the marbles.

**To win what we’ve always wanted:****_To pass down the America we’re proud of — and leave her better than we found her._**

I’m telling you... these young people?

It’s what I see in their eyes... **Relief. Hope. Conviction.**

_They’re ready._

Let’s reach even more young hearts and minds — with the same grit, grace, and gratitude that got us to this moment.

**Let’s make this the turning point our kids — and our country — ****_deserve._**

From one patriot to another... thank you. The best is still yet to come.
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zivg85kfgksmjaslpqtvqnie4flh2b8elsgc6v18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)
---
P.S. Ben Franklin didn’t say those words lightly...

_**“A Republic... if you can keep it.” **_

He said them at the dawn of a miracle — when this country was still fragile, still a new experiment, still surrounded by enemies.

And yet, even back then... he knew.

**Freedom is not guaranteed. **

It never has been.

It has to be fought for. Protected. Passed down.

_And right now, Friend, that responsibility doesn’t belong to some distant generation in the past..._

**It belongs to you and me. **

To all American patriots who still believe this country is worth saving.

To the young people who are finally waking up — _and need us to meet them with the truth. _

So Friend, if you’d be proud to be a part of the movement that’s going to save our GREAT nation...

If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America...

**Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next. **

When you join our movement today, every dollar you give will help flood campuses and schools with the truth... send us deeper into the Left’s territory... change even more hearts and minds...

And above all, ensure we make the most of this moment that God has so mercifully given us...

To keep the Republic. To secure America’s future. To restore her greatness.

**[Join our fight and make your generous gift to Turning Point USA today – thank you for standing with us.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkbss5jfs50qbb8s7vu66ppi1p4gt4kqp4lgbed8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)**
---

**Make Your Gift Here**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4oncjtfmhgmaj7310h20nqh03tufrn8rdvmen60_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb0c3h2bs)

name: Real American Reporting
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zd9glkurbible3ra74s786gris9r6olg3ka1c1kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zlse4tcaddr4pa17i7m318htb5rn3q6ce4frg6a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb2cph2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z00f2tv5mopg2l112rk17hpe55pfp2mogjdarom0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb2cph2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6hlduj72ugvdnvd1aeh8h8ffm221nbfulugqktg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb2cph2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcesjcg52eeseor8o2uq945v21kc8e60q12fmamg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti60pb2cph2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcrl9n5q7kljlth4imc24ofhg6pkqk43937oem0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti68ob2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjn143irrjinurnvc5nc7r5pmf66tlp95bt5087o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti68ob2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbktamkfrd804ragedt1coqvk2celd8uarh9fal0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti68ob2c9h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0orsgcuivtao29hb9io148i1ah7a12ofb49d9t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti68ob2c9h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: Ignorance or indoctrination: What’s wrong with Gen Z?
body:
Why do so many young Americans fail to appreciate their blessings? Why are they drawn to terrible ideologies like socialism and communism?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztd080ktrnjf775f5agu22npgt7dgu3sujc5ntso_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs) Friend,

_Why do so many young Americans**fail** to appreciate their blessings?_

_Why are they drawn to**terrible** ideologies like socialism and communism?

Why do so many of them embrace hateful causes and even **terrorist** organizations like Hamas?_

**It’s because they don’t know any better.**

They’ve been kept ignorant or lied to by their teachers, professors, and social media.

Now, we have a population of indoctrinated young people who are easily manipulated, don’t understand their history, and don’t appreciate their freedom... _**that’s why they’re just giving it away!**_

All these indoctrinated kids say capitalism and free speech are bad. _But they’ve never lived without them_.

If these young people could just see for themselves the horrors of socialism or other dictatorial regimes, they’d quickly get set straight.

Of course, we can’t take students to a tyrannical country to see what it’s really like. But we can bring people who’ve experienced tyranny and socialism to them, and warn them of the dangers of embracing destructive ideologies.

People like me!

My name is Daniel Di Martino, and I grew up in Venezuela. I saw firsthand how socialism utterly **ruins** a country, and I made it my mission to save this country from following my homeland’s tragic fate.

I started the Dissident Project because I saw so many kids being indoctrinated into Marxist ideas of several kinds, including the cultural Marxism of race and gender ideology.

Will you help me spread the word about the dangers of these ideologies to more young Americans?

[You can help me and my colleagues reach the younger generation with the real story about socialism and government oppression, directly from people who’ve suffered from them. Click here to donate today. >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrpi5jir2b6e4taa1tfjndsthde6pko7huvfdd9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)
[**Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqvll0bjthd8jpm8irclqp6enb5rs6frlg3vuka0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)
I don’t want to live in another Venezuela, and I don’t want to have to flee another country.

Yet there are too many people who want to turn the U.S. into something like Venezuela. And I don’t mean that as an exaggeration.

**Maybe you’ve seen some of the polls that consistently show more 18-to-29-year-olds have a positive view of socialism than they do of capitalism.**

It’s little wonder they feel that way, considering all they get in their classrooms and the news media is propaganda for socialism and attacks on free enterprise.

Worse yet, there are many politicians, including Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar, who propose the same ideas here that bankrupted my homeland.

**Our society can’t survive if future generations come to believe that socialism is better than capitalism.**

You and I must not allow this terrible rot to continue among our students.

We cannot let this wonderful country be lost.

The best way to learn this lesson is not through a book, it’s not through a video, and it’s not through a teacher. It’s through the testimony of a person who lived through it, like me.

I’m doing my part by sharing my story with every young person I can. Now, I’m counting on you to do your part.

[Your support will help me open more eyes! Please click below to donate today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq1hchisqck8amtj09c2m6sv6soneqcos5tq1o1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)
[**Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zovlauas5iqtmgmc1v21901ic7bgrngslhi7q8a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)
Wouldn’t it be great if every single student got to meet a survivor of a tyrannical government?

**The more young people we dissidents reach with the truth, the less likely they’ll be to fall for the lies of socialists and tyrants.**

You can play a big role here with your generous support.

It costs roughly $2,500 to have one of our Dissident Project speakers visit a school and speak to students.

Your gift helps cover all the costs of our travel and our time spent speaking at that school.

We don’t charge the schools for our events. That’s up to you and other generous givers like you, who care about America and love freedom.

**By supporting the Dissident Project, you can help me and my colleagues visit hundreds more schools and help thousands more students learn to appreciate their precious freedoms.**
[**Donate $10**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcpur3sjvqn52ldea8p1c6g8c67tducc4rgm7r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

[**Donate $35**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0unrb99376cn2k86tnjii78mkobbcasd3ungq1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

[**Donate $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuf29m6nl4l80ekkk7b5qqfmt7dhmpt0oqtcmtlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

[**Donate $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6n9p00ffkkns0d67dap4jf0m2cf146133aj270o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

[**Donate $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0bo1ej7i3t1tt7c0ltoaego4om7lbf0lvv6qvno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

[**Donate $1,000**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh29uihsnc18s4t03dtbebr1hagc7tjl7ji62e98_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

[**Donate Any Amount**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhjmmdtnp2tjviiiv7ml2duqtjsi3r213g850qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)
Sincerely,

Daniel Di Martino
Dissident Project Founder

P.S. I conclude my speeches to students with a phrase Venezuelans whisper to one another: _“We were rich but we didn’t know it.”_

**We didn’t know what we had until it was gone. I don’t want you to have to say that here one day!**

I am doing my best so we don’t lose the United States like we lost Venezuela. Through the Dissident Project, I’m sharing the truth about socialism and government tyranny with America’s students. And I’m eager to have your help.

With each such talk, you’d help open the eyes of 100 or more young people, and keep them from being tempted by socialism and other destructive ideologies.

**Please don’t wait to give. Let’s bring the truth to every young American we can, so they don’t take their blessings for granted.**
[**Donate**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqka44rdnv8lkq3dhr2j23vhmq0f1v8cepiadet8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6coj2c5h2bs)

_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

clean_body: Why do so many young Americans fail to appreciate their blessings? Why are they drawn to terrible ideologies like socialism and communism? |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Friend, Why do so many young Americansfail to appreciate their blessings? Why are they drawn toterrible ideologies like socialism and communism? Why do so many of them embrace hateful causes and even terrorist organizations like Hamas? It’s because they don’t know any better. They’ve been kept ignorant or lied to by their teachers, professors, and social media. Now, we have a population of indoctrinated young people who are easily manipulated, don’t understand their history, and don’t appreciate their freedom... that’s why they’re just giving it away! All these indoctrinated kids say capitalism and free speech are bad. But they’ve never lived without them. If these young people could just see for themselves the horrors of socialism or other dictatorial regimes, they’d quickly get set straight. Of course, we can’t take students to a tyrannical country to see what it’s really like. But we can bring people who’ve experienced tyranny and socialism to them, and warn them of the dangers of embracing destructive ideologies. People like me! My name is Daniel Di Martino, and I grew up in Venezuela. I saw firsthand how socialism utterly ruins a country, and I made it my mission to save this country from following my homeland’s tragic fate. I started the Dissident Project because I saw so many kids being indoctrinated into Marxist ideas of several kinds, including the cultural Marxism of race and gender ideology. Will you help me spread the word about the dangers of these ideologies to more young Americans? I don’t want to live in another Venezuela, and I don’t want to have to flee another country. Yet there are too many people who want to turn the U.S. into something like Venezuela. And I don’t mean that as an exaggeration. Maybe you’ve seen some of the polls that consistently show more 18-to-29-year-olds have a positive view of socialism than they do of capitalism. It’s little wonder they feel that way, considering all they get in their classrooms and the news media is propaganda for socialism and attacks on free enterprise. Worse yet, there are many politicians, including Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar, who propose the same ideas here that bankrupted my homeland. Our society can’t survive if future generations come to believe that socialism is better than capitalism. You and I must not allow this terrible rot to continue among our students. We cannot let this wonderful country be lost. The best way to learn this lesson is not through a book, it’s not through a video, and it’s not through a teacher. It’s through the testimony of a person who lived through it, like me. I’m doing my part by sharing my story with every young person I can. Now, I’m counting on you to do your part. Wouldn’t it be great if every single student got to meet a survivor of a tyrannical government? The more young people we dissidents reach with the truth, the less likely they’ll be to fall for the lies of socialists and tyrants. You can play a big role here with your generous support. It costs roughly $2,500 to have one of our Dissident Project speakers visit a school and speak to students. Your gift helps cover all the costs of our travel and our time spent speaking at that school. We don’t charge the schools for our events. That’s up to you and other generous givers like you, who care about America and love freedom. By supporting the Dissident Project, you can help me and my colleagues visit hundreds more schools and help thousands more students learn to appreciate their precious freedoms. Sincerely, Daniel Di Martino Dissident Project Founder P.S. name: First Look News
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqh9jsdq639thfo9i1p4rmrg2n35rqus2061vgdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6ao32chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsuc4ugij7pkn7ajicdtripokogi3ndsli7gvr18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6ao32chh2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr7oancb03ffi3repmhk296ds81cvng5a7p4rqd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6ao32chh2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z25l15d7cvf4ku1o5gskja350vbrtoek7s2c7j00_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6ao32chh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zntcop35l49nelr11f0ov0bksipj3vf3bgau8okg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6ao32chh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

New polls from Fox News have _**JUST**_ been released, and they’ve revealed something shocking.

Over _**70%**_ of Americans have now stated that they are _**PROUD**_ to be be an American - _that’s upwards of 13% since Joe Biden’s Presidency._

Thanks to President Trump, America is finally back on the right track, and patriotism is through the roof.
In truth, we’re sure this number is _**MUCH HIGHER**_ , but we want to be sure.

So we’re asking millions of MAGA voters nationwide:

**[ARE YOU PROUD TO BE AN AMERICAN AND OF OUR COUNTRY?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znonl6sqmlmgqtgk69njo53p18bv87d44qva09mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cti6epr6c9h2bs)**

name: The Flyover
subject: Texas Floods, White House Salaries, and a Skinny Fiat
body:
At least 13 people have died in Kerr County, Texas, after a [sudden flash flood struck the Hill Country](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCnMR1ovfgPFC6-hi5feyXaxGvwycERNuHy9qfkFa4eaUa_-brMF4opbst_urOrIc8bnyVxrbzPlX-ohJSzL-caK6_5KFwo0YyAugXbgp49xfSaVeNdYEbuG3bSamlhHOXQrE5qb00YFHnF3ozWeKMp8M0SwE2Hvonu3QYWtATQ0nQ0anlVyjL2aK-9FgrYx5r37jvHra4c0is_ee9u-d4kt9b6KKL_J3ASOJ3n2dWV23Js71zg9AYJnKQyOA4wCJw8k0-v9iOL29IuB3lKx4PbPT55bz9ugVOzO_84Y0qxGCsULHeK6bNa_3TV0-FvAAAA__9pR31e) early Friday morning.

# Saturday, July 5, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1994, Amazon was incorporated. The company was originally set up in Washington State as an online bookstore, but it would soon grow into one of the world's most influential technology giants. [See the original website here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUgOGnwU7ngBJiQXEbu9x2SwfkGM8OSgZOwrpPv5N9he3_-Yr_4zbfHEU67v_djpbXNB9YS0RmzDPjlytrTCmUuhHjlp4Fi4tuVqB0C6YFPQdH8ZyHJtgVUWHfoJVGSwPjKK_NZkF65TR4g-DDcjE9XoNfBrXqcdQLuIbsWwMDWgJoeencqKUfBoOqV8b3WgyAgTjl7jPRwRuu8UwvzN2S9ibajflRRP9PqEmoqdbavTAXSsf-LPjc35VQ00aFUz7btAo1ud19p6Ot6AsxNtmGR6UYqVyMGOC-O4q_OP_pyMuqnwAAAP__q5x2wQ). Our hearts are with the [victims of the devastating floods in Texas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCnMR1ovfgPFC6-hi5feyXaxGvwycERNuHy9qfkFa4eaUa_-brMF4opbst_urOrIc8bnyVxrbzPlX-ohJSzL-caK6_5KFwo0YyAugXbgp49xfSaVeNdYEbuG3bSamlhHOXQrE5qb00YFHnF3ozWeKMp8M0SwE2Hvonu3QYWtATQ0nQ0anlVyjL2aK-9FgrYx5r37jvHra4c0is_ee9u-d4kt9b6KKL_J3ASOJ3n2dWV23Js71zg9AYJnKQyOA4wCJw8k0-v9iOL29IuB3lKx4PbPT55bz9ugVOzO_84Y0qxGCsULHeK6bNa_3TV0-FvAAAA__9pR31e). We're praying for the families of the 13 lives lost and the 23 still missing, especially the young girls and staff impacted at Camp Mystic. Read more below. As our team spends the holiday with their families, today's edition is abbreviated. We'll be back to the full lineup on Monday. We're sponsored today by [Surfshark](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uKyEURlfDdB5d_gZTUDzpaTqnTYmwuRgSPFhwbce7j5wsIeWnTzpHOu8Hfwillu38Fi7oKDW_4WNUJMLuCb_CSLW1OB65EOZ2GzhCDV6A0DswO9A-hlKfXk3RJUSBckLHjeYGrOX7KTupwHITlcQIFpKVKhqtwR7NwpHLNBX3ooEBzQE0X-ZgNT8qZVBIYY5SMwUYC7U-f7SyUcZUn-2OfT61y1RdJroOJv8xsTKxnpHmcetp5NA_5w2JiTWk5E9Mri0l7L5EJv9zvSxMLK_nd-_3gk_dxeuj1FrGYpiC8yWU-mOhP6W5O_EdAAD__0chdTc), the best way to get rid of annoying ads while you browse the web.

## Floods Leave 13 Dead, 23 Missing in Texas
At least 13 people have died in Kerr County, Texas, after a [sudden flash flood struck the Hill Country](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OszAQBPCnMR1ovfgPFC6-hi5feyXaxGvwycERNuHy9qfkFa4eaUa_-brMF4opbst_urOrIc8bnyVxrbzPlX-ohJSzL-caK6_5KFwo0YyAugXbgp49xfSaVeNdYEbuG3bSamlhHOXQrE5qb00YFHnF3ozWeKMp8M0SwE2Hvonu3QYWtATQ0nQ0anlVyjL2aK-9FgrYx5r37jvHra4c0is_ee9u-d4kt9b6KKL_J3ASOJ3n2dWV23Js71zg9AYJnKQyOA4wCJw8k0-v9iOL29IuB3lKx4PbPT55bz9ugVOzO_84Y0qxGCsULHeK6bNa_3TV0-FvAAAA__9pR31e) early Friday morning. The Guadalupe River surged more than 20 feet in under an hour, sweeping away homes, RVs, and cabins. Among the hardest-hit areas was Camp Mystic, a private Christian summer camp for girls aged 7 to 17 located along the river in Hunt. Overnight, 6 to 10 inches of rain inundated the camp, forcing an emergency evacuation. Some cabins were reportedly washed away, and as of Friday afternoon, [23 campers remained unaccounted for](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp_GbI6MwZgMHrqwpWtHZPAZrjIY-S5J8_YV6SN0ueF-6dP_f1-38eYx4b58-g0cxzzu8KQEzFBGhh9PMeUc6Lkiw5rvBOSTH7XSRiorlRmDx_Qa2yq4CKChqcDV1tRWXa91X62u61SYoVfTBKYNwTfN1Juoo4118H0XK3QnTVllaqVM3V381dRT21rQjbZTY0SrICDncvnOuPMKMb3yA8plzluV3Mp8kGg-hB6EHvbXkYnPSOjhBAs9KHueVujhTvLcJ_SwYEkkPct5LUiMfpd03zYocvbbITckwn2RPvL7xZ645GPFWb6tyD8tQg9VceF4YkpInRWtWjaP6V2N_-Xz4fRvAAAA__-sKYsR). Emergency crews--including helicopters, drones, and over 400 responders--are conducting search and rescue operations across the region. Governor Greg Abbott has mobilized state resources, including the National Guard, to assist in the ongoing response. ## Fireworks Blaze Kills 1, Injures 5 in LA
A 30-year-old man died and five others were injured Thursday night after [fireworks exploded inside a Pacoima](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGu2yAUBNCvwTssuIBJFiwqVd6lm6rq0ro2F5sWmwho3Lyvf0p-4a2PNJqZ37fphjHFY_2BO7kW8nTQWRO1RmVq9B9rSDn7em6x0Zb_VaqYcAIBhgvLhZk8xvScdOddIAJSHTlpjbTiepWXbnNSe0kGBtDi4udBL2ARBkXBqwGkH7roXmnCCiOFMHLo8WrkrLUlUGBnZZgW5GPLpf-T49E2CumZH1T6Je9dcltr98rUNwYjgxHn5bWgX_OLGYy_fjIYpRA8xEIhrlujUvmMrSXiC6YYcjkivvnM5W_lc8IP4onwQZWfeceDwVhbLk-mxuiZ-i5BaWuUvHTF-fsZU4p1sEyLdceY3r3al858OPgMAAD__wxbiEk), Los Angeles, garage, setting off a fire that spread to four homes. It took more than [130 firefighters nearly an hour](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSpCAQhJ8GM7ZgBFkDgkvM9tILLZRxnTsUC-b09u2v_F_hT7uru7q_X6_xFSjR_v4ZNvS85HHHqyZkxjIy_gt1STnHeq3EuOa_FWtIYQQFVionlR1joPQZTRP9ggjYNui1s9qpvtfPZvVTuziwGPupV_rZzvCMTvcxdsvcKTCqIX-3KaesVsrq7hF6qydjHEILbmqtMAojcS6P35l2XnFJn3xiecx5a5JfmY8q2h8CBgFDmGZ3GwKGI1cWMCxUUM4FryqnwHyflQUrRdyZQpK0nzmdtxpmphPlHbhy-VPlEeZMWxAw6K431oATMDTFx-OilKh2Thj13gKlry38LYCnh_8BAAD__5h0hVQ) to knock down the blaze, which also caused a gas leak, downed power lines, and injured several animals. ## Trump to Host UFC Fight at White House in 2026

The company was originally set up in Washington State as an online bookstore, but it would soon grow into one of the world's most influential technology giants. . Our hearts are with the . We're praying for the families of the 13 lives lost and the 23 still missing, especially the young girls and staff impacted at Camp Mystic. Read more below. As our team spends the holiday with their families, today's edition is abbreviated. We'll be back to the full lineup on Monday. We're sponsored today by , the best way to get rid of annoying ads while you browse the web. | Floods Leave 13 Dead, 23 Missing in Texas At least 13 people have died in Kerr County, Texas, after a early Friday morning. The Guadalupe River surged more than 20 feet in under an hour, sweeping away homes, RVs, and cabins. Among the hardest-hit areas was Camp Mystic, a private Christian summer camp for girls aged 7 to 17 located along the river in Hunt. Overnight, 6 to 10 inches of rain inundated the camp, forcing an emergency evacuation. Some cabins were reportedly washed away, and as of Friday afternoon, . Emergency crews--including helicopters, drones, and over 400 responders--are conducting search and rescue operations across the region. Governor Greg Abbott has mobilized state resources, including the National Guard, to assist in the ongoing response. . Fireworks Blaze Kills 1, Injures 5 in LA A 30-year-old man died and five others were injured Thursday night after , Los Angeles, garage, setting off a fire that spread to four homes. The fire erupted around 9 p.m. when fireworks stored in a garage ignited, spreading quickly amid ongoing detonations. It took more than to knock down the blaze, which also caused a gas leak, downed power lines, and injured several animals. Officials are investigating and warning residents to leave fireworks to the professionals. Trump to Host UFC Fight at White House in 2026 President Trump has announced plans to host a in 2026 as part of America250 , a yearlong celebration marking the nation's 250th anniversary. UFC CEO Dana White, a longtime Trump ally, will organize the fight, which could draw up to 25,000 spectators. Irish fighter he's "all in." will blend patriotic tradition with high-profile entertainment. The semiquincentennial celebration will include events at national parks, battlefields, and historic sites; a Great American State Fair tour across all 50 states; and the launch of a National Garden of American Heroes. Trump also announced a nationally televised high school sports competition to be led by Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. | | Stop dieting.

No, seriously, do not ever try another diet again.

If you want to look and feel thinner almost instantly, just flush out the stuck poop the been building up in your gut.

No I am NOT talking about a colon cleanse!

Studies from recent ER visits show the average person is carrying around 12 to 17lbs of poop that's clinging to the walls of their gut and bowels...

And in some extreme cases up to a horrifying 25lbs of stuck poop in their gut...

Forming a giant “poop log” in the gut.

So even if you poop 2-3x per week, poop gradually clings to the walls of the guy and bowels causing your belly to stick out...

Adding pounds to the scale...

And causing gas, smelly farts and bloating.

ER doctor, Dr. Joseph Feuerstein was frustrated his patients couldn’t lose weight.

Plus diets and exercise weren’t working for many people and in some cases they even GAINED weight from diet and exercise.

Desperate for a solution, he found a hidden cause of weight gain and big belly related to poop buildup in the gut.

Working nights and weekends, he developed a powerful yet gentle **[“blue poo” tonic](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21605/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/c6a99eaa35822b97ee0bb0f6af6a894f0d861649)** that can flush your bowels clean...

Leading to satisfying relief...

And the release of 12-17 pounds of stuck poop.

NO this does not involve a colon cleanse, fiber, laxatives or stool softeners.

This is something completely new and wasn’t even available in the USA until late 2023.

Yet it can result in an instantly flatter, more attractive belly...

Free from gas, bloating, indigestion...

And of course...

The newfound ability to fully empty your bowels every time you need to go to the bathroom.

Many people were SHOCKED at what this tonic caused to come out of their body...

But at the same time...

Happy with their instantly-flatter belly...

And the ability to enjoy activity and intimacy with their partners again without discomfort, gas, or bloating.

The best part?

Because this blue poo tonic normalizes your bowel movements...

You can enjoy any and all of your favorite foods... like pizza, cheeseburgers and shakes.

And STILL maintain a flatter belly – free of stuck poop!

Like Mildred from Orlando, Florida who said:

“I’d been dealing with stuck stool on and off for the last five years, this blue poo method helped me get back to the smooth, natural daily bowel movements I love and no more camping out on the toilet!”

==> [Click here to see how to get a flatter belly overnight by eliminating stuck poop!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21605/6374453/68e1efc3b1ca3f3cd3c803395afa646e49ebd3a7/c6a99eaa35822b97ee0bb0f6af6a894f0d861649)

The best part is...

This tonic is 100% natural...

And you can mix it from the comfort of your own home!

Ivy League doctors are stunned at how well this works better than any mainstream constipation solution.

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Deadly Floods, a Cowboy Robot, and a Duck Invasion
body:
At least 13 people are dead and 23 girls are missing from Camp Mystic, a private Christian summer camp, after catastrophic flash flooding ravaged the Texas Hill Country early Friday. [Follow live updates here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2q3SAURp_GzAy61ZgOHBRKZqeTUjoMO7rNEUwMiecnb19y4D7BHX-wWOv7dxtvmHJa59-4kKvvWMaVXkemWmkfA2HIZ8ylhAN9eU3l3MtUKo4gwHBhuTBjwJTPUTfBTSL8kA05aY20UkGvmrvDzlIfe9kbBIwxCm31ZIX3iiDE4JvkLpiwwkgpJMhWdhoNCJrQkNHKMi0opFr2tt6p0huPmM_ypL31ZWmyu9e6HUz9ZDAwGHDyV0E7l2tmMPz9w2DI6Un8sQWsdDAYPhT-CUvr_DVwqfiVzEFwj8tG-8EfK3pfHmulcPHVkAJTvyQo3fe665vdhe2Vck5Hd4nOC6b88arfe_Pp4H8AAAD__8o9iO0).

# Saturday, July 5, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1929, actress [Katherine Helmond](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGngS3IPmxIBw9dUKUqXTtaNneEUw0XGSuEt6_oK3T8lt8n_b9v_hY48Xr_Cgu58prEr7RviUqh7JECpmNKIriFUfYoR5YoJXhQYC-qvyjrMXA6vKnRRYVvuiane6t73cK1rWdH5gqoobNRj6S0GVGBGqcWY98Zg1SzOzHVK6u10qAb3ZlgQVEMlqxp-8ooQi6SmzJToVfYpnTIk3IzylInN5fy2Kr2vYKhgoHWZucffhByaCTfKxjOXcHwGcpMmVfyH5QWWbHODh87p8Rbd77cl8DpDy3_S_F08BsAAP__KoBzfA) was born in Galveston. She is known for her roles as Jessica Tate and Mona Robinson in the ABC sitcoms _Soap_ and _Who's the Boss?_ She was also the voice of the character Lizzie in Disney-Pixar’s _Cars_ films. Our hearts are with families across our state after [catastrophic flash floods](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2q3SAURp_GzAy61ZgOHBRKZqeTUjoMO7rNEUwMiecnb19y4D7BHX-wWOv7dxtvmHJa59-4kKvvWMaVXkemWmkfA2HIZ8ylhAN9eU3l3MtUKo4gwHBhuTBjwJTPUTfBTSL8kA05aY20UkGvmrvDzlIfe9kbBIwxCm31ZIX3iiDE4JvkLpiwwkgpJMhWdhoNCJrQkNHKMi0opFr2tt6p0huPmM_ypL31ZWmyu9e6HUz9ZDAwGHDyV0E7l2tmMPz9w2DI6Un8sQWsdDAYPhT-CUvr_DVwqfiVzEFwj8tG-8EfK3pfHmulcPHVkAJTvyQo3fe665vdhe2Vck5Hd4nOC6b88arfe_Pp4H8AAAD__8o9iO0) in the Hill Country left at least 13 dead and 23 girls missing from Camp Mystic. See details below. As rescue teams race against time, we’re holding space for those still waiting for answers. Today’s edition of _The Texas Flyover_ is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time off to observe the Fourth of July holiday weekend with loved ones. We will return with a full edition on Monday. We're sponsored today by [Oricle Hearing Aids](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuL4zAUhX-N3Nno6UehIhAMW2S3WZjpxLV1lQgUK0hyHP_7IZ5u2um---Bwzvm4mAv44JfrX7ijLi8XzYJbDlgKJmMRbNhdiNFmmOM2xT3FKRYwnHJV066myljwYTeysnqidmAVatYp1jHBe1HdNPRs6AfmqJRqsILKic8DAKUz7QWjc-X1W4x2VDFGGWcNayUoTnEChUqKjkiK1peYmnLDgi_ILuzxiamZ470K-lbKIxNxInwkfNy2rbliicnPAd8fhI-5xIS5dmvycc01OiJGg86UBEuGufi4GG-JOBPexgMYGwhv14MH2f3Yg3PHxIUgvM3rxIg4__8c_xHensY_5-9TlbR9bD4En9t3iOsdfDg8l981_dT8KwAA__-2Yo0n), the new wireless charging hearing aids for $100.

## Floods Leave 13 Dead, 23 Missing in Texas
At least 13 people are dead and 23 girls are missing from Camp Mystic, a private Christian summer camp, after catastrophic flash flooding ravaged the Texas Hill Country early Friday. [Follow live updates here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2q3SAURp_GzAy61ZgOHBRKZqeTUjoMO7rNEUwMiecnb19y4D7BHX-wWOv7dxtvmHJa59-4kKvvWMaVXkemWmkfA2HIZ8ylhAN9eU3l3MtUKo4gwHBhuTBjwJTPUTfBTSL8kA05aY20UkGvmrvDzlIfe9kbBIwxCm31ZIX3iiDE4JvkLpiwwkgpJMhWdhoNCJrQkNHKMi0opFr2tt6p0huPmM_ypL31ZWmyu9e6HUz9ZDAwGHDyV0E7l2tmMPz9w2DI6Un8sQWsdDAYPhT-CUvr_DVwqfiVzEFwj8tG-8EfK3pfHmulcPHVkAJTvyQo3fe665vdhe2Vck5Hd4nOC6b88arfe_Pp4H8AAAD__8o9iO0). [Torrential rain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ8GOiP_Db4ULtLQ3bQp0dgeFme9eGW8sLx9xKbIA6Qb6ZPmfOf8-p6-Maa43n7ig2x9z3la6dgS1UplCoQhnXPKOWzo8-HyWbLLFSfJJTBuGIcpYEznpNtgHQ-DaMkKA8IIJb9Uu1hyahC9AeXBSAcE3g9K99wNPblZzW201zNuOAjBhRSd6DWC5OQQCLQyjeYUYs2lqwtVeuM2pzPvVDqfH22yS63PrVE_Gjk2cjyOo7vTusFFGzliqdEnughhXaj8u9jfZuxOpewxJWK_X-lkmn1CGO3oX1hjXrdGjtIopnrBB-6BaQWSaZKBfWmHTGHws-TcKNBtseF5xJTi1l_qtwfG9DGt_7fvbuWfAAAA__-E_41r) caused the Guadalupe River to rise nearly 30 feet in just hours, sweeping away cabins and cutting power, water, and communication at the camp near Hunt. Two groups of campers have been confirmed safe, but others remain unaccounted for, with desperate parents receiving direct notices only if their daughters weren’t located. Rescue teams in boats and helicopters are scouring the area amid washed-out roads and widespread devastation. Officials said the region had no warning system and was blindsided by the rapid rise, calling it one of the most dangerous floods the area has ever seen.
## Texas BBQ Tops National Rankings
Three Texas joints landed on _Food & Wine_’s list of the [nation’s best barbecue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuszAQBODTQAfyGgykcPE3dPnbV6I1XoIlwyJ7E8Ltn5IrvH70zWh-7tMdQwz74z9uZOW98LTTmSOJUJo8oY_XEpl9xplPx1dix4KTVtpUqq-UmTyGeE1t6a1T_gYlWegN9NDooSlX62Ag6BAaGJZ21gBDR9gMfXcblsV0WAb7wVSvDIACDTV0LRqtyKEh0zZ90SryQTjVspLQG_MSL35RqmfeymhXkSMXzb9Cj4Uez_OstyvjjrvwHvgTKvS4MPtCj5gkzJEKPTrKUn21ymFyND-pSpQFnwl3yZVWrdLNcKuP9SiT9ccZYgy5-8x5bBjit13-9tnL6t8AAAD__0jqgT0), with Austin’s famed Franklin Barbecue taking the top spot for its iconic brisket. Lockhart’s [Barbs B Q](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7GO6yAQheGnMV2sYTA4Lihuky633RINZpwgkZAFFOK3X3lfYeuj80n_19VdKab4vP2nB9v22bJ7cq-JW-PiAlNI-5ZyDpXW3H3eS_a5kUNAfYL5BNoFiml3kwjWQ1ikYCtnLWep8KzE3frzAtO6sUFaCRD0opXCxRjFXhnQItoDgxm0lCBRjtJMpBHYk2Y9qXmYgENsuYztzo0_VLe05zeXcc0Pkey9tVcd1L8BLwNeeu-jp-Kr_z72AS-i2PDqMaVYzYHdHhTT77f9rfht8ScAAP__sCZpZw), known for South Texas and Mexican flavor fusions, and Taylor’s Louie Mueller Barbecue, “a third-generation ‘cathedral of smoke,’”also made the cut. Texas dominated the roundup, cementing its reign as America’s barbecue king. clean_body: At least 13 people are dead and 23 girls are missing from Camp Mystic, a private Christian summer camp, after catastrophic flash flooding ravaged the Texas Hill Country early Friday. . | | | | | | Saturday, July 5, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1929, actress was born in Galveston. She is known for her roles as Jessica Tate and Mona Robinson in the ABC sitcoms Soap and Who's the Boss? She was also the voice of the character Lizzie in Disney-Pixar’s Cars films. Our hearts are with families across our state after in the Hill Country left at least 13 dead and 23 girls missing from Camp Mystic. See details below. As rescue teams race against time, we’re holding space for those still waiting for answers. Today’s edition of The Texas Flyover is a bit shorter than usual as our team takes time off to observe the Fourth of July holiday weekend with loved ones. We will return with a full edition on Monday. We're sponsored today by , the new wireless charging hearing aids for $100. Abilene 🌧️ 85/71° | Amarillo ⛅ 88/69° | Austin 🌧️ 79/75° | Brownsville ☁️ 88/79° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 85/79° | DFW 🌧️ 86/74° | El Paso ☀️ 103/77° | Houston ⛅ 88/78° | Laredo ☁️ 88/77° | Lubbock 🌤️ 90/73° | Midland 🌤️ 92/73° | San Antonio 🌧️ 83/75° | Tyler 🌥️ 89/72° | Waco 🌧️ 81/71° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Floods Leave 13 Dead, 23 Missing in Texas At least 13 people are dead and 23 girls are missing from Camp Mystic, a private Christian summer camp, after catastrophic flash flooding ravaged the Texas Hill Country early Friday. . caused the Guadalupe River to rise nearly 30 feet in just hours, sweeping away cabins and cutting power, water, and communication at the camp near Hunt. Two groups of campers have been confirmed safe, but others remain unaccounted for, with desperate parents receiving direct notices only if their daughters weren’t located. Rescue teams in boats and helicopters are scouring the area amid washed-out roads and widespread devastation. Officials said the region had no warning system and was blindsided by the rapid rise, calling it one of the most dangerous floods the area has ever seen. Texas BBQ Tops National Rankings Three Texas joints landed on Food & Wine’s list of the , with Austin’s famed Franklin Barbecue taking the top spot for its iconic brisket. Lockhart’s , known for South Texas and Mexican flavor fusions, and Taylor’s Louie Mueller Barbecue, “a third-generation ‘cathedral of smoke,’”also made the cut. Texas dominated the roundup, cementing its reign as America’s barbecue king. | Big companies charge THOUSANDS for hearing aids—but guess what? You don’t have to pay that much! No doctor visits, no crazy prices—just amazing hearing at an unbeatable deal. Over 150,000 happy customers are already loving their new way of hearing. Don’t let overpriced hearing aids hold you back— | ➤ Austin: Videos show a child-sized robot named Jake roaming city streets in sneakers and a cowboy hat. The $16,000 humanoid model, made by Unitree Robotics, is remotely operated via a wireless controller. () ➤ Statewide: The Department of Public Safety is encouraging Texans to use the iWatchTexas app, recently launched to report suspicious activity and keep communities informed and secure across the state. () ➤ Taylor: The city is managing a Muscovy duck invasion, a species known for aggressive behavior and even biting people. ()** ➤ Waxahachie: Meanwhile, a farmer has been unable to corral up to 20,000 of his chickens as heavy rains have made it difficult to manage the volume of his free-range egg project. () ➤ Laredo: Seven illegal immigrants were rescued from an abandoned trailer after the driver, who was hauling the trailer, crashed into a fence along I-35 and fled the scene. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Janet Mills Announces Creation of Maine’s New Cabinet-Level Department of Energy Resources
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Janet Mills Announces Creation of Maine’s New Cabinet-Level Department of Energy Resources (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=4e9dac7060&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jul 04, 2025 08:14 am
Gov. Janet Mills (D) has signed a bill into law creating the Maine Department of Energy Resources, a cabinet-level department responsible for coordinating and leading the state’s energy policy and programs. In January, the governor announced her intention to seek legislation elevating the Governor’s Energy Office (GEO) by the end of this year. At the [...]

The One Big Beautiful Bill Act — a national budget bill that includes many of the key policies of President Donald Trump’s (R) second term agenda — has now been sent to the President’s desk where it is expected to be signed into law on Independence Day. After hours of voting and debating on the [...]

------------------------------------------------------------
By Steve Robinson on Jul 04, 2025 08:02 am
Maine Gov. Janet Mills lost her cool on a Fox News reporter who asked her about re-surfaced allegations that she was a heavy cocaine user in the 1980s and 1990s, including while serving as a district attorney. Gov. Mills dropped an F-bomb on Tuesday after being questioned about her cocaine use, with a cheeky ambush [...]

name: Evan Power, Florida GOP Chairman
subject: Mr. President, Welcome…to Alligator Alcatraz
body:
Florida is leading the charge and putting some real teeth behind it's push to eliminate illegal immigration!

Florida is leading the charge and putting some real teeth behind it's push to eliminate illegal immigration!
| | | | | [ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKFQ/?__vbtrk=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot,
Florida put its foot down on Joe Biden’s border-flooding immigration policy, and now, with President Trump in the White House, our state can fight illegal immigration without hurdles from Biden's auto-pen.
We are thrilled to welcome [Florida's Man](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKFR/?__vbtrk=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) President Donald J. Trump to the Everglades to visit the newly unveiled Alligator Alcatraz for its grand opening Tuesday. The migrant detention center could house up to 5,000 illegal immigrants by July. This time it’s alligator versus alien, and we all know who wins.
---
| | | | | [ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKFQ/?__vbtrk=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | [ SINK YOUR TEETH INTO SWAG HERE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aKFQ/?__vbtrk=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAwNDYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
|
President Trump made a promise to the American people—to clean up Joe Biden’s mess, remove criminal migrants, and get America’s illegal immigration crisis under control. Governor DeSantis and Attorney General Uthmeier know how to get the job done and built Alligator Alcatraz in just a single week. Florida is the state leading the charge!
Illegal aliens don't get to game the system and hide behind Joe Biden any longer. They get put behind bars and a lot of teeth.
Help us welcome President Trump back to the Great State of Florida and don't miss your chance to pick up your Alligator Alcatraz gear!
In Liberty, Evan Power
---
****

---

name: Rob Ortt
subject: Reminder: Hochul’s nuclear pivot proves New York’s green agenda Is failing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Check out my latest OpEd for The Buffalo News...
| | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
Friend -
In my latest OpEd for the Buffalo News, I discussed Governor Hochul's recent announcement on nuclear energy and Albany's FAILED green agenda, which is nowhere near set goals and is increasing energy costs substantially for New Yorkers.
Nuclear is part of the answer, but only if Albany finally admits the truth that New York needs energy solutions grounded in common sense, not politics.
I have attached the full OpEd below, Check it out!
---
| Albany Democrats continue to lead us down a dark path to please radical environmental groups, while New Yorkers flee by the millions to more affordable, more energy-friendly states.
If we're serious about meeting our energy needs and building an affordable, competitive state, we must adopt an all-of-the-above strategy led by the private sector.
We need Republicans in Albany who will fight for common-sense energy policy and affordable solutions.
[Can you chip-in $25, $50, or $100 to help me fight the radical left-wing agenda in Albany ?](https://u4b9iicbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qJNcc2Q2iZ621EiGn-ze2TahPot4AucCIJpJQFJF2QAOZNWLXQbnF5DoptxZ5uBaVmWtA-vnhtlXLea0Y7NSnzlU-wwfkpfXi6-ZzO3j4mCUYrasAoNSlRanw1C-HjJkl1_rkxZ2XAzsq89ZvkVGDKSoW8S1eu4neGPRD_gKNYEvxpHKcMVON4ActIgQ74QToNimhDE9_Vo=&c=DsipKYp8j-s5L5fn7nF3Ll0RGsmTqFEfgOcL41Vf5bSRwUmHhydPRw==&ch=6q4XWGiYo_Vr_OwhpzvLOVz46sZ0hsNhhed7XPHm66kTPuNCwJCBJw==)
Click below to make a contribution to our campaign today!
---
| | [Chip In](https://u4b9iicbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qJNcc2Q2iZ621EiGn-ze2TahPot4AucCIJpJQFJF2QAOZNWLXQbnF5DoptxZ5uBaVmWtA-vnhtlXLea0Y7NSnzlU-wwfkpfXi6-ZzO3j4mCUYrasAoNSlRanw1C-HjJkl1_rkxZ2XAzsq89ZvkVGDKSoW8S1eu4neGPRD_gKNYEvxpHKcMVON4ActIgQ74QTtu0SujPBl0w=&c=DsipKYp8j-s5L5fn7nF3Ll0RGsmTqFEfgOcL41Vf5bSRwUmHhydPRw==&ch=6q4XWGiYo_Vr_OwhpzvLOVz46sZ0hsNhhed7XPHm66kTPuNCwJCBJw==)
---
| God bless,
---
| |
---
| Rob Ortt NY Senate Republican Leader
---
| |
---
|
# Hochul's nuclear pivot proves New York's green agenda Is failing

By Rob Ortt
Gov. Kathy Hochul's announcement to build a new nuclear power plant in upstate New York is welcome news and long overdue. For years, Senate Republicans have called for expanding nuclear power as a safe, reliable, zero-emissions source of energy. Bringing back nuclear energy will add thousands of good-paying jobs back to our economy. I'm glad the governor finally admits we were right.
But this about-face is more than a policy shift. It's an admission that Albany's so-called "green" plans, like the Climate Leadership and Community Protection Act, are dangerously unrealistic and failing New Yorkers. Not long ago, under Governor Hochul's predecessor, Democrats shut down Indian Point, one of the state's cleanest and most efficient nuclear plants, without a credible plan to replace its power. The result? More fossil fuels burned in older plants, higher emissions and skyrocketing costs for families and businesses.
At the same time, Albany's environmental elites pushed the CLCPA, sweeping mandates that look good in press releases but fail the real test: keeping the lights on at an affordable price. Our economy, job creators, and working families depend on a stable, sufficient energy supply.
This nuclear reversal is a step in the right direction, but it won't be nearly enough if Hochul continues to cling to the same failed playbook.
New York cannot survive on good intentions and half-measures. We're already seeing businesses fleeing to states with cheaper, more reliable power, families struggling with utility bills 48% higher than the national average, and a grid that can't handle the rising demand from new technologies and a growing population.
If we're serious about meeting our energy needs and building an affordable, competitive state, we must adopt an all-of-the-above strategy led by the private sector, which includes more nuclear power, more natural gas, modernized pipelines, improved transmission lines, and smart investments in renewables that actually work.
New Yorkers deserve leadership that plans for the real world, not a fantasy land where slogans power our homes and businesses. Nuclear is part of the answer, but only if Albany finally admits the truth that New York needs energy solutions grounded in common sense, not politics.

Rob Ortt is the Republican Leader of the New York State Senate. He represents the 62nd Senate District.
