If we flip this seat, we will stop MAGA-enabler Susan Collins from handing Trump the reins of our Democracy. [I KNOW we can get this done, but it’s going to take a huge surge of grassroots support to show extremist Republicans that we have what it takes to finally defeat Susan Collins. I’m humbly asking, will you split a $50, $25, or even $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action before midnight to become one of my campaign’s supporters? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd7d1c52-466d-4f97-9766-90298f772de7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, let me introduce myself. I was born and raised in Lewiston, Maine. My dad was a pastor and my mom was a teacher – those values of faith and service are why I dedicated my career to defending our Democracy: I’ve fought to get corporate money out of politics, hold CEOs accountable, and defeat election deniers. But after my husband and I moved back to my home state to build our family, I realized that was not enough. It’s not enough to worry that my daughter would grow up in an America that’s no longer a free and fair Democracy. It’s not enough to panic about my parents and husband losing their Social Security, healthcare, and fundamental rights. It’s not enough to be outraged that my own U.S. Senator, Susan Collins, voted to ACQUIT Donald Trump the first time he was impeached – claiming he’d “learned his lesson.” So, I decided to do something with my anger and outrage – and I’m running for office to defeat her. [But I can’t do it alone. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to defeat Susan Collins and fight for an America that future generations can be proud of. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to chip in right now and become a supporter of my campaign. Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to take back our government from Susan Collins and Donald Trump. If you’re ready to get off the sidelines and join this fight with me, can I count on you to split a $50, $25, or even $3 donation between me and Blue Amp Action before midnight to boost my campaign? I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so I’m relying on grassroots donors (like you) to keep my campaign running. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T23a7221a-fb7a-46f3-8dd0-2b91e4c9ed83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: A Game-Changer for School Choice in Our State!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/gamechanger?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **I’m thrilled to share groundbreaking news for Mississippi!** With the passage of the _One Big Beautiful Bill_ , a federal tax credit is due to transform the school choice landscape in our state.

**This new tax credit enables individual donors to fund scholarships for local Mississippi families, who will now be able to select the schools that best suit their children.** Donors can redirect funds they would have paid to the IRS, receiving a dollar-for-dollar tax credit that reduces their tax liability by the amount donated, up to $1,700 per taxpayer (as outlined in the Senate version).

In other words, local money that would otherwise have been given to the government, instead stays in Mississippi, to provide scholarships for K-12 education, including private schools, charters, homeschooling, and more.

**I estimate that up to $116 million could be available statewide, potentially funding approximately 18,000 scholarships each year at $6,500 each.**

The impact could be profound. Imagine 18,000 students, previously limited by circumstance, gaining access to schools of their choice. Eligible households—those earning up to 300% of the area’s median income (covering most Mississippi families)—could escape underperforming schools, unlocking better opportunities for their children. This transforms opportunities for thousands of families.

Moreover, this tax credit introduces competition, compelling public, private, and charter schools to elevate standards and innovate. With 18,000 students seeking private education options, any lingering resistance from certain private providers is likely to fade. Already excellent schools, like The Redeemer’s School in Jackson, will thrive and expand, I suspect.

For years, efforts to expand school choice in Mississippi have faced obstruction from entrenched interests.** MCPP has led the fight for school choice in this state for several years, and I can tell you that this federal tax credit now changes the game. **

With over $100 million annually fueling school choice, the tide will turn, and Mississippi is finally aligning with neighboring states that prioritize parent power.

Anti school choice liberals in our state, many of who spent years supporting anti school choice campaigners and media groups while sending their own kids to private schools, will despair. They should.

**Mississippi lawmakers are at last taking school choice seriously.** We are starting to see a sustained effort to give families in our state the sort of choices families have in all of our neighboring states.

**This new federal tax credit is a massive step in the right direction. It is about to mainstream the idea of school choice in our state in a big way.**

With boundless optimism,
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9aaa0d4636&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

name: widescreenview
subject: The wonders of display manufacturing: Are you ready for new opportunities?
body:
Dear Dpwillis67,

We are a manufacturing factory of office monitors and gaming monitors located at No. 12, Qilinling Road, Tangxia, Dongguan, Guangdong, China, in Huapai Big Data Industrial Park. We mainly produce monitors with high resolution and high refresh rate ranging from 23.8 inches to 49 inches. Our factory covers an area of 3,500 square meters and has a total of 86 employees. The monthly output of the regular 23.8-inch and 27-inch monitors can reach 30,000 units. We also sell gaming monitors on domestic e-commerce platforms in China, with a monthly sales volume of all sizes ranging from 5,000 to 7,000 units. We have more than 15 regular and stable models of gaming monitors. The minimum order quantity is 50 units, and the fastest delivery time is 10 days.

If you are interested in such monitor products, please reply to this email and we can further communicate about the product details.

Best regards,
Jack Fang
Email:chonsunjack@gmail.com
Official website: [https://chuanshengtech.cn/](https://chuanshengtech.cn/)

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokll2pp2q3zbhaorqca9o4qm2425mc7qh59ao3ptd1f4myzumzmxts1mah9nn2xltl5fl94nrk16qib5rpv0hkzum6xilwwfw80267onr1fmhj1ai03i93xuuyekbpxov083l7o4hmxu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syxhia&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syxhia&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syxhia&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syxhia&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokll2pp2q3zbhaorqca9o4qm2425mc7qh59ao3ptd1f4myzumzmxts1mah9nn2xltl5fl94nrk16qib5rpv0hkzum6xilwwfw80267onr1fmhj1ai03i93xuuyekbpxov083l7o4hmxu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syxhia&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=syxhia&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

#

**FIRST —** New polling from UNH showed that **_only 14% of Maine voters have favorable views about GOP U.S. Senator Susan Collins._** Couple that with the 57% of voters who, according to the same poll, already have unfavorable views and you’ve got a recipe for a MAJOR upset.

name: Bernie vs Billionaires via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Ban Billionaire Money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

The ink is barely dry on Mamdani’s historic victory — but already, the
billionaire class and their political allies are scrambling to stop him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32192?source=email-20250705&t=1011&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]Headline: Billionaires Ackman and Musk Blast Zohran Mamdani's Primary
Win - Catsimatidis Predicts Adams Could Win

We’ve seen this story before. The establishment and their billionaire
donors did everything they could to block Bernie’s grassroots movement.
Now, they’re coming for Mamdani — and they won’t stop there.

That’s why Bernie and seven Senate allies are demanding an immediate ban
on billionaire-funded super PACs and dark money in Democratic primaries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32192?source=email-20250705&t=1012&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]Add your name now to stand with Bernie and Mamdani, and demand the
Democratic Party say NO to dirty billionaire money!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32192?source=email-20250705&t=1013&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]ADD YOUR NAME

Dark money and super PACs are the weapons of the ultra-wealthy — and
they’re being deployed right now to undermine Mamdani, protect corporate
power, and handpick candidates who won’t challenge the status quo.

The fact is Americans overwhelmingly agree: money should never equal
political power. Yet so far Democratic Party leadership has REFUSED to
sever ties with oligarchs. And that’s EXACTLY why some of them are casting
votes that advance Trump’s agenda – like the crypto-corruption GENIUS Act
– when it serves their big donors.

It’s time to end this rigged system and end the oligarchs' grip on our
democracy, starting with the Democratic Party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32192?source=email-20250705&t=1014&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]Add your name now. Tell Democratic Party leaders to follow Bernie’s
lead and ban billionaire-funded super PACs from our primaries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32192?source=email-20250705&t=1015&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32192?source=email-20250705&t=1016&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]No Oligarch Money graphic

Together, Our Revolution activists have spearheaded victories all across
the nation – from local elections to state party platforms – by boldly
demanding politicians refuse big-money donors.

Now is our moment to do it again, on a national scale, and send a crucial
message to Democratic leaders still courting the billionaire class: our
democracy is not for sale!

When we organize, we win.

The Our Revolution Team

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250705.84htVF&t=1008&akid=8966%2E5885482%2EA7n_oF ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ ]ADD YOUR NAME Dark money and super PACs are the weapons of the ultra-wealthy — and they’re being deployed right now to undermine Mamdani, protect corporate power, and handpick candidates who won’t challenge the status quo. The fact is Americans overwhelmingly agree: money should never equal political power. Yet so far Democratic Party leadership has REFUSED to sever ties with oligarchs. And that’s EXACTLY why some of them are casting votes that advance Trump’s agenda – like the crypto-corruption GENIUS Act – when it serves their big donors. It’s time to end this rigged system and end the oligarchs' grip on our democracy, starting with the Democratic Party. [ ]Add your name now. Tell Democratic Party leaders to follow Bernie’s lead and ban billionaire-funded super PACs from our primaries. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME [ ]No Oligarch Money graphic Together, Our Revolution activists have spearheaded victories all across the nation – from local elections to state party platforms – by boldly demanding politicians refuse big-money donors. Now is our moment to do it again, on a national scale, and send a crucial message to Democratic leaders still courting the billionaire class: our democracy is not for sale! When we organize, we win. The Our Revolution Team [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. It’s time to SAVE AMERICA from the Socialists!

| | | | | | | Untitled Document Patriot,

**FIRST:** Scott Brown announced his bold campaign to flip New Hampshire's Senate seat to work with fellow conservatives to Save America.

**THEN:** Within hours, the knives were out for Scott Brown. _Left-wing Democrats like Adam Schiff and Elizabeth Warren rallied behind his opponent, Comrade Chris Pappas, and they flooded his liberal warchest to stop Scott 's campaign before it gets off the ground. _

**NOW:** We need every freedom-loving conservative to step up and help Scott save our democracy from the socialist takeover!

Every dollar counts! **Democrats are out-raising Republicans in key races like ours, but Scott is determined to compete and win.** Your grassroots support will make the difference in flipping this toss-up seat.

Scott Brown refuses to play the insider games of career politicians.

_He grew up in a working-class home, was the first in his family to graduate from college, served more than 30 years in the military and retired as a Colonel, and represented America as a U.S. Senator and Ambassador. _

**Scott Brown has spent his life fighting for the values that make our country strong: Faith, family, freedom, and hard work.**

But Scott's opponent is a typical liberal who stands shoulder to shoulder with socialists who want to defund the police, ban gas stoves, and open government-run grocery stores.

Don't let the socialist agenda prevail. **Our FIRST campaign fundraising deadline is just a couple days away, and we have set a goal of raising $45,000 from grassroots donors like you.**[Can we count on you to chip in $10, $25, $5, or more to help us reach this goal?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f5bee420b69649f18b51d8f34252b2e0&_e=0_PDCq_0ORWtD8ady4EFTmf3th1lvaTcOo1vWtK_vxSmrOeiSJpce8s7koIOm9CBKMOfbMG7Cmb_pTxvNRYx1zoptVMYeF8JSv4iZRpY8H9_0a2P6D4IPUY7BlBIo46-YMzLNk06KSwLWv74hF7mzDeHTcyX2lpzJCSuanZa1EwFR4yFHXANA2eCwexEDjvwUNwXWl1Rdd-83EOOJsBYlY378kJOyZ-ZEcGlmDUMJ8L9LBAeFVJ51nnyXdOHgT78YBDEWuW90vilpG7AGuyg1r8pRByb_VsIgK9umlM0CJVTo2mTuvPrx0_7xv1AoxXS8vkexXYza08xmRSb0udsGfHAd5-cYS2QqNKCI8w0BrCcm0YcG2Zgj5zGc8Jl5j4HQxROcuTeJY8rtpkdWvIEvnADGNVphIA9sCy024y_I5VcCAl0PgG74qjq78fqmNis8lleikBcMSw0WrEdfxpObgvzeqQbuiU--3Lcqoq-Wv2Os9C96yissaIs6KFXmLRS-zaNzz-HFds9PozkGoiaTJ1Js0OtgnSheCpS482cs_dcW7hPAJdnzpJOoHteb6vV7KyPYnV-0mZfV515p87obUMFsquHvUhYoAHBBtJIkQS2br5tSQ26hwCrFy3ABn-Fxi_fsQjpUBfhpmRplv1gNvsLTwpPe26bgwYl5re7_DaCc9U89VP5sSHhVEcLMEU4Z53zn9MqmP5IRCrLH2BQsDOhia0m2ie7A4p09cZ-EB4w7U-13zh8Byc4fKGtjyIi)

Scott Brown is a proud husband, father, grandfather, and lifelong public servant.

He wore our nation's uniform for over 30 years, served as a U.S. Senator, and represented America on the world stage as President Trump's ambassador.

**Now, he 's answering the call to serve again -- running to flip New Hampshire's Senate seat RED and bring real leadership back to Washington.**

For nearly 20 years, this seat has been controlled by Democrats while Washington has grown more dysfunctional, more divided, and more out of touch with the American people.

**Scott Brown is ready to change that -- to restore accountability, defend our values, and fight for the American Dream.**

_But he can 't do it without a strong grassroots team behind him._

Scott Brown has spent his life fighting for the values that make our country strong: Faith, family, freedom, and hard work. But Scott's opponent is a typical liberal who stands shoulder to shoulder with socialists who want to defund the police, ban gas stoves, and open government-run grocery stores. | Dear Friend, I’m proud to tell you — _we did it._ The House just passed President Trump’s **One Big, Beautiful Bill** , and it’s a game-changer for our country. This isn’t some watered-down compromise. It’s a bold, America First bill that tackles the biggest problems we face — all at once. Here’s what we just got done: ✅ Secured our southern border
✅ Protected the tax cuts from the “Tax Cuts and Jobs Act”
✅ Restarted American energy production ✅ Defunded the Left’s radical agenda ✅ Restored law and order ✅ Reined in reckless spending This is the kind of leadership folks in southern Minnesota voted for and what all Americans deserve. I didn’t come to Washington to play politics. I came here to fight for our values and put _you_ first. Passing this bill was a major step forward — but make no mistake, the fight isn’t over. **If we’re going to protect this win and keep pushing forward, I need you in this fight with me.** 👉****[**Chip in today and help us defend this conservative victory.**](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d%3d) I’ll never back down from doing what’s right for Minnesota and for the United States of America. Thank you for standing with me. Brad

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/brianlenney/p/does-big-ag-own-idaho-leadership?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/33daf944-7bad-4be6-a2a9-5286a086193a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That screenshot is from [a recent NY Times piece](https://substack.com/redirect/32fe6b58-afbb-41b2-b10b-2679ef3fa12e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...
A few questions...
1. Why is Idaho's Big Ag industry shamelessly lobbying D.C. to keep exploiting cheap, slave labor?
2. What's driving their relentless push for policies that prioritize profits over people?
3. Why are Idaho's leaders (and Governor) rushing to D.C. for "meetings" and who are they meeting with? I'd like to know.
4. Who's pulling the strings behind these closed-door meetings, and what are they promising in exchange for influence?
5. Why has ZERO meaningful legislation on illegal immigration passed in Idaho this year?
6. Will 2026 will be another year of empty promises and no action?
7. Who's benefiting from this inaction?

Follow the money, it always leads to the truth.
_**It looks like people over profits.**_
In a Republican state that claims to value law and order, it's disgraceful that we're still bowing to Big Ag's demands for cheap slave labor over justice and sovereignty.

**_We want to make sure you saw this, team:_** Last night, Donald Trump signed his “Big Beautiful Bill” into law -- which includes a provision making it easier to buy dangerous gun silencers, short-barreled rifles, and shotguns.
The only people who will benefit from this are criminals and the gun industry. Meanwhile, our communities and law enforcement will be put in more danger with these devices flooding onto our streets. We must respond.

She may talk a big game about representing Coloradans, but when it’s time to vote, she consistently chooses extremism over common sense and billionaire donors over working families. Here are just a few examples: ❌ **She voted to slash Medicaid and food assistance** , even though thousands of families in Eastern Colorado rely on those programs to get by.
❌**She voted to overturn the 2020 election results** — siding with conspiracy theorists and undermining our democracy.
❌ **She voted against veterans’ benefits** , including expanded health care for those exposed to toxic burn pits.
❌ **She voted against infrastructure investments** that would help fix our roads, build rural broadband, and connect small towns to economic opportunity.
❌ **She even voted against protecting access** to contraception and the right to travel for abortion care. And let’s be honest — beyond her horrendous voting record, she’s just an all-around terrible, fake person. She quotes scripture like she lives by the teachings of Christianity, but her actions show she worships MAGA Jesus, not the real one. We’ve all seen it: getting handsy in public theaters with children nearby, chasing headlines instead of doing the work, and constantly putting herself before the people she’s supposed to represent. Boebert isn’t fighting for CO-04 (not a surprise since she’s a carpetbagger) — she’s fighting for headlines, for Trump, and for an extremist agenda that hurts the very people she claims to represent. John is running to work for our district and for you and your family. But to compete with Boebert’s national donor network and MAGA allies, we need to build real grassroots momentum — starting right now. **[Chip in to help us defeat Boebert and flip this clean_body: | | | Friend, Lauren Boebert’s record in Congress is a disgrace. She may talk a big game about representing Coloradans, but when it’s time to vote, she consistently chooses extremism over common sense and billionaire donors over working families. Here are just a few examples: ❌ She voted to slash Medicaid and food assistance , even though thousands of families in Eastern Colorado rely on those programs to get by. ❌She voted to overturn the 2020 election results — siding with conspiracy theorists and undermining our democracy. ❌ She voted against veterans’ benefits , including expanded health care for those exposed to toxic burn pits. ❌ She voted against infrastructure investments that would help fix our roads, build rural broadband, and connect small towns to economic opportunity. ❌ She even voted against protecting access to contraception and the right to travel for abortion care. And let’s be honest — beyond her horrendous voting record, she’s just an all-around terrible, fake person. She quotes scripture like she lives by the teachings of Christianity, but her actions show she worships MAGA Jesus, not the real one. We’ve all seen it: getting handsy in public theaters with children nearby, chasing headlines instead of doing the work, and constantly putting herself before the people she’s supposed to represent. Boebert isn’t fighting for CO-04 (not a surprise since she’s a carpetbagger) — she’s fighting for headlines, for Trump, and for an extremist agenda that hurts the very people she claims to represent. John is running to work for our district and for you and your family. But to compete with Boebert’s national donor network and MAGA allies, we need to build real grassroots momentum — starting right now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: If you're tired of the chaos, the division, and the votes that hurt working families, this is your moment to fight back. Thanks for being part of this movement. —Padora for Colorado John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/why-the-powerful-fear-mamdani?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In a political moment defined by cowardice, compromise, and capitulation, Zohran Kwame Mamdani is doing the unthinkable: he's standing his ground and instead still gaining momentum. And not just against Republicans, but against the billionaires, corporate media giants, and establishment Democrats who continue to sell out the working class to maintain their grip on power.
Let's be crystal clear--this is a class war. And Mamdani, a 33-year-old Brown, Muslim, immigrant is showing us how to win. But will the Democratic Party come to its senses and follow his lead? **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..k-SkI_PB5VGByXPaNsWncAKQlMXM6OGusgnBIHufA14?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167342951)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c01a0c7a-627b-49e1-b338-17418a4d21d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A Fox News chyron from known racist Watters, hilariously attempting to fear monger about Zohran Mamdani.
## The Billionaire Surrender Machine
In just the past year, the American elite have thrown hundreds of millions of dollars at Donald Trump in an attempt to avoid his wrath and protect their bottom lines:
* **ABC:** Paid Trump $15 million in a defamation settlement
* **Paramount:** Cut a $16 million check to Trump for "emotional distress"
* **Meta/Facebook:** Paid $25 million to Trump after banning him for inciting violence
* **Corporate law firms:** Coughed up $100 million in fees to stay in his good graces
* **Columbia University:** Bent the knee to Trump to preserve a $400 million pipeline--despite holding a $15 billion endowment
* **Target:** Bent the knee to Trump and gutted their DEI initiatives--despite an annual revenue exceeding $107 billion

These are the most powerful institutions in the country, with every tool imaginable at their disposal--access, capital, legal armies, media clout--and yet they're falling over themselves to appease a twice-impeached, 34-times convicted fascist. Instead of wielding their power to uphold justice, they are bankrolling the erosion of democracy.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..k-SkI_PB5VGByXPaNsWncAKQlMXM6OGusgnBIHufA14?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167342951)
## Enter Zohran Mamdani
While the billionaires cozy up to Trump, Zohran Mamdani is telling him--and everyone aligned with him--we will not be intimidated. He isn't just calling out injustice; he's refusing to bow to it.
And for that, the establishment is panicking.
* **The New York Times** told voters _not_ to rank him, then endorsed his opponent--who ran a campaign smearing Mamdani with Islamophobic lies, including the accusation that he wanted to "kill Jews." Since Mamdani's win, the Times has run repeated OpEds, articles, and hit pieces demonizing and dehumanizing Mamdani. Just this week the NY Times ran yet another hit piece, citing an anonymous "race scientist" to criticize Mamdani for identifying himself as Asian _and_ African American on his college applications. Mamdani is literally of South Asian ethnicity and born in Uganda, which last I checked is in Africa. The NY Times did not find it newsworthy that the man they endorsed (Tilson) published a dangerous and false attack on Mamdani in 2025, but apparenetly a 17-year-old kid's college application from 2009 _is_ newsworthy.
* **The Washington Post** editorial board condemned his _victory_ , not his platform, warning that his rise is a threat. They did not do this for Donald Trump, is demonstrably an existential threat to global peace--but they have to Mamdani.
* **The Financial Times** criticized him for having the audacity to say that _billionaires shouldn 't exist_. Never mind that we are currently in the worst period of wealth and income inequality in modern American history, and the Big Ugly Bill will further exacerbate that--but apparently Mamdani calling that out is a threat.
* **Senator Kirsten Gillibrand** falsely accused him of promoting "global jihad."
* **Republican officials** are already calling for his citizenship to be stripped and for him to be deported.
* **Democratic leaders** like Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries? Nowhere to be found. They refuse to endorse him. Instead, New York Congressman Tom Souzzi went a step further and wrote an absurd OpEd in the Wall Street Journal _condemning_ Mamdani.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2a322632-f3fe-40c5-93da-887dc1743961?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You would think that a party with an approval rating gasping for air at 26%, in which nearly 70% want new party leadership, in which you've lost two of the last three Presidential elections and currently do not control _any_ branch of government, would show a bit of humility--especially to a guy who is getting the job done.
But you'd be wrong. Establishment Democrats are doubling down in their arrogance and utter stupidity, refusing to read the room.
All of this for what? For proposing to _raise taxes by 2% on millionaires_ , to _freeze rent_ , to _provide universal childcare_ , and to _make public transportation free_. For refusing corporate money. For choosing people over profit. For being unbought and unbossed. On this platform, Mamdani won a landslide victory over Cuomo, inspiring record turnout.
This is why Zohran Mamdani scares them. He threatens not just a political party, but the entire political class that has fed off of working people's pain for decades. He is the first ripple of a tidal wave they know is coming.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..k-SkI_PB5VGByXPaNsWncAKQlMXM6OGusgnBIHufA14?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167342951)
## The Choice Before Us
Regardless of your political affiliation--this isn't about left versus right. This is about top versus bottom. This is about whether we want a nation ruled by oligarchs and billionaires, or one that truly reflects the will of _We the People_.
You don't have to agree with Mamdani on everything. But if you believe billionaires shouldn't be dictating who gets healthcare and who goes hungry, then you should stand with him.
If you believe that a free press should hold power accountable--not endorse smears and lies--you should stand with him.
If you believe that a Muslim immigrant who wins an election by listening to his constituents deserves praise, not persecution--you should stand with him.
Because the war against Mamdani isn't just an attack on one man. It's a warning shot to every working-class person who dares to fight back. It's a message from the top: _Don 't you dare believe you can win._
Let's prove them wrong.
Stand with Mamdani. Share his story. Reject fascism--whether it's wearing a red tie or a blue one. And let the billionaires know: we are coming for our future back.
And this time, they can't buy their way out of it.

body:
Our vision remains worth fighting for – and in the face of the GOP budget becoming a reality, our vision is necessary.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110927660/555701441/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhhZDg2OC1iMTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8G6df2SEBquxYPNi0aiVBdLMtFS5M8_jpO_xjRaeWM=&emci=014a3bcc-1758-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bf8ad868-b159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Trump officially signed the Republicans' cruel, harmful budget bill into law yesterday, and his billionaire political donors just got exactly what they paid for in the form of trillions in new tax breaks. 17 million Americans will lose their health care. Kids will go hungry. Women will lose reproductive care. Utility bills will skyrocket. The U.S. will fall behind China in the energy race. **This is a terrible moment for America, and undoing the damage that Republicans have wrought will not be easy.** But we cannot give up. The basic ability for people to live healthy lives _is worth fighting for._ A clean energy economy _is worth fighting for_. A system in which working people are lifted up while billionaires pay their dues _is worth fighting for._ So we press on. We have the power to make 2026 a referendum on the GOP's destructive agenda. Taking back Congress is the _essential_ first step in reversing the devastating cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, wind and solar power, and so much more. I'll be lending every ounce of my efforts toward lifting up strong Democratic fighters, exposing the effects of Republican policies, and driving the narrative for the vision we want to see made a reality. I have never been more grateful to have supporters like you in the fight with me. You are what makes our movement powerful — and you'll be what makes it victorious in the end. Onward, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: Our vision remains worth fighting for – and in the face of the GOP budget becoming a reality, our vision is necessary. | | | | Trump officially signed the Republicans' cruel, harmful budget bill into law yesterday, and his billionaire political donors just got exactly what they paid for in the form of trillions in new tax breaks. 17 million Americans will lose their health care. Kids will go hungry. Women will lose reproductive care. Utility bills will skyrocket. The U.S. will fall behind China in the energy race. This is a terrible moment for America, and undoing the damage that Republicans have wrought will not be easy. But we cannot give up. The basic ability for people to live healthy lives is worth fighting for. A clean energy economy is worth fighting for. A system in which working people are lifted up while billionaires pay their dues is worth fighting for. So we press on. We have the power to make 2026 a referendum on the GOP's destructive agenda. Taking back Congress is the essential first step in reversing the devastating cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, wind and solar power, and so much more. I'll be lending every ounce of my efforts toward lifting up strong Democratic fighters, exposing the effects of Republican policies, and driving the narrative for the vision we want to see made a reality. I have never been more grateful to have supporters like you in the fight with me. You are what makes our movement powerful — and you'll be what makes it victorious in the end. **TO: Gov. Gavin Newsom
FROM: A loyal Democrat
RE: Democrats stand with you ** Dear Governor Newsom,

**Thank you SO much for standing up for our democracy by suing the Trump Administration!**

Trump is clearly threatened by how you exposed him to his unconstitutional and authoritarian actions.

**His threat to jail you is not only baseless, it’s a power-grab and another attempt to launch us into a MAGA dictatorship.**

This marks a terrifying point in our nation’s history. That’s why I’m so grateful to have leaders like you who won’t back down in the face of these anti-democratic threats.

[So I’m signing this letter to stand with you and chipping in $7 to Democracy On the Line so we can elect more Democrats, break the Republican trifecta, and join you in the fight against Trump and rising authoritarianism »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110928860/555702499/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250705_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNWU4NzE5LWIyNTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyR5xROQ92tXK1oLOpgD-Sp2KWmxGo0lgpIiEvGLPwc=) | **[SIGN THE “THANK YOU GAVIN NEWSOM” LETTER NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110928861/555702500/1158394903?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250705_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNWU4NzE5LWIyNTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyR5xROQ92tXK1oLOpgD-Sp2KWmxGo0lgpIiEvGLPwc=)**

Trump is clearly threatened by how you exposed him to his unconstitutional and authoritarian actions. His threat to jail you is not only baseless, it’s a power-grab and another attempt to launch us into a MAGA dictatorship. This marks a terrifying point in our nation’s history. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4fcff768-e2b0-4bd5-93cc-f1eb9bda0503?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last night long after the state-sanctioned fireworks had ended, I walked into my back alley and noticed the air was still thick with sulfuric smoke. The constant sound of fireworks echoed off the brick of the townhouses and the tin of the garage doors. I breathed in the hot, swampy haze and came to a realization: after 17 years in Washington, DC this was the most abundant display of celebration that this city had seen.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vE8_X2teTOzG0YvvFalGc7slDB6xfh3IHQxxytyMlTk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167582825)
For a moment, I felt like I was standing next to Francis Scott Key after he emerged from the bowels of a prison ship and watched the bombs bursting above the earthen and stone ramparts of Fort McHenry at the Battle of Baltimore back in 1814. The rockets red glare tinged the night air and I must admit, among the sweat beading on my brow I felt the fresh salt of a tear. _Americana, baby!_ I thought.
I had spent the afternoon on the White House grounds ahead of Trump's signing of the historic BBB, or Big, Beautiful Bill. Somehow, through sheer force of will, The President had managed to bend the entire legislative body to his agenda and was prepared to signed the nearly 1,000 page piece of legislation ahead of the deadline of July Fourth.
I am just a pigeon compared to the loftier and more reputable reporters who were invited to join Trump in the Oval as he inked his signature to sign the BBB into law. But the mere fact that the White House had granted me entry was indicative of the broadened access that the Trump Administration has afforded an offbeat independent like me. I received my White House press pass under the employ of former Force Recon Marine **[Chad Robichaux](https://substack.com/redirect/3d6cafbc-cda1-42ae-b55e-f25e9508715c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , who served eight tours in Afghanistan and is the host of the **[Resilient Show](https://substack.com/redirect/f7f6b405-c6e6-4ce1-9127-4f5338b9f422?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. I am not asking questions on behalf of a political party or a big corporate media entity, I am there on behalf of veterans like Chad, who fought and bled for our country and deserve a voice among the press corps.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**Sponsored by AMAC**
# **[Tired of AARP? There's a Better Option - And It's FREE](https://substack.com/redirect/4d599f9d-692d-4742-ac33-ec46071f87ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d599f9d-692d-4742-ac33-ec46071f87ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you're 50 or older and looking for a conservative alternative to AARP, now's the perfect time to make the switch.
AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a **FREE membership** for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached.
With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including:
* **Money-saving discounts** on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials
* The **AMAC Magazine** , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective
* Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more!
* A chance to get involved through **AMAC Action** , their grassroots advocacy network

Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started.
👉 **Join the movement today and claim your free membership here:**
[ Claim My Free Membership](https://substack.com/redirect/4d599f9d-692d-4742-ac33-ec46071f87ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans.
* * *
**(Piece continued)**
Rather than enjoying the air conditioning of the White House Briefing Room, when the press pool lined up to enter the West Wing I chose to head beyond the grounds and join the anti-Trump protesters and the Trump supporters stationed outside the northern facade of the Presidential Estate.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ca81bbbf-839b-4fe5-8f2c-32018a1be941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While wading through dueling chants of "Shame! Shame!" and "U-S-A! U-S-A!" I was perspiring through my navy blue suit and the red Hawaiian shirt I had chosen for the patriotic event. Nothing is more American than dueling protesters and supporters sharing the same street in front of the People's House. Meanwhile, on the other side of the grounds, thousands of active duty troops and veterans enjoyed a picnic on the South Lawn.
A few minutes after 5:00 PM EST, I prepared my GoPro for slow motion footage as I heard the thunderous roar of America's military might. The pixelated profile of a B-2 Bomber flanked by two F-35's approached from the North. The whole mass of contrasting political persuasions turned their eyes to the sky as the planes emerged above the statue of America's first populist, Andrew Jackson and his rearing horse.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a86c762d-3518-4495-a0d7-da66cf14ab93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The boom of the jet engines drowned out the screams of glee and gloom as they passed overhead. I panned the camera from the cheers and the jeers to the massive flag that construction crews had erected a few weeks ago at the orders of President Trump. The second B-2 flanked by F-22 fighter jets zoomed towards the great phallus of the Washington Monument and the doppler effect drained the sound of propulsion from my ears. The clashing chants returned and the flag before the White House was not just still there, it was bigger and better than it had ever been in the 249-year history of this glorious United States.
I am not a fan of the military industrial complex, but I am a fan of the visceral experience when big, badass planes fly overhead. I do not agree with everything in that Big Beautiful Bill, so cleverly named by our Marketer-in Chief. But my opinion is insignificant compared to the hundreds of millions of Americans who call this country home. They voted for the popularly elected President and, like it or not, one cannot deny that yesterday proved that Trump is doing everything he can to implement what was promised during his third campaign in 2024.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vE8_X2teTOzG0YvvFalGc7slDB6xfh3IHQxxytyMlTk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167582825)
One also cannot deny that July 4th, 2025 will be written about in the history books because the sheer scope of this legislation will alter the future of our country forevermore. In what other country can people who disagree so vociferously share a public space? In what other country do people flock from all corners of the globe to enjoy a small piece of the boundless opportunities afforded by the 50 United States? The answer, of course, is no other country but the U-S of A.
In the wake of this momentous moment in our collective history, let's remember that America is a place that values not only individual opportunity, but also collective compromise. I relay this experience not to promote the current administration or to tear Trump down, but to demonstrate that in spite of all the rhetoric and vitriol and doomerism, the Star Spangled Banner yet waves. From the demonstrators who braved the blaring sun of DC summer to have their voices heard in Lafayette Park, to the night owls who chose to signal their patriotism by blasting fireworks that may or may not have been entirely legal in DC: This is the land of the free, the home not just of the brave, but of whomever is fortunate enough to be a citizen of the greatest country ever devised by mankind.

AMAC - the Association of Mature American Citizens - is America's fastest-growing senior organization, and right now, they're offering a FREE membership for a limited time. That's right - no credit card, no strings attached. With AMAC, you'll be part of a community that shares your values: faith, family, and freedom. Members enjoy access to exclusive benefits, including: Money-saving discounts on travel, insurance, and everyday essentials The AMAC Magazine , packed with news and insights from a conservative perspective Updates on the issues that matter most to you - like Social Security, Medicare, Border Security, and more! A chance to get involved through AMAC Action , their grassroots advocacy network Whether you're looking to save money, stay informed, or make a difference, AMAC is here for you - and now it won't cost you a dime to get started. 👉 Join the movement today and claim your free membership here: No pressure. No politics you don't agree with. Just real benefits for real Americans. (Piece continued) Rather than enjoying the air conditioning of the White House Briefing Room, when the press pool lined up to enter the West Wing I chose to head beyond the grounds and join the anti-Trump protesters and the Trump supporters stationed outside the northern facade of the Presidential Estate. While wading through dueling chants of "Shame! Shame!" and "U-S-A! U-S-A!" I was perspiring through my navy blue suit and the red Hawaiian shirt I had chosen for the patriotic event. Nothing is more American than dueling protesters and supporters sharing the same street in front of the People's House. Meanwhile, on the other side of the grounds, thousands of active duty troops and veterans enjoyed a picnic on the South Lawn. A few minutes after 5:00 PM EST, I prepared my GoPro for slow motion footage as I heard the thunderous roar of America's military might. The pixelated profile of a B-2 Bomber flanked by two F-35's approached from the North. The whole mass of contrasting political persuasions turned their eyes to the sky as the planes emerged above the statue of America's first populist, Andrew Jackson and his rearing horse. The boom of the jet engines drowned out the screams of glee and gloom as they passed overhead. I panned the camera from the cheers and the jeers to the massive flag that construction crews had erected a few weeks ago at the orders of President Trump. The second B-2 flanked by F-22 fighter jets zoomed towards the great phallus of the Washington Monument and the doppler effect drained the sound of propulsion from my ears. The clashing chants returned and the flag before the White House was not just still there, it was bigger and better than it had ever been in the 249-year history of this glorious United States. I am not a fan of the military industrial complex, but I am a fan of the visceral experience when big, badass planes fly overhead. I do not agree with everything in that Big Beautiful Bill, so cleverly named by our Marketer-in Chief. But my opinion is insignificant compared to the hundreds of millions of Americans who call this country home. They voted for the popularly elected President and, like it or not, one cannot deny that yesterday proved that Trump is doing everything he can to implement what was promised during his third campaign in 2024. One also cannot deny that July 4th, 2025 will be written about in the history books because the sheer scope of this legislation will alter the future of our country forevermore. In what other country can people who disagree so vociferously share a public space? In what other country do people flock from all corners of the globe to enjoy a small piece of the boundless opportunities afforded by the 50 United States? The answer, of course, is no other country but the U-S of A. In the wake of this momentous moment in our collective history, let's remember that America is a place that values not only individual opportunity, but also collective compromise. I relay this experience not to promote the current administration or to tear Trump down, but to demonstrate that in spite of all the rhetoric and vitriol and doomerism, the Star Spangled Banner yet waves. From the demonstrators who braved the blaring sun of DC summer to have their voices heard in Lafayette Park, to the night owls who chose to signal their patriotism by blasting fireworks that may or may not have been entirely legal in DC: This is the land of the free, the home not just of the brave, but of whomever is fortunate enough to be a citizen of the greatest country ever devised by mankind. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with 14 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join my focus group…?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21861?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250705-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q3-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=20666_9716520_qRu7Si&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q3?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=20666_9716520_qRu7Si&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=20666%2E9716520%2EqRu7Si)** to unsubscribe.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I'm running to be the next U.S. Senator from Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is too important not to try again.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo)
Peter, allow me to reintroduce myself: My name is Colin Allred.
I'm a fourth-generation Texan, former NFL player, civil rights lawyer, Dad, and former Dallas Congressman. As of today, I am officially running to be Texas' next U.S. Senator.
**[If that's all you need to hear, please split a donation right now between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me raise $1 million in the first few days of my campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo)**
Peter, **I am running** to finish what we started two years ago – a historic grassroots movement that came within striking distance of flipping Texas.
**I am running** because Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have failed Texans and the American people with their extreme partisanship, broken promises, and policies that prioritize massive tax cuts for the wealthy at the expense of working people.
**I am running** because the GOP frontrunner – Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton – has spent years trying to throw women’s doctors in jail for providing abortion care and is so corrupt the Texas House even voted to impeach him.
And finally, **I am running because I know we can win.** In fact, the Republicans’ own polling shows me in the lead!
**But I also know that winning will take an unprecedented groundswell of grassroots support – starting now with our $1 million launch goal.**
With those resources, we can build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach voters in every corner of our state, hire staff and train volunteers, and fight back against the millions of dollars Republicans will spend to defeat me.
**[That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can spare today to me and Heartland Patriots to help me kick off this Senate campaign. Please, will you rush your support now to help us get off to the strong start we need to bring real leadership back to Texas?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo)**
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and Heartland Patriots will go through immediately:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250705-9087&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9087%2E614464%2EAAeXVo)

Thank you so much for any help you can send during this critical moment for our campaign. We have a long, tough road ahead, but together, I truly believe we can win and create a better Texas for everyone.
Let's go!
Colin Allred

With those resources, we can build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach voters in every corner of our state, hire staff and train volunteers, and fight back against the millions of dollars Republicans will spend to defeat me. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and Heartland Patriots will go through immediately: Thank you so much for any help you can send during this critical moment for our campaign. We have a long, tough road ahead, but together, I truly believe we can win and create a better Texas for everyone. Let's go! Colin Allred | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Black lung is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
As a cancer survivor, this is personal to me.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110939452/555708367/1328794144?refcode=ea.52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyOTk5YzQ5LWI2NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8bnKDmWdQL6gnKFEd-GQb-kDODIa8246rzEPxyinXCg=&emci=a4cdba3f-8e57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Donald Trump promised his supporters that reviving the coal industry would bring them prosperity. Instead, _he's sentencing miners to death for profit._ Black lung disease is making a deadly comeback in America’s coal mines. Modern miners are getting diagnosed in their 40s instead of their 60s, at rates we haven't seen in 50 years. **One in ten working miners nationwide is now estimated to have black lung.** It’s easy to point the finger and say this is “what coal country voted for.” But the truth is, Donald Trump made big promises to voters, and now, we’re watching him fail the very communities that put their trust in him. Did you know his administration slashed hundreds of jobs at the National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health — the agency where scientists and researchers are working to end black lung? As a cancer survivor, this is personal to me. I had access to incredible doctors and effective treatments made possible by decades of medical research. I don’t take that for granted. Not for a second. But Trump is attacking the very science that saves lives. So this isn’t just about coal country. This is about _all_ of us. Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change, releasing more carbon dioxide than any other fossil fuel. It puts entire communities at risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer. And Trump’s coal revival is accelerating a public health crisis that touches every corner of this country. **Just look at what he’s done in the past few months alone:**
* Trump **hijacked emergency powers** to force dirty coal plants to stay open even when they were scheduled to shut down.
* He’s **gutted clean air** rules that protect communities from mercury, arsenic, and other deadly chemicals.
* He’s **fast-tracked coal mining on public lands** while cutting environmental protections.
* He’s **attacked states like California and New Mexico** for trying to transition to clean energy.
* And he’s just tucked a **massive tax break to coal companies** into his so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.”

**[This is Donald Trump’s America: sacrifice workers and poison communities so fossil fuel billionaires can get richer. But we refuse to back down. My team is gathering signatures from our most active supporters in PA and around the country to prove that Trump’s toxic coal agenda is overwhelmingly unpopular. Will you sign the petition to demand Congress step up and stop Trump’s toxic coal agenda?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110939453/555708368/-1420927205?refcode=ea.52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyOTk5YzQ5LWI2NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8bnKDmWdQL6gnKFEd-GQb-kDODIa8246rzEPxyinXCg=&emci=a4cdba3f-8e57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**REJECT TRUMP’S COAL AGENDA →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110939454/555708369/-1420927205?refcode=ea.52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyOTk5YzQ5LWI2NTktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8bnKDmWdQL6gnKFEd-GQb-kDODIa8246rzEPxyinXCg=&emci=a4cdba3f-8e57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=52999c49-b659-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 We might not be able to go on for too much longer

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Trump wants to deny kids born in America citizenship
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250705-1414-foote&t=1001&akid=1414%2E342411%2EnGklkI ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Since returning to office, Trump has renewed his efforts to end birthright
citizenship through executive orders — despite the Constitution clearly
stating anyone born in the United States of America is a citizen.

Lower courts blocked him, but now he has a powerful new advantage: the
Supreme Court issued a ruling severely restricting nationwide injunctions,
a critical tool judges use to stop unconstitutional actions.

This means the door is wide open for Trump to deny or rip citizenship from
kids born on U.S. soil — especially from immigrant families.

The Squad is organizing tirelessly in Congress to protect immigrant
communities. When Trump handed $150 billion to ICE, the Squad stood tall
and united in opposition. And when Trump comes for our Constitutional
rights, they will do the same.

But, Peter, the
Squad can’t do it alone. Trump’s hateful agenda is backed by powerful
interests in Congress and the ultra-wealthy. But the Squad’s movement for
justice has something even more powerful: you.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250705-movement.GC1ZLo&refcode=em20250705-1414&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1414%2E342411%2EnGklkI ]Can you donate $3 to the Squad Victory Fund today to
make sure they have the resources to stay in Congress fighting Trump’s
racist agenda?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250705-movement.GC1ZLo&refcode=em20250705-1414&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1414%2E342411%2EnGklkI ]Contribute ››

This grassroots team got Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida to
Congress to fight for progressive change. Now, they need you to step up
again to power their fight against this new era of Trump.

Thank you for being in this fight,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1414%2E342411%2EnGklkI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
