name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: Deputy charged with first-degree murder after being cleared
body:
| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you.
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1zKJbKclBf2aoS0qk3JjxMVynaLmFGaO6ict9e3HL2hA-GBlSDkPpP3hSiwnGhmXGspZHiKwIVaxzRGspsAbOFPcQbD5nyMRq7oDcQ2Q1JuEDlXrWNS6iyMhIHn34NQ6s1ssozP_FQhm9WMbdDSFrDaK0mcxEIOIIi-_v7UbTIPVq9IIaFkoNQfUNkqxvX1VQC7zEw9Hqy-dKO6mJSlpHMX97YjmyzaqwBFh4ZNPnlDnwCdrxzkmsr54i7fQj3T3sIJBk_52WiD1jGrLixjR93PzP76Jq24QowTNP3LjmDHfLi9HVKfMVrCbpPb0Vo1d1YFK2cpZI-DbvAnwCTEXLrAFFo4CeaYxT0OKnkSerP4mmut1ZfZbm-hYRO4v5RhGTsBOSJZ7z6iFpeuRpxZ_o38Hbvu4U4T1020mxm5U38bCJpz1NODNaQnglY9DNeqSu-)
---
This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. **[And he might succeed if no one can help us.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1zBwCno-qdbgDA8AGGhgm2iwtXVw5C8bZYqt92gQqQ5D_kNq8IBBFH9o9y2m5iFM_daNtycD7kWtcZrilMVX5JeHbdZ8raqw0vTpNQc0ne29N1RYeTFSOrDMHo38SfoUxtqrBy31ct180oEwp7u1O_fq-JxCmW4lac4JWR1S9Sg0lKEujPFWanbpLiGcDQIQiJIPyTC3wzcISjynOdWeZddxZizqJLqojJv_blZ4RbSm9eI41-VEqhSwSZznlhlo-JYufBcqZPCP85mI_TpCBlP6LNuVie0rUV_ihjwQ8ZzK2E67rjpDVzbe2fnPWeXK5UN7WbUPXwUef67_OzCHUR5xMX_s9ccZGsVapANR5eZBqplm_eTl-uWOFcfKG0Q1Ji4DsGuRo3uLnMMitvBnf0dhT0HaoQhYRYrXkI5imzA4BfAYZ-gljHBLNs_7nlzKjB)** I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly **TWO YEARS** after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (**LELDF**). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: **[Will you help Chance, too?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1zxMqBL1UZMDfFsKwWUZ6VcwmExSnnrHomPSeHP4yJ-J4ovV1mAaXDg_6LW-KPwfWrdhaQyiQDjscVBZY_zAEyN3G2-tIIDGHfKlnOXkSJFWdQNyQRTdpu8GMbRqa4q0lsTevWMbXRbX6QrX0mJScn9RBPjUsYeHAZHZ4k6yBZqOIFBaz4dP4vnCvJGQ4yI1fbenrAm7BVKDKD6Z5P2h-WUeVxwuQfB8m1ZpREq8HD_19YorSOKoh8t5-pJ6lNE6YkgqdDmLwqb-DsTJ56AfWb0eVcsydpQv--QbMdhLX87wgZT1JD2RgPEtJrdWf5cBWfoVb5QkQ-Yr5BYEf0bul9zFY3PxXOuodGlJf5NFg016-jiFRfl1Y0RN9_xMwCfOOuRSftAzVDQAP-c2oPJ0EfKZgkX0NFwCQhvFjzGkNJjZLTqssAuCP3x7HliPaql7nz)** Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. **[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution – be it $35, $100, $500, or even $1,000 – is tax-deductible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1zuAfwoa-Ud8Xx3G1DdWu7W9-uSn2BV0aEJCdwinotdC6ZjrmwgvauYeLm87CnNY1HRp0ugOXkT14INHW0CSy1jC7Fwp5G8YzMPDJm8qnVD6nwtWVBCF_bDolqF3cFtg367XcxPVND17CjiZfZnXDac-Orpm4ltvhn-08GBHZarkg62oddYqEC2Y1019LQj2BEMOElDwMOfw21v7NDxr-fYl8UJ7s4NK6bmdO6bMeKDY-sEYVSzZvVH-FP-wSbgE9KXxPf6oaiaLp6IUWW6z8vmIivU3jDhGPB-e8JENoJxJk0ZtIdnz27IKfab2ObxO1c4zrdRWmcDSRJIkPK91MJCpWJD6FT6lc6ZWrVOHZPVulNQk-ULGI7D_lZnCAZfbvHuHMi66bhfZaNru5gM85T_mM0vVEIt9DNCLfCNROFwLubFCyJ7YW50j0SVc7jwoMr)** But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. [**So please, my friend, rush back your gift in the next 24 hours if possible.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1zL1Xd5-BLnL7u65uQtvUUVrd-eocXkewEJxKsOgqZ5jqrKN5nWyk6TSXtKg6G0Q-DhAzwe97_MBkXE8rwdToLJL_mJEsxiPLODOE2zs0snc13g6bU8taQ6pFI4KB43DzbsqPjzjTr344pvOcYmS13pBBCLy6B2b62H9Qk86OotKIuH57hG5ffJwfOmHhI_L0MNSECqDCcdrP6Yt3b_luvGKQVH32wQ2F1Q7JzWrwQt1NoEDlyVNGgHug5uEv8NJV8DAOkf0ceA-uVsCeze86y4U1OwKF1-QDVAM--hjaSHPKyZBc-TiTS78iZhvY4vi2i9ZdxM0ZHN5E0bb6b2CJWEBknA7GfUvFxWATHCQ4LIjbxYQ0po-EZfRQGDjTQaFx8M88BLnHavFYKg1qSAgc-5gUEwGZiTINOPJx_VVGkZOsLHq3tMxcIGr7r7KJfka8P) With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, [**your gift of $35**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1z_wVy6UdawgGWDofdrQrNOTsMUxZnLiQw9gBpk9uOORA66z0VhWuUG5nMRVxXfwL5m4XhGe9Y_GwMY6CPIi7URc6SD1mJPItXmZPA_cPNmMSd_mElNvzHmBkpfwISjY-pyKSULF3_V8z5lfoK0-xoONORXVwjADZuZNwhwV4ioWrqP-Ccgi5nm3F8sQxcObPQG14HHIOtuoOdDdjHilkxF1Pepna2x_Q3Mm8jsYzd-NATglcxqgfMypLmzSwV3IeDq6psBsdi1SBP2jme7vTub2VbHT4xpkQkoy3X3k-OS6JwDxCkkdFzUO8IDsP-1Y_SSpBVnT1ydQmr9Y46M6SWRQN7HV9wRzlowflT_sgLgC7MZ2RJUXEg1q2f2d2a5WCIOh7ilEjjFlEiokuWZvcGxxEjy0OeOS_6jagFtykrkxuUmNvRHJKCUmth85Y3-K3b) – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b60821dad0804fff8bfd5d5b49a6f003&_e=KcpeHK83r3saP6BJ_X60s86zOEdvxwa4AyUGW2jh4f9Nt7_ukJ6nJ6OA2GGVDSptwMqmR5vieQTVt0oA4RhyCKqjaJwqkLj9qbv-2gJpKo8cGMRBI4mofY79PZOvVbNQUukOTMyCe9ekVNljx_IkEKVij1irUWUO5TYDRwZjKPN756Rz4liUft766SFGx0xBsbA4nfi8hOxjwIxAxjkEps69q8vmxLH2m5ofzwB-ZL8BkoGd4y99xn4D8BFebP1zB7eswcbMwa8Ef6jSqJ68NFzZy7E7yIIGioRw93VeqzCmukMbyPPFpGXfzHbJDOasF_UT4ohCehXIBRXClZNdB7CPLLxroy78DajhEhJjP3-1ecaDEtY6vUHguUEt6iUSiJqvSub-q01I65bHtc_kwo2UmlZt0FOhVpU9dJ1LIzqLJoXMj1cLOWnRV5P49b2GHjZoVXhdCOdfaqQTpd37O0xpbDgz4ZJ51fpf4H_fVXBFSZw5IqS8T6btJcpiRoi2A10_t8IbhxbKkWFqWzcllAvU6kamhiqIkU1VvGBbCh5aSU1gEP_LeXEZhFBDdrHkPZvW3GwO75gTU8Kyiqi49jmBJGyNs_FWNnHGrWpmBXe2pTRV6X2Atp2NNrAf_tHBNjPjtoeozhn4yKw3dDrPTrTVcTUgG3z4j5cAZLzK92_0lTrt7ZdnCI-DsR-ty7f4)**_

clean_body: | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job. | | Dear Peter , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you. - This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly TWO YEARS after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

The next generation is choosing America — and with your help, we will make sure they never look back. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: David Hogg
subject: This will help me sleep tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I take this job pretty seriously, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250705-1&t=1&akid=2336%2E587540%2EqFDyDu)
Peter,
I take this job pretty seriously.
I spend a lot of time thinking about how to help every single one of the candidates we endorse win their elections. And you want to know one thing that helps me sleep at night?
It’s knowing that, since our launch in 2023, **almost 14,000 of our grassroots supporters** have signed up to make monthly recurring donations to Leaders We Deserve.
**[These donations are crucial to sustaining a movement like ours, so today I wanted to reach out and ask if you would set up a monthly recurring donation too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_lwd_20250705_1_recurringask?refcode=em20250705-2336&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2336_587540_qFDyDu&akid=2336%2E587540%2EqFDyDu)**
_Use the links in this email to start a recurring donation to Leaders We Deserve._
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_lwd_20250705_1_recurringask?amount=5&refcode=em20250705-2336&recurring=1&refcode2=2336_587540_qFDyDu&akid=2336%2E587540%2EqFDyDu)**
Here’s why these recurring donations are so helpful:
* They allow us to set a baseline for what we bring in each month, so we can budget that money toward our most pressing priorities.
* They help us get to work well before Election Day. A month before the election is too late to hire and train organizers, buy TV ads, and compete with more established, well-financed campaigns.
* They help create a snowball effect for our candidates. A lot of donors and organizations look at how much early money candidates raise to inform whether they should get involved, and recurring donations let us back young, progressive candidates early on to show their credibility.

**[So if you’re ready to elect more of the Leaders We Deserve, please sign up to make a monthly recurring donation of any amount that works for you today. It will help more than you know!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_lwd_20250705_1_recurringask?refcode=em20250705-2336&amount=5&recurring=1&refcode2=2336_587540_qFDyDu&akid=2336%2E587540%2EqFDyDu)**
Thanks again for all your support,
David Hogg
P.S. Can’t commit to a monthly donation today? Not a problem. **[If you can make a one-time contribution of $5 or any amount at all, you’ll make a big difference in helping us reach our goals and elect the next generation of leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_lwd_20250705_1_recurringask?refcode=em20250705-2336&amount=5&refcode2=2336_587540_qFDyDu&akid=2336%2E587540%2EqFDyDu)**

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: We need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We’re hoping at least 2,500 supporters like you will sign on to endorse Deb before midnight.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3042%2E400544%2EZC8xjv)
Now that Trump’s Big Ugly Bill has passed, gutting programs New Mexicans rely on to give tax breaks to billionaires, it’s more clear than ever that we need a governor who will fight fiercely for a future where _everyone_ can succeed.
**Deb Haaland will be that leader — but with Republicans vying to flip the state red, she needs your help to win this race first!**
**[Endorse Deb »](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_ms_DH_20250705_endorse/?source=em20250705-3042&akid=3042%2E400544%2EZC8xjv)**
With so many challenges facing our state, New Mexico needs strong leadership in the governor’s office. **Deb is ready to fight for all New Mexicans** and challenge the status quo — and the Trump administration — to make the system work better for _everyone_.
In order to show the strength of our grassroots movement, we’re hoping at least 2,500 supporters like you will sign on to endorse Deb before midnight.
[**Will you add your name now to endorse Deb as the next Governor of New Mexico?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/em_ms_DH_20250705_endorse/?source=em20250705-3042&akid=3042%2E400544%2EZC8xjv)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: 6 months as the Congresswoman from Oregon's 5th District
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110945869/555721417/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJhYTc1Y2YtYmU1OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VQEHysS1ZWFmca2YByonyPtES9GgSspOm0s7qcN_E8=) Friend, **This week officially marked six months since I was sworn in as the Congresswoman from Oregon's 5th District — and I want to thank you so much for your continued support.** I ran for Congress to give a voice to Oregonians, help people get ahead, and build a better future for our children. Now, I’m working everyday to deliver on those promises for our community. I’m proud of the work I’ve accomplished so far — fighting to lower costs, working to protect Medicaid, and passing three bipartisan bills in the House to support small businesses. But there’s still a long road ahead if we’re going to continue delivering results for Oregonians. With Republicans in control of the House, we’ve seen them spend the last six months voting to take away critical benefits and make life harder and more expensive for Americans. **But I won’t let them stand in the way of progress.** I’m working every day to fight for every possible win for Oregonians and ensuring their voices are being heard — and I need you standing with me. **[Please, if you want to build a better future for the next generation and deliver real results for our community, will you chip in now to support my re-election campaign and ensure Oregonians have a representative that always shows up for them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110945870/555721420/-629675555?refcode=email_070525_sixmonths&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJhYTc1Y2YtYmU1OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VQEHysS1ZWFmca2YByonyPtES9GgSspOm0s7qcN_E8=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110945871/555721422/-629675555?refcode=email_070525_sixmonths&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJhYTc1Y2YtYmU1OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-VQEHysS1ZWFmca2YByonyPtES9GgSspOm0s7qcN_E8=)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: I’m a little unsure about opening up to you this way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.
I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda!

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cc782598efd74c59bcd7aa602cc5e21e&_e=sezvnN-FH2f3Ui6yhi2-4o6li4Z_36qlC1O0Vhus6Y3zMsHjBuIPgP-ZXccihMJTxK1R7XvAEW3MnAFExfIFxddI6TKSiQVkKXeQXfLTzcaTyfu5XuRNbUzNNfT30yGBEDFT7FKiSH4MhQW6EHSX9ls0l-2bNGvDn28vscuO1ZX6tWmRWajISso2uixytI48PZPl3Q222q80FJX-_LSyujPEDo6dnBlU7JjohR5-Gb40TNN3A7QG0lnJroZReabPnsNIRl5Upj9V-yrQo-KHiwNHDg7Y-gkm98WhDjVkPtepof352Z_VoXhHR487Q4kLyG7N4NvB_IWK9kuT7YHXPOvOYWxFdsiVkrTIbZl3egti45TrzN2j7RIlcAwI8nyIx2ew68ZP41HR2K5A1h6qnH8-NShpej91_qkE1Usy8EApfIvLvX_k72t8H2SPV_pqRDyNI3hfdqUOamPpQUspyUkATS3TlsJZvAiiYKLiY99WTrrdEV7L0TiqrZlRK_rFyfkqofE-aoZpUqDspwCwEHaN5f87dcQLMrXlikbtSYtf821T1y7P0V9cWuVAVDIso0GPvuT7yfwg0-f5qCb29A%3D%3D)
---

Patriot,

I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything.**

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cc782598efd74c59bcd7aa602cc5e21e&_e=sezvnN-FH2f3Ui6yhi2-4o6li4Z_36qlC1O0Vhus6Y3zMsHjBuIPgP-ZXccihMJTxK1R7XvAEW3MnAFExfIFxddI6TKSiQVkKXeQXfLTzcaTyfu5XuRNbUzNNfT30yGBEDFT7FKiSH4MhQW6EHSX9pDALkbTtclFQ73pi1PQVQy5Jrlld-wrwTTkPzVe_v8icRNVuPBKeaQBYl2cSZjUgnazSeqCyLFOhLpTl4kcqLQwXsLG23DvoGs31qSCyPHeSwZrbVU8istUeWPZpqKHIoWNF4JDLel64miFDXd2_yGV51Wqr22JEgNFIRPHiiZhZn9R6nIhCTwMq7bycVmPte4pG5kz0Pvr6D2kpxyXnF_bENJKSKExp8fTwoQ3OU7dKlA2wVM76Ky2m-WLK5x4bWh5wm8EJv4gFj3ubtBdIEQhK1XHrRMSvwmJW9alOok5tg8DwXOIZrSoAU-DBhhzUhngm4nHQReKieF44Dj6QzTDO2-qEkZ00rqQp-o9mcqN4XFfWyV9eXcxmoAc0EOpnRvtm44yRWjcEWiNjOUBDHY%3D)
After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business.

**Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. **

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cc782598efd74c59bcd7aa602cc5e21e&_e=sezvnN-FH2f3Ui6yhi2-4o6li4Z_36qlC1O0Vhus6Y3zMsHjBuIPgP-ZXccihMJTxK1R7XvAEW3MnAFExfIFxddI6TKSiQVkKXeQXfLTzcaTyfu5XuRNbUzNNfT30yGBEDFT7FKiSH4MhQW6EHSX9pDALkbTtclFQ73pi1PQVQy5Jrlld-wrwTTkPzVe_v8iaNo_arQHfugr-ZevkXt0LE7aT5uPQ-1DOyLm0uUHOpRxWTgF8etOtTXUENbguaLgFMxqv2cJVe5NKf95Qqvmd9gHBvU8e1SjBEaCZ_j9XJj61jkxQO_mf0ezOQwV81dmAmDBN8n0eCoyAORrPrKj3JsvW1hklpIC3HgOyCDqtRVMGpqGANP6JEkeSOyh1XrYq-0q6fzycl7sbTMpgqStmIcSnf178NhW1KV_Et6-pZ_Qo31GawrrddW459MqhC4HSjromaUODOtpLJqkNE1pbidq5O2cMb4mDmhRMOMGdgOMFZklyJ_QmD1ydijXt9bQSRgJQGeHrl9nWO6yp2daGqANfGdXnUKxbQ6iNWthhz0%3D)
Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. **
**
With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we 're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll chip in just a few bucks today.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=cc782598efd74c59bcd7aa602cc5e21e&_e=sezvnN-FH2f3Ui6yhi2-4o6li4Z_36qlC1O0Vhus6Y3zMsHjBuIPgP-ZXccihMJTxK1R7XvAEW3MnAFExfIFxddI6TKSiQVkKXeQXfLTzcaTyfu5XuRNbUzNNfT30yGBEDFT7FKiSH4MhQW6EHSX9ls0l-2bNGvDn28vscuO1ZX6tWmRWajISso2uixytI486jQxJhNWkbKRDzrwOR_bLdmrUxczjY9qUAKLYGr8peJTP3vBKAG8TrcyZuXZzDrU5jL-vp0_GMwF5PP10ra9caW8M-UnYFaDvojSeo-RZr6fianHy7flg1SedjQVfg4Y9jyq1xTzSxw-sNe0r1vGXvIv8qUkPCOPFgUwA-csbIj1mEkLH4ee0-xGqw-IzmSmvo505cWLqBd8iOxTqLTN0Wht74BzyWZ2KECeF_1jDkHvHRZ-DDl8lTowKYuVBWDOWDhQ-PH_tBXSDMjP3Rf5oCNE6qHOwHAjOkd4ADNzFKVhNIB5DCoh6LA3xQwmTPyOSTn6a_6T82M9RdLI141vbpfunMVHAmr0NH80swALH2gZoaghmJ7phtG0PCsQrE3yK_CP10QvEgsleV5MhviuZA%3D%3D)**

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - **really, really tough.**

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

clean_body: But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. I'm ready to get to work with President Trump on the America-First agenda! | Patriot, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. Here 's a picture of my wife and me at the new member orientation in Washington. Most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I'm honored to have won my race for North Carolina's 10th Congressional District, and I'm ready to work alongside President Trump to make our nation great again. With President Trump in the Oval Office and House and Senate Majorities in Congress, we 're more equipped than ever to get our country back on track. The only thing we're missing is the resources to keep going. I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but making real changes to help hardworking Americans can be tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to success we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Please have my back on this one: | Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you, and God Bless, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. subject: The USPS belongs to all of us

body:
Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it

| **Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.****** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110946751/555723847/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250705_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJhNjM3OS1jMTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhDb0iySlp0yXrP7H2QT4IXPqeSUb0HavfpMTii05B4=&emci=83387eb6-7b57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=78ba6379-c159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110946758/555723880/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250705_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJhNjM3OS1jMTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhDb0iySlp0yXrP7H2QT4IXPqeSUb0HavfpMTii05B4=&emci=83387eb6-7b57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=78ba6379-c159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)
---
**The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities.**

It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans.
It ensures every American — _no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility_ — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting.

**And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in _fairness_.**

That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally.

New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, _not turn a profit for the privileged few._

**[If you agree that the USPS should stay in the hands of the people, add your name now and stand with us in this fight! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110946765/555723887/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250705_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJhNjM3OS1jMTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vhDb0iySlp0yXrP7H2QT4IXPqeSUb0HavfpMTii05B4=&emci=83387eb6-7b57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=78ba6379-c159-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: Trump wants to privatize it, New Dems are fighting to protect it | Donald Trump is once again floating the idea of privatizing the U.S. Postal Service — putting at risk a public institution that millions of Americans rely on every single day.** | The USPS is more than a mail carrier, it’s a vital lifeline for our democracy and our communities. It delivers prescription medications to seniors and veterans. It ensures every American — no matter how rural their address or how limited their mobility — has access to essential mail services and mail-in voting. And it does all this at the same cost to everyone, because it’s a public service rooted in fairness. That’s exactly why Trump and his allies want to dismantle it, because they don’t believe in a system that treats every American equally. New Dems are fighting to protect the USPS from privatization because we believe that public services should serve the public, not turn a profit for the privileged few. Thank you for your support! He voted to rip health care away from millions. We can’t let him win in Michigan. |
#
---
Team, **New polling shows that John James is the clear frontrunner for the Republican nomination in Michigan’s gubernatorial race.** If he wins, he’ll have the full weight of the national GOP and its billionaire donors behind him — all focused on flipping our state red. **[If you’re ready to pitch in and help Fight Like Hell PAC stop this from happening, make a contribution today to fuel our work:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110947105/555724796/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWRkMTBmZTItYzE1OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PvZUbRN_tjC2EnUbGmpjL1v_UcfiVC8pCSBqWt-IYLE=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110947106/555724797/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWRkMTBmZTItYzE1OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PvZUbRN_tjC2EnUbGmpjL1v_UcfiVC8pCSBqWt-IYLE=)

Let’s be clear about who he is.
John James just voted for the GOP’s so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” — which guts Medicaid and SNAP, resulting in millions of families losing health care and food assistance to pay for tax breaks for the wealthiest people in the country.
**That vote is an attack on working people in Michigan and across the country, and it’s a glaring declaration of where his priorities lie.**
We can’t trust John James to fight for Michiganders, and we can’t let Republicans buy this race and undo the progress we’ve made.
This fight will take all of us, and we’ll be organizing on the ground and making sure every voter knows exactly what’s at stake.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump signed away your healthcare — fight back.
body:
The big monstrosity of a bill is signed, and we're going to make sure EVERY SINGLE REPUBLICAN who voted for it pays at the ballot box. Chip in NOW so we can help hold these selfish billionaire-loving Trump lapdogs accountable >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=070525_1]
Donald Trump stood on stage last night and bragged about his so-called Big Beautiful Bill — calling it a “birthday present for America.”
We're raising funds NOW to hold EVERY SINGLE Republican who voted for this cruelty accountable and elect Democrats who will RESTORE what’s been taken. Chip in NOW to show that Democrats are not backing down >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=070525_1]
Because here’s what Trump is signing into law today:
❌16 million people will lose their healthcare
❌ 25% of nursing homes will shut down
❌ 51,000 preventable deaths every single year
❌ 2 million kids will lose access to food
❌ 1.75 million blue collar jobs will be wiped out
❌ 1.4 million students will lose their Pell Grants
❌ And the ultra-wealthy will get a $975 BILLION tax break
That’s not “beautiful.” That’s a national tragedy.
Our plan is clear:
✅ Expose what this bill really does
✅ Hold every single Republican who supported it accountable at the ballot box
✅ Elect Democrats who will RESTORE what Republicans destroyed and protect working families for good
This is it. We can’t undo Trump’s signature - but we can make every Republican who stood with him regret it.
Chip in $25, $50, $100 - whatever you can - to help us hold Republicans accountable and elect Democrats who will rebuild what we’ve lost >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=070525_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?express_lane=true&refcode=070525_1&amount=5]

| | Peter, I hope you had a joyful and meaningful Independence Day with family and friends.

The 4th of July isn’t just about celebration. It’s a reminder of the values that define us as Americans: freedom, equality, justice, and opportunity for all.

**Those ideals were born out of struggle, and leaders like my father, Rev. Jesse Jackson, spent their lives defending them. Now it’s our turn.**

But right now, extremist MAGA Republicans are pushing a different vision. They’re slashing support for veterans, working families, and seniors — just to give more tax breaks to billionaires and corporate donors.

**We can’t let that stand.**

[If you believe in an America that serves the people — not just the powerful — chip in $7 today to help defend our values and build a more just, inclusive clean_body: It’s not just about fireworks. It’s about fighting for what America stands for. | | If you’d like to unsubscribe, . | | Peter, I hope you had a joyful and meaningful Independence Day with family and friends. The 4th of July isn’t just about celebration. It’s a reminder of the values that define us as Americans: freedom, equality, justice, and opportunity for all. Those ideals were born out of struggle, and leaders like my father, Rev. Jesse Jackson, spent their lives defending them. Now it’s our turn. But right now, extremist MAGA Republicans are pushing a different vision. They’re slashing support for veterans, working families, and seniors — just to give more tax breaks to billionaires and corporate donors. We can’t let that stand. | | ---|--- | | My father taught me that patriotism isn’t just about words – it’s about service, sacrifice, and standing up for what’s right, even when it’s hard. That’s the legacy I carry with me, and the America I believe in. | ---|--- | | Peter, thank you for being in this fight with me. — Jonathan Jackson * | Paid for by Jackson for Congress Jonathan Jackson for Congress 1030 15th St NW, #404 Washington, DC 20005 United States If you need to unsubscribe, you can | | Sent via . name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Your opinion on the courts needed
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch is urgently requested.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/QqcCkGgGOpWP2Xyyi_9LvvSgz-L9ysZyRtKDIChTPcBWk-qxMHmbwZyHK8kgBETc3Yug3CvdXQvvrpivE7WsDdTV-eCnqMYMZdo64pMNyzSAqhVuVcYf6B6qM4jOigwSKr7JN2lhpNiJb8pA9YXhb20tRDiSL_dnJjUjTUWRhzgOWKCnbs7VBazd/2N97KPkwQfFIViklBWUdngQOOko-rsc1/10)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/CahOphLuHOU3MGpHe0gdafXGCaGhmU3tZOJ-Q2kcb21oEKv_Btzo1VbxOIeq6McxNGEa4ovWSaQ3jMgDUIR8liGsuvoS3-X95MTMsl1lyRrTrZY9QR6nTtZfZFfnJbTff0jFgmT9TU8x42B4wY58OIyDEY5KV0SbP03heOrO1sRujamw3rYt7KrNxDQa3Yxp7Wi8woLhZ5rIieuG5Cs4g8xv0iRTRolbpEqyAjSP5mo5jM0g_YNyaNyIMDaNolM5o6wTxykVbQgOZp_nY0BZVuB91dhyTtv9QemPHzJU7oXeGJtSipXeE0WoEaYFRC7y5Fdcw0Z_gPUULn-2TXopsw6sMeCEOdX46jXG4DfLGIh8pwy8H5hQoeQ4YZlnsbb06_RqqwoAF-EfNtjXP9KRncJOXgNvRqwD-T4F5JvB58Xmh_qrKBzKE-z5cWXbPGMRE7ha5DKnV1NNfO3URjkguDR54gF7D9BixJL_yUcwHQdrSVGQlWKa8VvXLb6fTlhyxjiin-2hVAU1lR_ROqSNQYinhvHp5Kond6ozRAfA03mqxpINlSabnAFQDpEN0XHdgIQbxX4yw4Meebzg63RtaO9C0-5MzD7w_Wc3Ifps0M0d1CefxpFjCzpEuxMMD_xH_mDkZ11O_rzsQiRzv2ghbZDkoUQ1NF5mV6Sm5zHPRQGSsNa0fj0GLKx8mhTxz5CtO-Nq_z_qpj9s2JLXr3ioYp-qTUo6_7It2b9Z9bn1j7LEASh3DxOpgMteHvrLAZOLAprbsdG5lPu9fGA67mrd/5Mfl-W8eR_XRpR2hJlt7u2KIQ9JdCIWQ/10) Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **[National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/XFMJHN0ZoK1ksXpgC_EpyUvrLQUI5pycv-uHT2Cj8bAzP11M4pAAiK_XXy1qerLeW8y85rz-2vEb-5SP5cWHkDA-XMy14bRRPnUd5CvRfWpctbjmfjsF7UXaOdCMiCsAdOgypreV71n615QGA_l399HYv-bEM4p9FkeFdXY7m127qzT5c600rKE459Zw2g1Cze5Ln5eI5HoNUof9qeIg77jukwa8fwqSvkTGKxoo9OqcyDLI_ro3bmq2vCOnkkFiQ3Ho2URZaxo6gazgusvi7K2e0Alcq00Jf1-jSfb_Ps_zDxampy-KP_NC7mz8QBy_xlwKcS3CmBFCV7YZvs7hTrlbQ9r8zcAMdZZMiH15g1v1QNaqXpN13H9I8tWjQ_232tK130qlcExza6_nYMbGmQvlbDAZpFPn_GKgaz1n4aM_p31k3ckdfJIWPBbQXjvoNnBqGMxs-2gsHxMQycOGVJozt3pX6r_m83XnktS3g1h0ZqzlkL2iLCh1sn8AmdPNNsWOR9CznBDgfSOj845IbenQnkIHgGiPWUci-fG2tpMxXblzoTwhuqB1bFV9HcrVC7IUoca0ILrKMzQTLiGtyJtq-FWJxNvqI6opO1I4OabXW6G_3xRBd8kvWSk0-LihWnphBcsyo9B0WEan-eh666j5j92D14Dy656M1hJT8VrKh8N60n5Z9eyX53nveyPdJDUZW0C6a507jj1maozvMejJdcHcTSgCBPpgypmG45xaFgr1z-euN1uWpcHeu45ePI0vohe-wA0FdFH_irdh/RWgTJa48FcOYCiRmgciRurWfPwfDueOa/10)** is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans.

To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following...
* An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending

* The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong

* An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state

* An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty

* An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions

The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists.

**If we don 't fix this crisis ...**

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people.

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms.

**And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic?_

Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/sCJT67rETna20ruWMaZk3ALCbc4ZoY83AtpPZhsNrG8OOu4IGhg25lpjzIY7h-tQom32v9q-H6dAE-FNG-H0Y0w9wXJoIk1m8G4YK1n5l5sSp8daYejeZpSOvqOZe-S0IgRzMrSwf36BYfeqqJubF-L3MF8vZpMzb1SsaIjHNXLsTS8Nfmq2ZPuxdui1bvl1JfQjmDMBJVJD_Zean8bWxpNEAb1ssTU24MzhqyTM3SA5-8CNUbbGQXncG11rLCuxr8teikrA-SftvxQo5A6zawlRWDF1N-1KYK2bIb5hn9A5CberSjW6EKh05QVfRkU0obYWKzUvP4UusvX-fevrIk2smGKtW7lCCZKY-uOX7veTbm4u_eeDyuVatJAH-p7yZ9mJP4XqF5STEnEZq3uY2FTQB-PyUW_PVKk-W9FF8PUkO4YZBNN-HtHJ6qFELg8SeqEMgl-8kuLW6O73NHekNlljxCqA4lv03fM0hDfVxcwS1Q3qzuuoybWg60_2Mq1WInSeGtHMtlmWYxRIhUEvKqQwhDrGadnL_Buz2NDDQGCXBxX37YNXBFXD1OdsQCq-PnchKjd8x2mVPXaPywlGBJXTwiLns8tRsTWaVktEIxsEfR--UDfNZlsBdlctd6M2zBYYq5dnOMDCWP8hl7HFGhQn-GPD0avGcoD7OmUtB_8ogbeQCLgxupqi5DMCPusYfJY0-p80v9qj0DCV85j7sdGIkmBgkDaWZ1ucVcv8I1bsUC7Yp7-A47D9MAargsR2WXv0FQ_jmnCQUxZADItZ/KwaukoVfg0spHUUhMBFRNvQNqt3SuWac/10)

And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide.** In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing _The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens.

* **Expanding the circulation of _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year.

* **Producing and promoting additional free online courses** on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans.

* **Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence** to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand.

We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/xrLFmAqR0NvMYsfQZGYmqGktBjjxGilx0LpUKMXId7dwtV0r_wMDSfCKlCMLtjWFLaWn6xHLWEjmHJiltnk0_cuFBzuPW5CUb0hb1nxTe3QQZnfSLdUrTuowi8knWaq7BM-hr1s5xX2G7Do1Gw-E9XwvQiZudcKHfkTHYOgh3Qi85OV5ywm5_m4Wot5UR061-LwwM3iqqTPBRI_HewZwr8ceBllwWByNBl_Z3utBNd6EVcdwUOftmP_jFsSdjG-BOFw_xTLECZUHaoToxnrXy8qDowuPi_mtm-WBKQTN95Gr25MhKABM18xKGwk-J_-eYNt3PA3TxN5RCajXi9IskTo0Zkr1QuBk-Ju7CMWKKoh_udsYaRXhSmRQrZwL7iGfZ8qgyGNZYhyAfMXsiilo5HuX5iuTHRVliZIBMeLuK0TaweIHRrGciUgaHHmtsYADT3DuFLcHvl6UDaNYoWKLTfKoGnFir9bOq0X8qZ4NunJKAgxF-lPryG-8x3gIexFQ8qpAKgKJntpDOWaTME-YAQflxvXLfuYdI2rOJQsAYN0e7oQYt5r1gUh9AVTeuzLZ1g4QUys-cNiQebEvZqbCjo3cAfO4f_40J_kExvIMmptOTTzvo6CHfS9TEEh2CuwYpxwg0cZe1nr83vyf2KwYko8H65waC-l30hj_jyocBPNQZzD8xL7anxE8oFWfrZCQC5E_Cja4AZNoy4XOMQkrqT2qre0n1iMPVwVKsNmQdJ-frjT_A0nUIaMJsTmsEiwogpei8zzQ3iL4cj5lVoTn/lDoYrpzzV0XLLTiSRd581NcsCG2Nv6Ci/10)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to help us preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch is urgently requested. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's is urgently requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America. Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans. To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following... An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists. If we don 't fix this crisis ... >> We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people. >> We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms. And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America. That's why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic? Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government. You can easily complete your National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch using this secure link: And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide. In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens. Expanding the circulation of Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year. Producing and promoting additional free online courses on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans. Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to help us preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | .

body:
I’m fighting for working families in Pennsylvania, here’s what I’ve been up to.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110948430/555728402/-1103416613?refcode=email_070525_Williams-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTFhNTZhOC1jNTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzHgPQvtQQZpzcY5w0Iwp9IVw9lBrYVBHgzyCb2XaTU=) Hi there, Derek, I’m Lindsey Williams, and I’m proud to serve as a Pennsylvania State Senator. I’ve spent my career on the frontlines of some of the most important battles facing Pennsylvania — from defending our values to standing up against MAGA extremism. **I’ve been pushing hard for working families, fighting for abortion rights, protecting public education, and standing strong for workers’ rights.** In a state that’s been under constant attack from the far-right, I’ve fought tirelessly against massive funding cuts and harmful policies coming out of Washington. Why? _Because the people of Pennsylvania deserve better than the corporate-backed interests trying to run the show._ I was recently appointed to the PA Regional Transit Board, where I’ve already made waves by fighting against budget cuts and fare hikes that would disproportionately impact vulnerable communities. **Public transit is critical for working families — and I’m standing firm to protect it.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110948432/555728405/-1103416613?refcode=email_070525_Williams-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTFhNTZhOC1jNTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzHgPQvtQQZpzcY5w0Iwp9IVw9lBrYVBHgzyCb2XaTU=) And yes, I’m still calling out corporate waste wherever it exists. Whether it’s standing up for unions or holding Democrats accountable when they fall short, I’m not afraid to speak the truth, even if it ruffles some feathers. _No one gets a free pass._ **I’m a working-class fighter, and I always have been.** It’s time for us to take a stand for the working people of Pennsylvania, and I need you with me. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: CONTROVERSIAL Sunday Tomorrow
body:
CONTROVERSIAL Sunday Tomorrow! Every year, we look at America's Christian roots and every year we experience extreme pushback for retelling the Ameri
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11892.1.cfb30bf15e8eab918344a4f89c7a8b4f) |
---
**CONTROVERSIAL Sunday Tomorrow!** Every year, we look at **America's Christian roots** and every year we experience _extreme pushback_ for retelling the American story truthfully and accurately. I want to encourage you to **invite someone to join you** tomorrow as we look at what God has done in America as well as what God is currently doing. I'll share insights from the White House and how America is returning to its' roots. Be sure to wear you **RED, WHITE + BLUE for Patriotic Sunday!** **Tulsa** | 10am CT **OKC** | 6pm CT **Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11893.1.42728a6f5f0e6a80e9779b96a7696515) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11894.1.b63bcc79940087b638bd4246e75d713a)
---
---
## It No Longer Looks Like A PRISON!
---
|
---
**It No Longer Looks Like A Prison!** As you know, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11895.1.5fdef5753afff9504b802da0b91b5bcb) purchased a former nightclub in Tulsa, OK and we have completely remodeled the inside. However, the outside needs a major FACELIFT! Today, windows are being installed at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11896.1.0641eea2796ec7ae447f2c497eb50881) and the Basketball/Pickleball court is being installed as well. This progress is great but...there is a lot more work to do to the outside of the building.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11897.1.745104abd20e80fa7a489fb82183b018)
---
This picture is the end game goal of Phase 1 of our outside remodel.
Our church does the work **on a cash basis** and we are wanting to start the new facelift of the building soon and could use your help to get it done!
Please consider giving towards the new facelift by visiting: [https://sheridan.church/give/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11898.1.571ed014739f4c81146d80300fc38eac) or mailing a check to 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145
**Your support will help accomplish this BIG goal!**
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Give Towards The Sheridan.Church Facelift ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11899.1.1a30b0b69943bd2d4430c3eaa24a9e6c)
---
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11900.1.b674325ecd3e937fb2000d06f7acf124) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11901.1.c0e19eaff6037bb5651d843fc10a6b0f)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11902.1.bd78e4b22f30f3f21be322faec8578c6)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11903.1.144b04a97d74f1aec5c2013752c1e6be). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11904.1.0f12a70b514e0e10be772817fc705187) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11905.1.fdb1424ee5e05eef156a373284df9e38) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11906.1.53333f9ad07a30008de21f1190bd5b9f) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11907.1.1cd313901fe76b1accb78b69d893eeb1)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11908.1.06654ec1ad3c5498c619f40d034f8a30)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11909.1.49ff1f6e2e1874332a162021a7364f59) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22606801.11910.1.9a32bfcfbb05b200dbd905474416d0fd) Thank you,

body:
President Trump's FEARLESS Press Secretary - Karoline Leavitt - makes a DEFIANT STATEMENT all voters (who still support Trump) must read immediately:[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/GxWfglw0YLK-1YT9zs9X5m8LfYZPSDJjc8wnrgSXHB4Adi4FUWSCPoAmyOwXjQ270zudqvDbrNHMUM4-27RyW4FdzvJtxOPLQRUxV1gdrMZh8Dr4nmz2EJBYPPFoTrjYWku8NjfWiC0MMs-sgw6Rkcyu6VDjtBQuOQz8MvATGllivoD77e4JgomJFqDbDZjVqZQn5U89v8905UoPcj91l8ogixdpIv2gz-167ai6mtDK6-HDS4as1VYVZhBmQEV5GeSnDJDquOzTq4NVR05l8hCQexp4SWSA9hZGVuuQA_02HH0o4dS51n_AQSYZ-PV3e8ISsMto3jtv9eQhMYJ_opNzzoG4aYGe1PnwzHZeHsWcEMVja9GJpFtHzm2fE_T_WF8-Os5mJLahPiGNmSDZZ7Zk0MbnkqiDH5N_wIInxRPoTkd-mr4Dv2UjFcymxKFG7FRBzZi2gnQznfOuYIQyZ6qmT52wPgEhpUsw5t7PidfmMF-vdlOayvuE8vSSgD4xBuZ7bwhQjEaaUGASPOjLmZOc3RipClNhuO4b6De4mykzw8_3gihbwi3p_Beorfe_Q23mLBosee1PS7YMzjeRCbCaqXvs0OAwdmh4IITg0wQZDEP-hdZLXlygrnXHyrmZNFWuLAlR5O8f3uctDoZMwvRKpD6ATfiZ5tpCZi9KweujZlwLiJXLVIfnS6CB-SPwWoJU9Ad5_yVDDbyJtU1CG2PqqvJBoS1mlIlBk3tvSD9Qi5LypWWP0I3tQRj6hodXNd5vLIP8sQs3DsK_B1fkj1M2wBxZmgZoaicLVxzbbcj_VP9h3i8zoNEoG_lumIqL-v1M96rYMqy_/IFu2kFEGqwZqlps6hm3A7VLIBUqhotFs/10)"The Democrats are doubling down on craziness and radical policies that are undermining the very fabric of our country. Just look at the Democrat nominee for NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani - he's a Democrat Socialist... Meanwhile, under President Trump's leadership, Republicans are fighting tirelessly for everyday, Middle Class Americans who reelected this President and who are carrying out a revolution of common sense"She struck gold with this one.
Zohran Mamdani is the canary in the coal mine for everything to come if Conservatives back down and allow the Democrat Machine to barge back into power.
Look, we've seen the Democrats' true face since President Trump took office. Since the SECOND he put his hand on the Bible, they threw decency and commonsense out the window to unleash a revolution of their own.
They're hell-bent on taking down Conservatives - and our country with them.

If we surrender power, they'll IMMEDIATELY move to impeach President Trump, shut down the MAGA agenda, ram through the woke agenda, and charge ahead to investigate our President and every single one of his allies.
We can't let that happen.
House Republicans are doing EVERYTHING they can to hold the line but it's time for Conservatives everywhere to help us out and take a stand.
So here's what we're asking:
We're pleading with EVERY SINGLE Conservative reading this email to go on the record right here and right now and confirm their support for the entire MAGA movement. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Today we get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Yesterday, President Trump signed his big bill, which Republicans rubber stamped through Congress. They don’t care it’s taking away Americans’ health care, but they’ll care when they lose elections.
#

Friend,
If you’ve been watching Washington, you know it was a bad week for Americans — unless you’re a billionaire.
Trump and Republicans just passed the biggest cash giveaway to the rich, while simultaneously kicking poor people off their health care, taking school lunch from kids, and adding $3.4 trillion to the national debt.
Democrats stood united in opposing this destructive bill, but Republicans in the Senate and the House caved to pass it because they’re more afraid of Trump than they are committed to doing the right thing.
So what now? Well, we have to make Trump and Republicans know there will be consequences — that they will lose the next election and the one after that.
We have to bring sanity back to Washington. We do that by winning elections, and that requires raising resources.
That starts today.
[**If I can count on you, please: Donate $3, or whatever you can, to help us start laying the groundwork to elect leaders who will fight for working families instead of billionaires.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25/.CXgdOY&refcode=em250705-1-600&t=1&akid=6116%2E6688874%2EvJxZJ9)

name: George Whitesides
subject: Mike Garcia is back.
body:
Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw the news that we officially have our first Republican opponent in CA-27.

**[Before I ask you to contribute $3 in response, I need to explain why this announcement is so significant.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110949404/555732052/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.5.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjhhZDQyMC1jYTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wo7OU4ScSS96BaTbDLBcLQpwYNThR0msE9hmuoSd_VQ=)**

**This new challenger is stepping into the race with a full-throated endorsement from none other than Mike Garcia -- the MAGA Republican I defeated last year.**

Since leaving office, Garcia hasn’t backed down from Trump’s worst ideas. He’s spent the last six months defending Trump’s reckless tariff policies that nearly tanked our economy. Now, he wants to handpick the person who’ll bring that chaos back to Congress.

This isn’t just about one endorsement. It’s about what’s coming: a national Republican machine lining up behind a candidate who’s ready to rubber-stamp Trump’s agenda -- no matter the cost to working families.

**This first re-election is the most important fight of my career.** We need to send a message -- _right now_ \-- that CA-27 won’t go back to a Trump lackey who favors the wealthy while cutting support for everyone else.

Not while families are still struggling with housing costs, healthcare premiums, and wildfire threats. Not while billionaires get tax breaks and working people are told to tighten their belts. Not while the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” is stripping health care and essential programs from millions of Americans.

The GOP sees a first-term Democrat in one of the most competitive districts in the country. If we show strength now, we can set the tone for the rest of this race, but I need you with me:

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw the news that we officially have our first Republican opponent in CA-27. = This new challenger is stepping into the race with a full-throated endorsement from none other than Mike Garcia -- the MAGA Republican I defeated last year. Since leaving office, Garcia hasn’t backed down from Trump’s worst ideas. He’s spent the last six months defending Trump’s reckless tariff policies that nearly tanked our economy. Now, he wants to handpick the person who’ll bring that chaos back to Congress. This isn’t just about one endorsement. It’s about what’s coming: a national Republican machine lining up behind a candidate who’s ready to rubber-stamp Trump’s agenda -- no matter the cost to working families. This first re-election is the most important fight of my career. We need to send a message -- right now \-- that CA-27 won’t go back to a Trump lackey who favors the wealthy while cutting support for everyone else. Not while families are still struggling with housing costs, healthcare premiums, and wildfire threats. Not while billionaires get tax breaks and working people are told to tighten their belts. Not while the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” is stripping health care and essential programs from millions of Americans. The GOP sees a first-term Democrat in one of the most competitive districts in the country. If we show strength now, we can set the tone for the rest of this race, but I need you with me: = Thanks for standing with me, George **= George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: My job is clear, y’all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Y’all, it’s Jasmine. **[Are We Ready for a Bail-In?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj83u2yAQxJ8G37BgsU04cPinqXuo1EOqquqpWj7sUEHsgJMob1-RRjn1tNLsb3ZmMa0xTA9N5J4AnIIrBICIDwJw-XVP-fonff1C8w2O9DJ8S33dwqcXeoM3fLZo5v13vHwuoqRV_bjkvbrxN749Vv-GX6GtTxhiVeWhcVpMjnWN11z2XAqleNectOB8QmOHCZRiSnaecdUbMQglmZDONEEDg55J1vNdne1uALMTwlhpYFJoSMeeOS0mn4NFXrY75rwsqbVLaqI-bdtansVGAmNcW4zRzwHP1s9LdJUiMGL29O5p9ugedFoyRWowRBrO1SfG65Z-l-WarSfi8PEvagy5bD8xH5d6YqhI8i5cExGHg93cS7OYVgzz-f9GJinrm6zdeg8xhjJI0rH5-VHtf9PwNwAA__9k641n)** In recent months, something has been quietly unfolding beneath the surface of our financial system - and it's getting harder to ignore. It started with bank closures. Trusted institutions like **Wells Fargo, JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, and U.S. Bancorp** began shutting down locations. First **145 branches closed in less than five weeks...** then over **[400 more filed for closure.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj83u2yAQxJ8G37BgsU04cPinqXuo1EOqquqpWj7sUEHsgJMob1-RRjn1tNLsb3ZmMa0xTA9N5J4AnIIrBICIDwJw-XVP-fonff1C8w2O9DJ8S33dwqcXeoM3fLZo5v13vHwuoqRV_bjkvbrxN749Vv-GX6GtTxhiVeWhcVpMjnWN11z2XAqleNectOB8QmOHCZRiSnaecdUbMQglmZDONEEDg55J1vNdne1uALMTwlhpYFJoSMeeOS0mn4NFXrY75rwsqbVLaqI-bdtansVGAmNcW4zRzwHP1s9LdJUiMGL29O5p9ugedFoyRWowRBrO1SfG65Z-l-WarSfi8PEvagy5bD8xH5d6YqhI8i5cExGHg93cS7OYVgzz-f9GJinrm6zdeg8xhjJI0rH5-VHtf9PwNwAA__9k641n)** Next came the warning shot from **Moody's,** which downgraded several major U.S. banks - citing one deeply alarming reason: _**"The government's weakened ability to support the banking system."**_ This isn't just a headline. It's a red flag. Let's connect the dots:
* ✅ Banks are required to hold **just 7% of deposits** in reserve.
* ✅ **Interest rates** are choking economic growth.
* ✅ **Loan defaults** are on the rise.
* ✅ And the**national debt is approaching $37 trillion.**

Even JPMorgan CEO **Jamie Dimon** issued a stark warning: _**"You are going to see a crack in the bond market... It is going to happen."**_ If another shock hits, the next move may not be a bailout... It could be a **["Bail-In".](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj83u2yAQxJ8G37BgsU04cPinqXuo1EOqquqpWj7sUEHsgJMob1-RRjn1tNLsb3ZmMa0xTA9N5J4AnIIrBICIDwJw-XVP-fonff1C8w2O9DJ8S33dwqcXeoM3fLZo5v13vHwuoqRV_bjkvbrxN749Vv-GX6GtTxhiVeWhcVpMjnWN11z2XAqleNectOB8QmOHCZRiSnaecdUbMQglmZDONEEDg55J1vNdne1uALMTwlhpYFJoSMeeOS0mn4NFXrY75rwsqbVLaqI-bdtansVGAmNcW4zRzwHP1s9LdJUiMGL29O5p9ugedFoyRWowRBrO1SfG65Z-l-WarSfi8PEvagy5bD8xH5d6YqhI8i5cExGHg93cS7OYVgzz-f9GJinrm6zdeg8xhjJI0rH5-VHtf9PwNwAA__9k641n)** **What Is A Bail-In?** A bail-in means **depositors - not taxpayers - absorb the loss.** Your **checking account, savings, or retirement funds** could be frozen or restructured to "stabilize" a failing bank. **Sound extreme?** As of Q4 2024, just four banks - **BOA, JPMorgan, Citigroup, and Wells Fargo** \- hold over **$3.2 trillion in uninsured U.S. deposits.** **[If even one fails, the shock could dwarf 2008.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxsj83u2yAQxJ8G37BgsU04cPinqXuo1EOqquqpWj7sUEHsgJMob1-RRjn1tNLsb3ZmMa0xTA9N5J4AnIIrBICIDwJw-XVP-fonff1C8w2O9DJ8S33dwqcXeoM3fLZo5v13vHwuoqRV_bjkvbrxN749Vv-GX6GtTxhiVeWhcVpMjnWN11z2XAqleNectOB8QmOHCZRiSnaecdUbMQglmZDONEEDg55J1vNdne1uALMTwlhpYFJoSMeeOS0mn4NFXrY75rwsqbVLaqI-bdtansVGAmNcW4zRzwHP1s9LdJUiMGL29O5p9ugedFoyRWowRBrO1SfG65Z-l-WarSfi8PEvagy5bD8xH5d6YqhI8i5cExGHg93cS7OYVgzz-f9GJinrm6zdeg8xhjJI0rH5-VHtf9PwNwAA__9k641n)** **So Why Are Banks Turning to Gold?** On **July 1, 2025,** gold will officially be reclassified as a **Tier 1 asset** under Basel III regulations. This thing can perfectly zero ANY new optic without firing a single shot...

In about 90 seconds flat.

We call this device [**The Boar.**](https://app.gunowner-news.com/campaigns/fo953aaays3d3/track-url/rf332597r6949/021932de72f92d2217dfa6b94b6948213d8e9570)

It's saved me hundreds of dollars in ammo in the past year alone... and that's not even counting range fees.

I'm always down for a trip to the range but zeroing in a new optic can be expensive AF and frustrating to boot.

Then a hunting guide buddy showed me The Boar -> Game Changer.

The Boar by MCG Tactical fits any caliber from .17 to .50 cal.

And this bad boy packs a premium lithium battery that's USB rechargeable.

And to make this deal a total no-brainer, we're picking up the shipping and handling.

So start saving money on ammo AND getting the best zero of your life today while we're running this limited time sale!

name: Wes Moore
subject: Greed
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=273%2E1086043%2EuOjf4j ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=273%2E1086043%2EuOjf4j ]Wes Moore for Governor

Greed.

Peter, that’s the
only way to describe the budget bill that Congress passed and President
Trump signed into law this week. It’s a nightmare for working families,
just for multimillionaires to get a tax cut.

Nearly 200,000 Marylanders could lose their health coverage. Working
people, folks with disabilities, seniors, and anybody who qualifies for
SNAP will have a harder time providing for their families. Rural hospitals
could lose millions in funding, and energy costs could skyrocket.

The Trump administration has already tried to sever the relationship
between the federal government and our states. But this bill severs the
relationship between the federal government and its people.

As Maryland's governor,
I’m ready to find every way we can to lessen these disastrous impacts on
Marylanders. I’m fighting for working families at the state level.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250705-1?refcode=em-20250705-1&refcode2=273_1086043_uOjf4j&akid=273%2E1086043%2EuOjf4j ]If you’re with us, I could use your help. Our reelection effort is
powered by folks like you. Can you chip in $5 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250705-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250705-1&refcode2=273_1086043_uOjf4j&akid=273%2E1086043%2EuOjf4j ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you for all you do for this team.

Elevate,

Wes

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.wesmoore.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=273%2E1086043%2EuOjf4j

A few weeks ago, the U.S. Supreme Court announced it would not hear _L.M. v. Town of Middleborough_ , a case where a Massachusetts school punished a student for wearing a t-shirt to school with the words "There are only two genders."

Liam's case was about much more than just a t-shirt. The school actively promotes its view about gender through posters and "Pride" events, and it encourages students to wear clothing with messages on the same topic--so long as that clothing expresses the school's preferred views on the subject.

This is a disappointing development--a setback for free speech.

By denying the case, the Supreme Court leaves in place a lower court ruling that denied Liam's clear constitutional right to free speech.

We believe public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader's speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that respectfully states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment.

Do you agree with Liam that there are only two genders?
