name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: RE: One Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Peter, extreme House Republicans just approved the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history to fund tax breaks for their billionaire donors.

The latest GOP stunt will rip healthcare away from 17 MILLION Americans, jack up our utility bills and take food out of the mouths of children, seniors and veterans. It’s disgusting.

I won’t be silent. You shouldn’t be either.

Peter, if enough Democrats band together, we can ensure Republicans will always regret this vote. I’m calling for an emergency fundraising surge today – 5,000 Democratic Membership renewals before midnight – to show everyone watching that when Republicans go after our families, we’re coming for their seats. Can I count on you to renew your membership by splitting a donation between me and Zoe Lofgren so we can rush resources to battleground districts, reclaim the House majority and hand the right-wing extremists a stunning rebuke? >>

2025 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER
NAME: Peter
ID: #486725
MEMBERSHIP: UNCONFIRMED

SUGGESTED DONATION: $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-hakeem-jeffries-split-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-07-03_HJE_BBB_ES-27018&amount=25]

As Democrats, we face a clear choice in this consequential moment:

We can allow Republicans to rip healthcare away from millions just so their billionaire MAGA allies can help them buy another election...

OR we can band together and build the largest coalition of Democrats this country has ever seen to flip the House blue, cut Trump’s presidency in half and continue our work delivering For The People.

Can I count on you to renew your 2025 Democratic Membership immediately by splitting a donation between me and Zoe Lofgren? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-hakeem-jeffries-split-q32025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-07-03_HJE_BBB_ES-27018&amount=25]

Keep the faith,

Hakeem

name: following up [DOTL]
subject: Peter, did you forget to thank Bernie Sanders?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Peter, we noticed you haven’t signed the letter standing with Senator Bernie Sanders.
Frankly, we’re shocked.
Thousands of Democrats have already signed on to thank Bernie for standing up to Trump and defending our democracy.
We thought you would run at the chance to support his efforts to stop Trump’s oligarchy in-action!
We’ve extended our deadline to midnight tonight, and we’re forwarding the message below so you can read it again – and take action before it’s too late >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=7]
DONATE $7 TO SIGN » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=7]
- Democracy On The Line

-FORWARDED MESSAGE-

🚨 BERNIE SANDERS JUST DROPPED THE MIC 🚨

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=10]Sen. Sanders is not backing down in the face of MAGA authoritarianism, and neither can we!

He’s calling out the Trump administration for his anti-democracy agenda:

❌Gutting Social Security❌
❌Planning to privatize the USPS to suppress the mail-in vote❌
❌Trying to run for an unconstitutional third term ❌

Senator Sanders just reminded the nation what real leadership looks like. In this moment of crisis, we need you to show up with the same urgency and resolve!

We only have 482 spots left on this letter, so you have to act fast: Chip in $7 now to sign the letter to thank Bernie Sanders and help us elect more Democrats who will stand strong for our democracy! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=7]

Donate $7 to sign the letter now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=7]

TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
RE: Thank you, Senator Sanders.
Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,
Thank you for standing strong in defense of our democracy.
As you fight the Trump administration’s anti-democracy agenda, I need you to know that thousands of Democrats (including me!) are fighting alongside you.
Your moral courage is giving millions of Americans the strength to say “NO” to Trump’s efforts to act like a king who is above the law.
Your voice is cutting through the noise, and I know that with thousands of Americans behind you we can hold the Trump administration accountable and defend our democracy!
So I’m signing this thank-you letter and chipping in $7 to Democracy on the Line PAC to show my gratitude, and to help elect more Democrats who will stand up for democracy, accountability, and progress like you are! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=7]
Donate $7 to sign the letter now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_sanders?amount=7]
Thank you, Senator Sanders. Please keep leading the way. We’ve got your back.
X Peter Willis

– Democracy on the Line PAC

As you fight the Trump administration’s anti-democracy agenda, I need you to know that thousands of Democrats (including me!) are fighting alongside you. Your moral courage is giving millions of Americans the strength to say “NO” to Trump’s efforts to act like a king who is above the law. Your voice is cutting through the noise, and I know that with thousands of Americans behind you we can hold the Trump administration accountable and defend our democracy! So I’m signing this thank-you letter and chipping in $7 to Democracy on the Line PAC to show my gratitude, and to help elect more Democrats who will stand up for democracy, accountability, and progress like you are! » [] Donate $7 to sign the letter now » [] Thank you, Senator Sanders. Please keep leading the way. We’ve got your back. X Peter Willis – Democracy on the Line PAC Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Offense.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Can you agree that if Democrats are going to build the majorities it takes to pass significant legislation, it will require winning in states we haven't won in recently?

Good morning, team.
I have an important ask of you today. Yes you. And it's one I try to keep to a minimum, so I hope you can make it happen.
I am writing to ask you to make a contribution... not for me... but to the South Carolina Democratic Party. If me asking is all you need to hear, you can make that contribution here:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/sc-dems**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-sc-dems?refcode=em250706-C&refcode2=2379_4767699_3CreLN&akid=2379%2E4767699%2E3CreLN)
Otherwise, let me start with a question.
Can you agree that if Democrats are going to build the majorities it takes to pass significant legislation, it will require winning in states we haven't won in recently?
That's how I feel. And it's why I am on my way to South Carolina right now for events across the state -- all organized by the South Carolina Democratic Party.
This is a huge year for them. There's a U.S. Senate race, a race for Governor, and House races that could determine control of the chamber -- these are races that can be won.
Unfortunately, the state party is terribly underfunded. While most resources go to "swing states," the South Carolina Democratic Party only gets $22,500 per month from the DNC to fund their efforts.
It's not enough.
So they need our help. Not just me. Us.
[**Can you please make a contribution to the South Carolina Democratic Party before I get there? I'd love to tell them we raised a lot of donations for them -- money that will give them a fighting chance in the next election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-sc-dems?source=em250706-C&refcode2=2379_4767699_3CreLN&akid=2379%2E4767699%2E3CreLN)
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-sc-dems?express_lane=true&prefill=1&amount_other=3&source=em250706-C&refcode2=2379_4767699_3CreLN&akid=2379%2E4767699%2E3CreLN)**

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-sc-dems?express_lane=true&prefill=1&amount=50&source=em250706-C&refcode2=2379_4767699_3CreLN&akid=2379%2E4767699%2E3CreLN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-sc-dems?express_lane=true&prefill=1&amount=100&source=em250706-C&refcode2=2379_4767699_3CreLN&akid=2379%2E4767699%2E3CreLN)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-sc-dems?express_lane=true&prefill=1&amount=250&source=em250706-C&refcode2=2379_4767699_3CreLN&akid=2379%2E4767699%2E3CreLN)**

When you watch the results of the next election, pay a little extra attention to South Carolina and know the donation you made today was responsible for the gains -- and hopefully victories -- they earn.
Thank you in advance for contributing. It means a lot to me.
Gavin

clean_body: | | = Peter, Donald Trump’s Big Ugly Bill was signed into law — forced through with Vance’s tie-breaking vote. In Pennsylvania, we’ve hit record low rates of uninsured residents, at 7.1%! Instead of working to bring it down more, PA Senator Dave McCormick and his fellow Senate Republicans chose to line millionaire and billionaire pockets — at the cost of hardworking Pennsylvanians. Cuts to Medicaid and Medicare means more Pennsylvanians are at risk of being uninsured — 23% of all Pennsylvanians rely on Medicaid. = | | = We are focused on working for you — to lower costs of living so every Pennsylvanian family can afford their doctors visits and necessary medication. We’re fighting harder than ever to win races down ballot for public servants. It’s time to fire politicians who only serve their billionaire puppeteer masters. Together, we can defend our healthcare and make sure that Pennsylvanians do not lose their insurance. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — PA Dems = | Follow us on , , and **! * * *
Friend, The Trump administration’s Department of Justice is demanding every single record from Colorado’s 2024 election — and ordering officials to preserve everything from 2020 as well. This isn’t a normal oversight request. **It’s a blatant act of political intimidation.** Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold has made it clear: this is a coordinated effort to cast doubt on the integrity of our elections and harass the public servants who make them work. And Colorado is just the beginning. Trump’s DOJ is **targeting other states like North Carolina, Arizona, Oregon,** all under the same unconstitutional executive order. **This is what authoritarianism looks like:** using federal power to hunt for enemies, punish opposition, and rewrite the rules. Democratic Secretaries of State are the firewall. They’re standing strong, refusing to back down. But they can’t do it alone. We need to fund their legal defenses, expand voter protections, and organize the public before this strategy spreads further. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m calling for Kristi Noem’s resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friend, I’m leading the call for Kristi Noem’s resignation. As the **senior-most Democrat on the House Homeland Security Committee** , I’ve seen a lot — but what Noem is doing at the Department of Homeland Security is beyond the pale. She deported a _4-year-old child battling cancer_. She detained a U.S. Marshal. She lied to Congress about Trump’s doctored photo of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. And she’s arrested one member of Congress and detained another just for speaking out against MAGA’s authoritarian regime. **Under her leadership, ICE agents are running around this country terrorizing families, masking their identities, and abusing their power at Noem’s behest.** **I’m demanding accountability — and her resignation. But I need your help.** [**While I fight to ensure Kristi Noem answers for her disregard for the rule of law on the Homeland Security Committee, will you split a contribution between me and Seth Moulton? I’m about to be in the middle of two high stakes investigations against Trump and his henchmen, so I need to be prepared to fight back no matter what they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110953175/555745926/265156787?refcode=250705_MFC_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Y0YjU3YS1lMTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCP2yoQkCnn4ipNCH2UdIALcyAZnaHoEMxHPncQ_in4=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110953176/555745927/-288956247?refcode=250705_MFC_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Y0YjU3YS1lMTU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UCP2yoQkCnn4ipNCH2UdIALcyAZnaHoEMxHPncQ_in4=) Democracy dies when we remain silent, friend. Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: Still a Shining City on a Hill
body:
America as a beacon of hope, symbol of freedom, and promise of opportunity.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..LOwLZP2j0-IWuWoDXVzLlDdck3KaZrV-IGdOC4vCwDM?) for more
---
[](https://substack..wWOPANVjmPBmyMMUY-_TFdjFHanuWDUaMKH9kKXaNXI?)

# [Still a Shining City on a Hill](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=167602340&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjAyMzQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE3NDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NDM0MTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LV4xzQQ67hDUrpNAfgTGuPQmS-3xIsvWwfz-eSZkRPk)
### America as a beacon of hope, symbol of freedom, and promise of opportunity.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Jul 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=167602340&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjAyMzQwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTc0OTI4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzU0MzQxMjgxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A29amFN79umHWzVPDNuXqyBTUTs6ARnrlDDi4-qkHVo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=167602340&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjAyMzQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE3NDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NDM0MTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LV4xzQQ67hDUrpNAfgTGuPQmS-3xIsvWwfz-eSZkRPk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=167602340&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjAyMzQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE3NDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NDM0MTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LV4xzQQ67hDUrpNAfgTGuPQmS-3xIsvWwfz-eSZkRPk)
---
| | [](https://substack..WSH1Jf_xCxMt8zInxwiO9lRNT6VnmA_F9KVqlWyx8pg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/still-a-shining-city-on-a-hill?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c4c12645-589b-4d71-a6e9-9a28c1811711?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In addition to spending time with family, eating some burgers, and watching fireworks, I have always used Independence Day as a time to reflect. Specifically, I can't help but marvel at the greatness of our country and how lucky I am to have been born here.
While each of us has our own stories, mine really begins half a world away when a retrenching British empire decided to leave the Indian subcontinent. You see, my parents were born in what was then British India, and when London decided to pull back from the region, they separated India into what eventually became three countries - Pakistan, India, and Bangladesh. (It was initially Pakistan and India, and Bangladesh became an independent nation in the 1971 after its nine-month liberation war.) My parents, then children, were on the wrong side of a newly drawn line; they were Hindus living in what was now the majority Muslim country of Pakistan.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Ee8NNoOfTldVT6kqAU9-H02fg-1fSN6KCXDymdRI4bs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167602340)
The partition was accompanied by spasms of unimaginable violence on both sides of this new line, and in many cities, like the ones in which my parents were living, mobs went house to house looking for Hindus to kill. Only a child at the time, my father walked with his family to the waterfront and boarded a cargo ship that was helping Hindus escape. After days at sea, with only a few slices of bread to eat, he disembarked in what is today Mumbai.
When he came of age, he went to work in Africa, taking jobs for months at a time and then returning home. Then one day, he overheard some workers in Nigeria talking about America. "An amazing country! A true land of opportunity, it doesn't matter what your parents do or who they are... Anyone can succeed there!" they said.
* * *
## [The Pursuit of Better](https://substack.com/redirect/b0046cd0-4da9-407f-bb99-243c1bee494a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| June 18, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b0046cd0-4da9-407f-bb99-243c1bee494a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[While celebrating Father's Day with my own children this past weekend, I couldn't help but think about my own father. He's an amazing individual who embodies the adventurous spirit and can-do attitud...](https://substack.com/redirect/b0046cd0-4da9-407f-bb99-243c1bee494a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/b0046cd0-4da9-407f-bb99-243c1bee494a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Intrigued, and always restless, he went to the US embassy in Lagos where he inquired about education opportunities in America. He later learned about an auto mechanic school in New York; if accepted into the program, he was guaranteed a student visa. He applied, was accepted, and was once again on to a new life, in a new land.
Barring that fateful day, he might have just continued trekking back and forth between Africa and India, and I might have been born in India (or Africa). Or perhaps he would have gone to Great Britain, as many Indians did in those days. Those would have been easier choices. But he chose a distant land filled with promise, and instead of the crowded outskirts of Mumbai or the distant boroughs of London, I was born in Queens, New York.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Ee8NNoOfTldVT6kqAU9-H02fg-1fSN6KCXDymdRI4bs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167602340)
My father wouldn't have found the opportunities elsewhere that he found in the United States. He wouldn't have had a chance to educate himself, work hard, and save money. He wouldn't have had the opportunity to own a gas station, and he wouldn't have had the chance to dust himself off and stand up again when it failed during the 1990s recession. His son wouldn't have had the chance to earn scholarships to Yale and MIT, earn a PhD, teach at Harvard, advise Fortune 500 companies, or run for one of the highest offices in the land.
I often think about how my life could have been different. I doubt that I would have had the chance to go to Oxford, run to be a member of Parliament, or start a business in the highly stratified British society. And what my life would have been like in Mumbai or Lagos is hard to imagine.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f0bd9531-0929-4561-9b94-e3ef6456e45e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Perhaps most importantly, I wouldn't have had a chance to truly belong in those countries like I do here. Only in America can immigrants (like my parents) and their children be truly accepted as fellow countrymen. As Ronald Reagan noted, "[You can go to live in France, but you cannot become a Frenchman. You can go to live in Germany or Turkey or Japan, but you cannot become a German, a Turk, or a Japanese. But anyone, from any corner of the Earth, can come to live in America and become an American](https://substack.com/redirect/36838525-e58c-4180-ad51-52b44a1ff36e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
**" You can go to live in France, but you cannot become a Frenchman. You can go to live in Germany or Turkey or Japan, but you cannot become a German, a Turk, or a Japanese. But anyone, from any corner of the Earth, can come to live in America and become an American"
\- Ronald Reagan**
My parents say that the day they became Americans was one of the happiest days of their lives, and even though they were born in a foreign land, they are as American as those whose ancestors came over on the Mayflower.
Every Independence Day, I think of my parents and the courage it took to leave behind everything and come to America in search of a better life. I think of the opportunities this country offered them and were subsequently available to both me and my sister. I think of the opportunities my children have because of the decision my dad made to go to the embassy in Nigeria and to take actions that brought him to this promised land of opportunity.
Today, [as a business owner with dozens of employees](https://substack.com/redirect/0a7ccc73-9603-480e-9941-654ea4eca85c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), many of whom are first or second generation Americans, I can't help but see the parallels with my own family. By working hard and saving money, many of today's immigrants are doing exactly what my father did... creating opportunities for their families and children. And even in this time of political polarization and challenging geopolitical dynamics, individuals from around the world still want to come to America. ([How many people are trying to become Chinese](https://substack.com/redirect/71ac085c-fa7d-47f0-9d2e-19c3f4dac0bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [Russian citizens](https://substack.com/redirect/e885afac-590a-4a6a-80bc-7a1b4a2a9f2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?) The United States remains, despite our many challenges, a beacon of hope, symbol of freedom, and promise of opportunity.
[Follow GOODWELL FOODS](https://substack.com/redirect/c6813562-3b7d-44b9-a70f-8f282a9241ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As we celebrate Independence Day, I hope we all take a moment to remind ourselves that America is still the Shining City on a Hill that drew my parents and millions just like them. It's more than a land, it's an idea, a belief. That everyone has potential and that by putting individuals first, all of us benefit. And ultimately, a belief that a constant inflow of entrepreneurial risk-taking energy that accompanies self-selected seekers of opportunity is what makes America unique.
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=167602340&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjAyMzQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE3NDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NDM0MTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LV4xzQQ67hDUrpNAfgTGuPQmS-3xIsvWwfz-eSZkRPk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=167602340&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NjAyMzQwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE3NDkyODEsImV4cCI6MTc1NDM0MTI4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LV4xzQQ67hDUrpNAfgTGuPQmS-3xIsvWwfz-eSZkRPk)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Ee8NNoOfTldVT6kqAU9-H02fg-1fSN6KCXDymdRI4bs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167602340)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a623ee1b-49e3-4702-8d92-822d9d1b6069?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/b7e94995-4fbe-43e0-b684-925391166161?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/1d297e36-7411-4cda-a206-3bc15b956433?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/263ece46-646f-411e-9411-b7c140afdc8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/769349fd-4dc2-443f-8ece-a270176033d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..Ee8NNoOfTldVT6kqAU9-H02fg-1fSN6KCXDymdRI4bs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Ee8NNoOfTldVT6kqAU9-H02fg-1fSN6KCXDymdRI4bs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

He applied, was accepted, and was once again on to a new life, in a new land. Barring that fateful day, he might have just continued trekking back and forth between Africa and India, and I might have been born in India (or Africa). Or perhaps he would have gone to Great Britain, as many Indians did in those days. Those would have been easier choices. But he chose a distant land filled with promise, and instead of the crowded outskirts of Mumbai or the distant boroughs of London, I was born in Queens, New York. My father wouldn't have found the opportunities elsewhere that he found in the United States. He wouldn't have had a chance to educate himself, work hard, and save money. He wouldn't have had the opportunity to own a gas station, and he wouldn't have had the chance to dust himself off and stand up again when it failed during the 1990s recession. His son wouldn't have had the chance to earn scholarships to Yale and MIT, earn a PhD, teach at Harvard, advise Fortune 500 companies, or run for one of the highest offices in the land. I often think about how my life could have been different. I doubt that I would have had the chance to go to Oxford, run to be a member of Parliament, or start a business in the highly stratified British society. And what my life would have been like in Mumbai or Lagos is hard to imagine. Perhaps most importantly, I wouldn't have had a chance to truly belong in those countries like I do here. Only in America can immigrants (like my parents) and their children be truly accepted as fellow countrymen. As Ronald Reagan noted, "." " You can go to live in France, but you cannot become a Frenchman. You can go to live in Germany or Turkey or Japan, but you cannot become a German, a Turk, or a Japanese. But anyone, from any corner of the Earth, can come to live in America and become an American" \- Ronald Reagan My parents say that the day they became Americans was one of the happiest days of their lives, and even though they were born in a foreign land, they are as American as those whose ancestors came over on the Mayflower. Every Independence Day, I think of my parents and the courage it took to leave behind everything and come to America in search of a better life. I think of the opportunities this country offered them and were subsequently available to both me and my sister. I think of the opportunities my children have because of the decision my dad made to go to the embassy in Nigeria and to take actions that brought him to this promised land of opportunity. Today, , many of whom are first or second generation Americans, I can't help but see the parallels with my own family. By working hard and saving money, many of today's immigrants are doing exactly what my father did... creating opportunities for their families and children. And even in this time of political polarization and challenging geopolitical dynamics, individuals from around the world still want to come to America. ( or ?) The United States remains, despite our many challenges, a beacon of hope, symbol of freedom, and promise of opportunity. As we celebrate Independence Day, I hope we all take a moment to remind ourselves that America is still the Shining City on a Hill that drew my parents and millions just like them. It's more than a land, it's an idea, a belief. That everyone has potential and that by putting individuals first, all of us benefit. And ultimately, a belief that a constant inflow of entrepreneurial risk-taking energy that accompanies self-selected seekers of opportunity is what makes America unique. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and **. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: The National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/-frLG-c37PH1YGprUWwcHq-81LwFB26jSGxY19-zipWkJzGCIounoEd-joiGlt4A1O6gp0nEOL65TaJlwl3fRTG8ZpojYxkYyp161b1gWpjHLmamgl_surMSIv2038o4AZUiXSRDGRh8NvH5oRp90kvYXiE-mVdIlonEpxgjU75xsWxPrQMRpc3h/a2_aYJMbEdK6iLEFg60mFRyr_qerYqnB/10)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Qn6N0gRjk1YJnex3Jto_-_bKLoWMvA5EROwwnLhrIIJ3Fb4FuYa-d_Kin68o6YWjwi4xLGmb5wt-V4tijlolU0HcW5FvdCT3vbaVj0DnTDiTdKhicXVECJayf8bq_PZvLQ0TqXjOYMWGteuIjWRG75MrQvwqxnakEQI6Z-1UKgvsT8jjM2nt9Ze9V0QUepXD6T-nFlDy8ECGqKAOABJXrinsL-mCejDMixMGBzXtksvTNRT9Sxg7BV9FDtTiTEXkWC8PTiXC4AWQRxylepPHWQUyeW5r_weRgnupaVgnE0RX1tHUby7kH37gEB9VaM-Ip1pCvCLBvCq6PwJNgduH5q9t-nNyEg8mBebAegGOPL1mGRivrC0but_OURStl0wrhSBVMQZaOOQrsKEoakeb0vvnXgXy9wB3gWOZh37p7pC0swQawv7v63_KJMsqlsGPbwwCqqC8AhYiUSRea5yphYhFHL49Xj-v0suRq4FPQ2Qy5f4NlOdQe5n8Kq_CCRLY9TW_-8A3IiLTxE3HwMm_nQyDnKSzMOp5p8NvwcSXfinK6YLQbQvmQ2wuSLw8QlHMsfN7Rh4XgudVCLT89XX18Ow5Jw1iPVcrY3ReEgmzQSYiPDRr3nZDcuJCTSvR45UkizjnM4l8j8On_mWTPiqCc7YU83hkEBPDX_erELSvzqrWLUh5PM_JFZejRBfq3Y7JwvBxu9uTvLiaG2noftTUtPWLOBfs6yr1r_wkxJBnHANI1bIEi4s8FRytn-ZsE7j0E2OtJ8F6-dFDkDg/-hBP1ozJ4K_XRa6Ib7RhZ6245xFDIqgT/10) Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis."

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/qyWf7xDn1WHFDuQ5WpkbHqKHg3wSwiL4e6Xr8-UeASH7jJU-CknNXRhpgRnbZJVJILXRE1UA5g1zxH44kP3ch9lTupycWNBzzRe0KhfOWIU6xf4RhX01rCIejanU2MwJK0jHfbtJaeNbmJhvPg2cCMwt_N1TCDSSUpbUWPPmcD2Xsa5RyG_GwEpIJaETi13w9kvLiEtUkf_KM36XjbzfQKS3Q1dg30AocqWBGhlCqOVv8QJ3FcMIdDkQjMc9KLPVAOfyi7nH36qsD4YqKdSOQIOIknmWICg21rCWIXIC2Fv6DmRKDGv_Ng3M-R9iinenP1a2e9aH_4T4edUcfMpDFKBkuBd-qE7OsjEslfFCrd1VVdCkr6b0Kh1UEpt-KOoDXNuCpU3yYXvW8sjw1ZV7y__H1AaKxm2sPg-il3l6ZnGl7pMFmMm-0J72uReQrSDlxpXlBTtHfZFf25FR7UiTBggVSI2JUsE2XuXIJ2hTzL5vNRL3toj8kvPWOZkimrWpwCzPHMkwBtg0_bAUdJl13v7Upj9eKi9VN3AenQiae9zTD5bn4aM-bJpco4A1FJk6J_VXx25bMJ9Lepgl_hHCOU-mOvIpxH_D4bO9jwt8Dl4ZclAvb6xD5cc32X6-3VGXHmRhfFIZGkvmm6SIGBpzfnsdsH3_-bvaUSKWnXuJa7HCWMMPLRpSv3ncnpF0xfZxONQYk6IfZqujKvj39N92V28H8YQowZJcxsh2Kq82qVK5u4tPe5JCsgxCD5H2V6y1WcFTGsINP5uJ7Ms/YeZ1-h9uJ_sTJXhgXwhIenb6TrF8EhKa/10) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/-Rg27aToySqAou7IqnomJvrJF22aDMI3XqOCig4Xzsm5_vD2h0AChljiuEml5q2ueU7ZohkwzfF0G4V_T_Yhw3juYxxVbBEVwX16izPmz4vmgYWOAQ-21xTW546GBYJNbDkPlewpae80ffr71vxH441jMj1TrB5OQwTIszrZWBkXgbbCbTgh88Rnro6L_3T0aVtDByQM3jzkSpSH-snCzT2BRt1UC4BQ4oWGQ0qI2PrmeW2Ri5NfceR6UahbsGAnANoJrmGDHPT_9CYwlDOYicYrN4zScjbhqhjryeHNFduA3PNb0hDQk41c9JwB0Nr2UJlRH8uEaEXBVUpD9VJJm33cHa7f6v3PG6FoEn19ljqnqzLifj42HCeHsU1KsJpS5xjql7nIUquRcZBPzq0JbK1Zfj3r3lXpuM0cEk-LTJDWnHy7pPqp2ocCsQi0PpO1Wlvrtk1NTtX3h6dmVPq2LHAr53LhIt9jUCpc0JS8Mb2uLu0SlarOWN4_PE1dZKRUcYLCT_5ot49_jzZbX30nflFm7ibWuNDIjvl9bolAq_aUwArCz-EdfhENhX8Sv4_SJYSND2z45f8y17Q-CjvXc-B-DyA6vFr7sN82TkA7VUOXiNABLVoktXjddETnN-wVFlkwVLXZc37hR_zwknalDkzcccLmL3GdWXU5yWBjAWNVlC5J5HN4ZW9BJdrqNiwGWNnqExq3QiWHq0Fubmmc_h766wYBP_dRnllBL926I7CvsAXWkDovxsqxtJSNEsTkrvlnQiasfq8S1K8/2k7DyzORNWIajm22-uHDg_hxduiHd2CW/10)

Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/_Dy1btBCdXSt1hI2vfRSY3Nd_SAGvcJ_a60OZmglgFGm2nZnsjts035txHBVf_9yGh4-NbNC56ZksHOVWSz3fwpYACm-C7R19E5GO0V47yfL1sS-CGGhpIDqVAbXTiZCCA7XdDndemd4gKiQYZyPE-ehmSo5SomVcxW-xsQsN0wZdEwvegBA2xbSqYetDOyOdD37GAOXnZbZJHj5LVQ7KRcROLfci5ZZFA/mmodqMcCR-07KoYk9VOZsXIK-A5MGkgU/10)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/-frLG-c37PH1YGprUWwcHq-81LwFB26jSGxY19-zipWkJzGCIounoEd-joiGlt4A1O6gp0nEOL65TaJlwl3fRTG8ZpojYxkYyp161b1gWpjHLmamgl_surMSIv2038o4AZUiXSRDGRh8NvH5oRp90kvYXiE-mVdIlonEpxgjU75xsWxPrQMRpc3h/a2_aYJMbEdK6iLEFg60mFRyr_qerYqnB/10).

name: James Carville
subject: Mallory has a spine. That’s rare in this business.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
I’ve seen a lot of Democrats. But Mallory McMorrow is something else.

|
---
Here’s the deal, friend – [**I’ve seen a lot of Democrats. But Mallory McMorrow is something else. And I need you to help her come out of the gates swinging. Will you split a gift to her campaign and Ohio House Dems today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110953791/555748166/-1576555546?refcode=250705_McMorrow_BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQwMmE3ZC1lNzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MTWlcrl_idEAEmVveG3VvIla1NfItLPj7ficIVQpNE=) I’ve known my good friend Mallory for a while now. She made waves back in 2022 with a viral speech—and let me tell you something: I’ve been in this business a long time, and that was one of the best political moments I’ve ever seen. She stood up on the Senate floor, called out the absolute garbage coming from the far-right, and did not flinch. She told the truth. With fire. With heart. And people listened. Hell I told everyone I’d show that speech as an instruction manual, and I meant it. That’s the kind of leadership we need right now. So when I tell you Mallory’s a fighter, I damn well mean it. She flipped a Republican state Senate seat that nobody thought was winnable. Then she helped flip the entire chamber for the first time in 40 years. And now? She’s stepping up again — because Donald Trump and Elon Musk and the rest of that billionaire boys club are lighting our democracy on fire. _**And they’d love nothing more than to take back Michigan while they’re at it.**_ **Here’s the truth: Michigan might just be the closest swing state this cycle.** National Republicans are gearing up to spend more than EVER this cycle in Michigan, and if we don’t crush our grassroots fundraising goals, we’ll spend the whole campaign playing catch up to their war chest. If Mallory’s going to fight back — and win — we’ve gotta get her campaign off to a hell of a start. [**So I’m asking, friend — will you rush a donation right now -- split with Ohio House Dems -- to help my friend Mallory crush her fundraising goals and show the GOP we’re not messing around?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110953793/555748168/-1576555546?refcode=250705_McMorrow_BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQwMmE3ZC1lNzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MTWlcrl_idEAEmVveG3VvIla1NfItLPj7ficIVQpNE=) Let’s go win this thing. | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110953795/555748170/-632785217?amount=10&refcode=250705_McMorrow_BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmQwMmE3ZC1lNzU5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MTWlcrl_idEAEmVveG3VvIla1NfItLPj7ficIVQpNE= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

Join a movement** _**that won 't be stopped!**_
#### **🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & **_**our**_**democratic future**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.z8GGCrcP9pmo7ai5d-QV8xFe-b-dKC5OxEFt54Q2apE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167609242)
* * *
When he ran for President in 1980, Ronald Reagan hinted at his strategy for shrinking the federal government: "If you've got a kid that's extravagant, you can lecture him all you want to about his extravagance. Or you can cut his allowance and achieve the same end much quicker."
It was a simple idea: you can't spend money you don't have, so cutting taxes would cut spending, and less spending would mean less government. Reagan's budget director David Stockman even coined a pithy term for it--"starving the beast"--that became a right-wing mantra.
The problem was that the idea was more simplistic than simple, ignored political reality, and didn't work at all. Governments aren't spendthrift teenagers. When they run out of money, they can just keep spending. And politicians have incentives to keep spending on popular things that people want: that's what gets them re-elected.
So as Republicans kept cutting taxes every chance they got--mostly on the wealthy--they also kept spending more. As a result, the debt rose steadily during the Reagan-Bush years, then _shrank_ during the Clinton years (under a Democrat who actually cared about a balanced budget).
It expanded yet again, by 37%, under the next Republican President, who also had a tax cut fetish, George W. Bush. (Yes, it also rose under Obama and Biden, as they tried to rescue us from the Great Recession and the Covid Recession).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/caa17293-b182-4d60-ac96-3334c6045dd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
By the end of the first Trump term, the far right saw the problem. Enter right wing-mantra 2.0: if you can't starve the beast, put poison in its diet.
The Republican budget bill (I won't use Trump's stupid name for it, which polling shows actually fools 6% of independents into liking it more) adds $4 trillion to the debt. _But here 's the key: _that figure is actually made up of **$3.4 trillion** in new debt plus about **$700 billion** in additional _interest_ on that debt. It's those interest payments that are interesting to the far right wing.
`Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!`
_**Get The Truth corporate media ignores from a former Biden ad man & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know and will tell What Is Really Going On.**_
_**And support our new *Soundcheck Fund* to help fund & promote independent media!**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.z8GGCrcP9pmo7ai5d-QV8xFe-b-dKC5OxEFt54Q2apE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167609242)
Look at this basic chart of federal spending from a couple years ago:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f98ad325-2661-4292-a7d3-4d9354f5661f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The federal budget is made up of about 2/3 "mandatory" spending. Those are funds that Congress has to spend by law, mostly Social Security and Medicare. When I worked in Congress in the 2000s, the rule of thumb was 2/3 goes to mandatory spending, and the remaining 1/3 goes to "discretionary" spending, which is everything else.
But now look at that yellow wedge that says "net interest." That's the amount of interest that we're paying on the debt. That wedge has been steadily growing. And as it does, it's eating into discretionary spending, which is now only 26%.
Here's the clever political reality that the far-right undertood. No politician wants to cut Social Security and Medicare. Republicans won't cut military spending--which is about half of our discretionary spending even before Republicans just added another $153 billion--and Democrats might want to but they're afraid to be called weak on defense.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f3fbeeec-090f-481f-acc1-a987b5864e9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So to them--while they may pretend differently--more debt is great. As the debt goes up, interest payments go up. And as interest payments go up, the _only_ thing that gets squeezed is the rest of non-defense discretionary spending.
That's everything else that Russel Vought and his Heritage Foundation/Project 2025 cabal has desperately wanted to kill for years: health (Medicaid, ACA), education, veterans benefits, transportation, the justice system, and social services.
That is the sneaky agenda going on behind the scenes here.
Republicans did a lot of cosplaying as budget hawks in recent weeks, hemming over whether the Trump budget created too much debt. A few of them may have meant it. But in the basement bowels of the Heritage Foundation, they're popping a cork today over all this new debt.
Because in the years ahead, it is going to keep leaking the interest payment poison that will slowly kill off the things that regular people need, and that they hate.
* * *

clean_body: $4 Trillion in New Trump Debt Is EXACTLY What The Far Right Wanted | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? $4 Trillion in New Trump Debt Is EXACTLY What The Far Right Wanted | | | Jul 5 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Blue Amp 's building something big. We launched The Soundcheck Fund (TSF) to elevate independent voices.We 're gonna build an ecosystem of bold, hard-hitting journalists, video producers & cocommentators... We 're giving grants and using our platform to promote talent. We 've donated five figures to kick off the fund. There 's a link to the form on our homepage. To support the project ! Join a movement that won 't be stopped! 🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & ourdemocratic future When he ran for President in 1980, Ronald Reagan hinted at his strategy for shrinking the federal government: "If you've got a kid that's extravagant, you can lecture him all you want to about his extravagance. Or you can cut his allowance and achieve the same end much quicker." It was a simple idea: you can't spend money you don't have, so cutting taxes would cut spending, and less spending would mean less government. Reagan's budget director David Stockman even coined a pithy term for it--"starving the beast"--that became a right-wing mantra. The problem was that the idea was more simplistic than simple, ignored political reality, and didn't work at all. Governments aren't spendthrift teenagers. When they run out of money, they can just keep spending. And politicians have incentives to keep spending on popular things that people want: that's what gets them re-elected. So as Republicans kept cutting taxes every chance they got--mostly on the wealthy--they also kept spending more. As a result, the debt rose steadily during the Reagan-Bush years, then shrank during the Clinton years (under a Democrat who actually cared about a balanced budget). It expanded yet again, by 37%, under the next Republican President, who also had a tax cut fetish, George W. Bush. (Yes, it also rose under Obama and Biden, as they tried to rescue us from the Great Recession and the Covid Recession). | | ---|---|--- By the end of the first Trump term, the far right saw the problem. Enter right wing-mantra 2.0: if you can't starve the beast, put poison in its diet. The Republican budget bill (I won't use Trump's stupid name for it, which polling shows actually fools 6% of independents into liking it more) adds $4 trillion to the debt. But here 's the key: that figure is actually made up of $3.4 trillion in new debt plus about $700 billion in additional interest on that debt. It's those interest payments that are interesting to the far right wing. `Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!` Get The Truth corporate media ignores from a former Biden ad man & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know and will tell What Is Really Going On. And support our new Soundcheck Fund to help fund & promote independent media! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! Look at this basic chart of federal spending from a couple years ago: | | ---|---|--- The federal budget is made up of about 2/3 "mandatory" spending. Those are funds that Congress has to spend by law, mostly Social Security and Medicare. When I worked in Congress in the 2000s, the rule of thumb was 2/3 goes to mandatory spending, and the remaining 1/3 goes to "discretionary" spending, which is everything else. But now look at that yellow wedge that says "net interest." That's the amount of interest that we're paying on the debt. That wedge has been steadily growing. And as it does, it's eating into discretionary spending, which is now only 26%. Here's the clever political reality that the far-right undertood. No politician wants to cut Social Security and Medicare. Republicans won't cut military spending--which is about half of our discretionary spending even before Republicans just added another $153 billion--and Democrats might want to but they're afraid to be called weak on defense. | | ---|---|--- So to them--while they may pretend differently--more debt is great. As the debt goes up, interest payments go up. And as interest payments go up, the only thing that gets squeezed is the rest of non-defense discretionary spending. That's everything else that Russel Vought and his Heritage Foundation/Project 2025 cabal has desperately wanted to kill for years: health (Medicaid, ACA), education, veterans benefits, transportation, the justice system, and social services. That is the sneaky agenda going on behind the scenes here. Republicans did a lot of cosplaying as budget hawks in recent weeks, hemming over whether the Trump budget created too much debt. A few of them may have meant it. But in the basement bowels of the Heritage Foundation, they're popping a cork today over all this new debt. Because in the years ahead, it is going to keep leaking the interest payment poison that will slowly kill off the things that regular people need, and that they hate. This is a guest post from Blue Amp contributor Matt Robison--former Democratic Congressional chief of staff, campaign manager, and. Subscribe to Matt's Substack, , to support and amplify indy media! name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: MAGA’s $450 million migrant prison: “Alligator Alcatraz”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Republicans built a $450 million prison camp for immigrants in just 8
days. They’re calling it “Alligator Alcatraz.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250705-alligator-alcatraz/?source=em20250705-36818&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw ]Screenshot of Fox News showing Donald Trump, Rob DeSantis, and Kristi
Noem laughing inside a new migrant detention camp.

Let’s call this what it is: a modern-day concentration camp for migrants.

They raided FEMA funds to build it, money meant to protect people in
crisis. Caged cells are already flooding after hundreds of people were
sent there for indefinite detention.

The Florida GOP is already hawking merch with the jail’s tasteless
nickname, while some far-right voices like Laura Loomer are openly
suggesting feeding immigrants to alligators.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250705-alligator-alcatraz/?source=em20250705-36818&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw ]Screenshot of Florida GOP store website selling Alligator Alcatraz
merch

Not only that, but Loomer is suggesting they send ALL Latino Americans,
not just undocumented immigrants, to this prison camp. This is the
far-right roadmap: mass detention, forced removal, and violence.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250705-alligator-alcatraz/?source=em20250705-36818&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw ]Tweet by Lauren McKenzie: This is beyond disturbing for so many
reasons, but the biggest one is that 65 million is the total number of
Americans who happen to be Latino. They are saying the quiet part as
loudly as they can - they want to eradicate them all. Tweet by Laura
Loomer: Alligator lives matter. The good news is, alligators are
guaranteed at least 65 million meals if we get started now.

They aren’t even hiding it anymore,
Peter: far-right Republicans want to detain and
deport an entire community of people in this country.

It’s genocidal, and we cannot let them get away with it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250705-alligator-alcatraz/?source=em20250705-36818&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw ]Trump and MAGA leaders are already proposing building more of these
prison camps. Add your name to oppose them and demand the shutdown of
“Alligator Alcatraz” now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-signup-20250705-alligator-alcatraz/?source=em20250705-36818&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw ]Add Your Name

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250705-36818-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36818_1203867_fkQHKw&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36818%2E1203867%2EfkQHKw

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Ten Paradoxes of Our Age
body:
|
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuey9uIteknop5I6ITmcr0kdj4&s=HCMJPFNJIHNCOABC&req=l%3DD0I2xuex6qIteknop5I6ITmcr0kdj4%26s%3DALAFDCHLBMKEBEPD)
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | | [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuey9uIteknop5I7ITmcr0kdj4&s=HCMJPFNJIHNCOABC&req=l%3DD0I2xuex6qIteknop5I7ITmcr0kdj4%26s%3DALAFDCHLBMKEBEPD)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you noticed how our world seems full of contradictions lately?
Prosperity is rising. Yet freedom, in many places, is retreating.

Global diplomacy expands. But so do threats.

Cultural traditions persist. Still, they’re strained by mass migration and ideological division.
---
|
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuey9uIteknop5I8ITmcr0kdj4&s=HCMJPFNJIHNCOABC&req=l%3DD0I2xuex6qIteknop5I8ITmcr0kdj4%26s%3DALAFDCHLBMKEBEPD)
---
| | These aren't just abstract concepts—they're reshaping the world we live in right now.

And if we don’t understand them, we risk misunderstanding the forces at work and misjudging our response.

That’s why the Hoover Institution is sharing a **powerful new analysis from Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson:_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_.**

In it, he outlines ten defining paradoxes of our time, including:
* Why economic growth doesn’t always bring political freedom
* How diplomacy can coexist with rising global insecurity
* What happens when cultural pressures outpace integration

Whether you're concerned about America's future role in the world or seeking clarity amid global confusion, this piece offers a timely perspective.

These paradoxes are reshaping our world, and understanding them is crucial.

“If we do not understand the paradoxes of our age, we will continue to be confused by the outcomes.” — Victor Davis Hanson

**Download your free copy of '_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_ ' now and gain the insights you need to navigate our complex world.**

Access your free copy today: [https://resources.hoover.org/ten-paradoxes-of-our-age](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuey9uIteknop5I9ITmcr0kdj4&s=HCMJPFNJIHNCOABC&req=l%3DD0I2xuex6qIteknop5I9ITmcr0kdj4%26s%3DALAFDCHLBMKEBEPD)Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

[Make a Gift to Hoover](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuey9uIteknop5IaITmcr0kdj4&s=HCMJPFNJIHNCOABC&req=l%3DD0I2xuex6qIteknop5IaITmcr0kdj4%26s%3DALAFDCHLBMKEBEPD)
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: Are you proud to be an American?

body:
92% of Republicans are proud to be American — are you?

Peter,
I just saw the latest numbers from Gallup and had to contact you immediately. A staggering 92% of Republicans say they are proud to be an American, while a mere 36% of Democrats feel the same way.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/LtkTRe5raxTb-fyHbUf-Ag)This is a stark reminder of the divide in our country. While we conservatives are proud of our nation's history, values, and accomplishments, many on the Left seem more focused on tearing us down.
But I want to hear from you, Peter: [Are you proud to be an American?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/gx0qkyrQRh9x3zHxQ7ZMfw)
[EXTREMELY PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/9dxYqbhLZLrkJ6SD_OeBkg)[VERY PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/XD0m_0O9zu3Yj6TrCzvBxg)[MODERATELY PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/tsuQ0VSgMaEx2C0yo1VAfQ)[ONLY A LITTLE PROUD
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/wXXbvl7BIIAwfHIHxLc7cg)[NOT PROUD AT ALL
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwNzA1X0dULU1SLjExMDExN190MTY2NTQyOC0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDcwNV9HVC1NUi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2NjU0MjgtMjg5OSJ9/Y9fqQt70hI7uZZIwouerRw)As we move forward under President Trump's leadership, it's more important than ever that we stand strong and proud of who we are and what we represent. We must reject the radical left's attempts to undermine our patriotism and faith in America.

Thank you for your response to my poll.

Fellow American, As Antifa thugs organize riots across the country, I’m urgently asking you to renew your support for the man they nearly killed six years ago. You may remember Andy Ngo, the brave journalist who was brutally attacked by Antifa goons in 2019. **In addition to savagely beating him, these vicious attackers threw "milkshakes" laced with cement at Andy's head as he tried to retreat.**
---
| | Not only was Andy ruthlessly assaulted, but law enforcement stood by and let it happen. Radical politicians refused to protect their citizens and refused to prosecute the rioters who perpetrated these crimes. Even when presented with irrefutable video evidence, left-wing prosecutors turned a blind eye. We took matters into our own hands filing civil lawsuits with one purposes in mind— _hold lawless Antifa goons financially liable for their crimes._ After years of litigation, we secured $300,000 in judgments against Andy’s attackers. But the litigation is not over yet. Two things are happening: One of the defendants is appealing the judgment so we are fighting tirelessly, in court, to have the judgment upheld. And with respect to the other Antifa defendants, the Center of American Liberty is working with private investigators to track them down and enforce the judgments against them. We have to make them pay and finally deliver justice for Andy -- **[and I'm asking you to donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to help us.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0FvozAQhX-NuYHGY4zjA4ekBA5tulJSVbsnZIxJvMKBGico_74iQrnM4c335s1Tbuxt98iJ2BHEi20ngkjYliD-_Judv_1371Wcwr2Jf7JPx5ctvq3oHV_wVavqoz0VB3kqpuHv7jLM2fudvvDwGM0LXkMT45TtF1UUUZuzroU0MjkVnAqODDbRJWeN1lJQrjKggsOGC9ZtUs1T2nEpgEY2R0AOAjhSTtMsobqTrUq5Eboxje5ICs-cRDnjrVZ0CrPyfhhcogcX9fklhHF6PlYSLNXVtENIetsYHx7aXIPxyeDPBMsOUCjgKpagdJwCmFhmnMaYcYoZMMk7uRxh5S24ehpuXhvCil1Rxcf9N8FskZ1p7c0RVuwPq6KVG5U9Xwkr1iqs3hVV_VZuP-rtZ_Xn8FUf99_16Wt7jJex-oLx7umRwOrZ08jn7TjbvrdTJkgK52frpeM9x98AAAD__0XPkIE)** My name is Mark Trammell, and I am the CEO of the Center for American Liberty – a non-profit legal defense fund founded by Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights Harmeet K. Dhillon to defend your constitutionally protected freedoms. Andy Ngo, is just one victim of the targeted assaults against the 1st Amendment being carried out by Antifa. Over the last several years, you've seen even more attacks as Antifa and its radical allies weaponize every political controversy for a socialist agenda. You might even have riots happening in your town right now!

**There's a reason President Trump labeled Antifa a domestic terrorism group. They only exist to promote hate and fear.******

Make no mistake – **Antifa won't stop until they're in control and the Constitution has been reduced to ash.**

You and I have to let them know that their actions will not go unchecked.

We will fight tooth and nail for the freedoms our Founding Fathers sacrificed everything for. [**Join the battle with a donation of $35, $50, $100, or more to make Antifa pay for their violent crimes.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0FvozAQhX-NuYHGY4zjA4ekBA5tulJSVbsnZIxJvMKBGico_74iQrnM4c335s1Tbuxt98iJ2BHEi20ngkjYliD-_Judv_1371Wcwr2Jf7JPx5ctvq3oHV_wVavqoz0VB3kqpuHv7jLM2fudvvDwGM0LXkMT45TtF1UUUZuzroU0MjkVnAqODDbRJWeN1lJQrjKggsOGC9ZtUs1T2nEpgEY2R0AOAjhSTtMsobqTrUq5Eboxje5ICs-cRDnjrVZ0CrPyfhhcogcX9fklhHF6PlYSLNXVtENIetsYHx7aXIPxyeDPBMsOUCjgKpagdJwCmFhmnMaYcYoZMMk7uRxh5S24ehpuXhvCil1Rxcf9N8FskZ1p7c0RVuwPq6KVG5U9Xwkr1iqs3hVV_VZuP-rtZ_Xn8FUf99_16Wt7jJex-oLx7umRwOrZ08jn7TjbvrdTJkgK52frpeM9x98AAAD__0XPkIE) Please don't delay – it's only a matter of time before radical activists bring their terrorism to your backyard. We have to stop them NOW. Thank you for your support.

SIncerely,

clean_body: | | | | Fellow American, As Antifa thugs organize riots across the country, I’m urgently asking you to renew your support for the man they nearly killed six years ago. You may remember Andy Ngo, the brave journalist who was brutally attacked by Antifa goons in 2019. In addition to savagely beating him, these vicious attackers threw "milkshakes" laced with cement at Andy's head as he tried to retreat. | | Not only was Andy ruthlessly assaulted, but law enforcement stood by and let it happen. Radical politicians refused to protect their citizens and refused to prosecute the rioters who perpetrated these crimes. Even when presented with irrefutable video evidence, left-wing prosecutors turned a blind eye. We took matters into our own hands filing civil lawsuits with one purposes in mind— hold lawless Antifa goons financially liable for their crimes. After years of litigation, we secured $300,000 in judgments against Andy’s attackers. But the litigation is not over yet. Two things are happening: One of the defendants is appealing the judgment so we are fighting tirelessly, in court, to have the judgment upheld. And with respect to the other Antifa defendants, the Center of American Liberty is working with private investigators to track them down and enforce the judgments against them. We have to make them pay and finally deliver justice for Andy -- My name is Mark Trammell, and I am the CEO of the Center for American Liberty – a non-profit legal defense fund founded by Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights Harmeet K. Dhillon to defend your constitutionally protected freedoms. Andy Ngo, is just one victim of the targeted assaults against the 1st Amendment being carried out by Antifa. Over the last several years, you've seen even more attacks as Antifa and its radical allies weaponize every political controversy for a socialist agenda. You might even have riots happening in your town right now! There's a reason President Trump labeled Antifa a domestic terrorism group. They only exist to promote hate and fear.** Make no mistake – Antifa won't stop until they're in control and the Constitution has been reduced to ash. You and I have to let them know that their actions will not go unchecked. We will fight tooth and nail for the freedoms our Founding Fathers sacrificed everything for. Please don't delay – it's only a matter of time before radical activists bring their terrorism to your backyard. We have to stop them NOW. Thank you for your support. SIncerely, | | Mark Trammell CEO, Center for American Liberty | | | | | | Mark Trammell CEO, Center for American Liberty | | | P.S. Violent members of Antifa must understand that they cannot simply assault members of the public with impunity. Remember, your gift will help get justice for Andy Ngo! | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 |

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: an outrageous false attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
a MAGA super PAC just launched a 7-figure smear campaign against Mikie
A MAGA super PAC backing our opponent just announced it’s pouring MILLIONS of dollars into a new ad campaign smearing Mikie’s character.
**We urgently need to fight back against this false attack.[Will you split a $25 donation between our campaign and Sarah McBride today to help us correct the record and get the truth out to New Jersey voters before it’s too late?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250705-1?refcode=em20250705-2159&amount=25&refcode2=2159_21716_auVqTy&akid=2159%2E21716%2EauVqTy)**
**[Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250705-1?amount=25&refcode=em20250705-2159&refcode2=2159_21716_auVqTy&akid=2159%2E21716%2EauVqTy)**
The fact is, the early polling conducted in this campaign at the start of the general election shows the race is essentially deadlocked.
If we let this outrageous attack on Mikie’s character go unanswered, it could give Jack Ciattarelli the momentum he needs to pull ahead. Honestly, fumbling the ball at moments like this is how campaigns lose.
[**Any amount you are able to split between Mikie’s campaign and Sarah McBride will go an incredibly long way.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250705-1?refcode=em20250705-2159&refcode2=2159_21716_auVqTy&akid=2159%2E21716%2EauVqTy)

body:
Our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

| | | **👋 **To all of our supporters,

We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end.
---
| | Here's the key point: **Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate.**

That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. _And that's precisely what they've done._
---
| | Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

_And when we say small donations, we mean it._

This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion.

And that's precisely what they've done. | | Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. And when we say small donations, we mean it. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: If the White House doesn’t want ICE to be compared to a terrorist force, they should stop acting like one.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated.
It's Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal.
I went on CNN to tell the truth about ICE: They’re acting like a terrorist force, with masked men jumping out of unmarked cars to kidnap, detain, and disappear people without explanation.
It’s unconstitutional, illegal, and they’re terrorizing innocent people.
**What I said is the truth, and it clearly struck a nerve. Because now the White House is calling me “deranged” for standing up for immigrants:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250705_2_split?refcode=em20250705-3049&refcode2=3049_400544_Jjvxvm&akid=3049%2E400544%2EJjvxvm)
Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated, and I am _never_ going to stop fighting for the rights and dignity of every person, everywhere, regardless of their immigration status.
The White House can come after me all they want, but if they don’t want ICE to be compared to a terrorist force, they should stop acting like one. Period.
**Republicans are trying to silence me, but with your support, they won’t succeed.[Will you split a donation between me and Deb Haaland now to help me keep standing up against Trump’s radical right-wing immigration policy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250705_2_split?refcode=em20250705-3049&refcode2=3049_400544_Jjvxvm&akid=3049%2E400544%2EJjvxvm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250705_2_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250705-3049&refcode2=3049_400544_Jjvxvm&akid=3049%2E400544%2EJjvxvm)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

subject: Republicans called it a “travesty”, then voted for it anyway.

Peter ,
Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" is officially law – and unsurprisingly, the road to his desk was paved with Republican "outrage" followed by inevitable surrender.
One Republican called it "morally and fiscally bankrupt." Then he voted for it.
Another denounced it as a "travesty." He voted for it too.
And they weren't alone. Nearly every single House Republican who postured, whined, or performed anger over Trump's demands fell in line just in time for a group selfie with Speaker Mike Johnson after its passage.
At GOTV PAC, we're sick of the drama and the hypocrisy.
But most of all, we're sick of watching Republicans roll over for Trump's agenda no matter how cruel, how expensive, or how stupid it is for working families.
29 of these Republican seats are vulnerable in 2026, and we're going to make sure every single one feels the heat.

name: MAGA threats escalate! (via VPP)
subject: Do you stand with Gavin Newsom..?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re just waiting on you...
| **⚠️ _TRUMP’S THREATS AGAINST GAVIN NEWSOM ARE ESCALATING_ ⚠️** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91650?t=6&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H) **But we’re STILL waiting for you to sign onto our letter to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom — _what gives!?_**

[**We’re hitting send tomorrow at 9AM, friend, and we’re waiting on just 12 signatures from your state. Don’t leave us hanging:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91650?t=7&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H) | [**SIGN MY NAME: STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91650?t=8&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Governor Newsom,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy and the will of the people against Donald Trump’s _extremist political theater_ in California.**

You are bravely risking everything — even arrest — to stand up for the American people, and we’re extremely grateful.

**As Trump resorts to POLITICAL THEATER to threaten and intimidate Americans,_your resilience is needed now more than ever._**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting Trump do whatever he pleases — so I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless threats from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91650?t=9&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91650?t=10&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91650?t=11&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20482%2E878179%2Eb-Y52H)
---

clean_body: President Trump's FEARLESS Press Secretary - Karoline Leavitt - makes a DEFIANT STATEMENT all voters (who still support Trump) must read immediately:"The Democrats are doubling down on craziness and radical policies that are undermining the very fabric of our country. Just look at the Democrat nominee for NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani - he's a Democrat Socialist... Meanwhile, under President Trump's leadership, Republicans are fighting tirelessly for everyday, Middle Class Americans who reelected this President and who are carrying out a revolution of common sense"She struck gold with this one. Zohran Mamdani is the canary in the coal mine for everything to come if Conservatives back down and allow the Democrat Machine to barge back into power. Look, we've seen the Democrats' true face since President Trump took office. Since the SECOND he put his hand on the Bible, they threw decency and commonsense out the window to unleash a revolution of their own. They're hell-bent on taking down Conservatives - and our country with them. If we surrender power, they'll IMMEDIATELY move to impeach President Trump, shut down the MAGA agenda, ram through the woke agenda, and charge ahead to investigate our President and every single one of his allies. We can't let that happen. House Republicans are doing EVERYTHING they can to hold the line but it's time for Conservatives everywhere to help us out and take a stand. So here's what we're asking: We're pleading with EVERY SINGLE Conservative reading this email to go on the record right here and right now and confirm their support for the entire MAGA movement. Can we rely on you to be one of them? - not only does the Democrat Machine have Congressional Democrats... But they have Hollywood bigwigs, scores of Silicon Valley elites, and powerful lobbyists on speed dial. Unless we want the country we all know and love to become a socialist paradise, we need your help right here and right now.
